original: ‘‘ tiṇṇaṃ cīvarānaṃ aññatarappahonakaṃ sūriyuggamanasamaye vatthaṃ‘ kathinacīvaraṃ demā’ ti dātuṃ vaṭṭati , tassa parikammatthaṃ ettakā nāma sūciyo, ettakaṃ suttaṃ, ettakaṃ rajanaṃ, parikammaṃ karontānaṃ ettakānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ yāgubhattañca dātuṃ vaṭṭatī’’ ti.
translation: 应该在太阳升起的时候去供养三种之一的充足的布料，并说"我们供养卡提那衣“。为了那个卡提那衣的准备工作，应该去供养这么多的针，这么多的线，这么多的染料以及正在做准备工作的这些比库们的粥饭。

original: Tantavāyagehato hi ābhatasantāneneva khalimakkhitasāṭako na vaṭṭati, malīnasāṭakopi na vaṭṭati, tasmā kathinatthārasāṭakaṃ labhitvā suṭṭhu dhovitvā sūciādīni cīvarakammūpakaraṇāni sajjetvā bahūhi bhikkhūhi saddhiṃ tadaheva sibbitvā niṭṭhitasūcikammaṃ rajitvā kappabinduṃ datvā kathinaṃ attharitabbaṃ.
translation: 就是，（崭新的）浆过的衣料是不合适的，脏衣料也不合适。从那里得到卡提那的铺展布料之后。好好洗了之后。准备针等做袈裟的工具。跟众多比库一起，在当天缝纫之后，完成针线活，染了之后再点净。应该铺展卡提那。

original: Vuḍḍhesupi yo mahāpariso tadaheva cīvaraṃ katvā attharituṃ sakkoti, tassa dātabbaṃ.
translation: 应该把袈裟给予年长者中的有大团队者，且能够在当天做完衣并开展。

original: Sace vuḍḍho na sakkoti navakataro sakkoti, tassa dātabbaṃ.
translation: 如果年老的没有这个能力，年轻一点的有能力，应该给他。

original: Apica saṅghena mahātherassa saṅgahaṃ kātuṃ vaṭṭati, tasmā‘‘ tumhe bhante gaṇhatha, mayaṃ katvā dassāmā’’ ti vattabbaṃ.
translation: 不过，如果僧团为了团结而给予长老也是合适的，因此应该说“尊者，请您接受，我们制作完之后给（您）”。

original: Evaṃ dinne pana kathine sace taṃ kathinadussaṃ niṭṭhitaparikammameva hoti , iccetaṃ kusalaṃ.
translation: 而且，在这样供养的时候卡提那布已经完成了准备工作，如此是很好的。

original: No ce niṭṭhitaparikammaṃ hoti,‘‘ ahaṃ thero’’ ti vā‘‘ bahussuto’’ ti vā ekenāpi akātuṃ na labbhati, sabbeheva sannipatitvā dhovanasibbanarajanāni niṭṭhāpetabbāni.
translation: 如果没有完成准备工作。说：“我是长老”或者说：“我是非常有学问的人”，只是[只有]一个人[做不完]而[置之不理]不去做(袈裟)，是不行的。应该先召集了所有的僧人（ထေရ, နဝ, မဇ္ဈိမ, ဗဟုဿုတ, အပ္ပဿုတရဟန်း အားလုံးတို့သည်သာ။）组织人完成洗涤、缝纫、染色。

original: Idañhi kathinavattaṃ nāma buddhappasatthaṃ.
translation: 这样的所谓的卡提那义务是佛陀所称赞的。

original: Atīte padumuttaropi bhagavā kathinavattaṃ akāsi.
translation: 在过去，莲花盛世尊曾经说过卡提那义务。

original: Tassa kira aggasāvako sujātatthero nāma kathinaṃ gaṇhi, taṃ satthā aṭṭhasaṭṭhiyā bhikkhusatasahassehi saddhiṃ nisīditvā akāsi.
translation: 据说他的上首弟子善生长老持有卡提那，那位导师与六百八十万比库一起坐下之后说的。

original: Katapariyositaṃ pana kathinaṃ gahetvā atthārakena bhikkhunā‘‘ sace saṅghāṭiyā kathinaṃ attharitukāmo hoti, porāṇikā saṅghāṭi paccuddharitabbā, navā saṅghāṭi adhiṭṭhātabbā.
translation: 再者，拿起已经做好的卡提那之后， 铺展比库如果是想要桑咖帝卡提那。应该把旧的桑咖帝舍除，决意新的桑咖帝。

original: ‘ Imāya saṅghāṭiyā kathinaṃ attharāmī’ ti vācā bhinditabbā’’ tiādinā parivāre vuttavidhānena kathinaṃ attharitabbaṃ.
translation: 应该口头说这句话：“我用这个桑咖帝开展卡提那”等，用在附随中已经说过的程序开展卡提那。

original: Attharitvā ca pana‘‘ tena kathinatthārakena bhikkhunā saṅghaṃ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṃsaṃ uttarāsaṅgaṃ karitvā añjaliṃ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo–
translation: 进一步，铺开了之后（按照nissaya Attharitvā意思是ခင်းပြီး၍ 铺设完了之后），由那位铺展卡提那的比库比库靠近了僧团之后偏袒右肩举手合掌之后，这样说：

original: ‘ atthataṃ bhante saṅghassa kathinaṃ, dhammiko kathinatthāro, anumodathā’ ti tehi anumodakehi bhikkhūhi ekaṃsaṃ uttarāsaṅgaṃ karitvā añjaliṃ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo–
translation: “尊者，已经铺开的是僧团的卡提那,卡提那铺开是如法的，你们随喜”，由随喜的比库们偏袒右肩之后举手合掌，如此说：

original: ‘ atthataṃ āvuso saṅghassa kathinaṃ, dhammiko kathinatthāro, anumodāmā’’ ti evamādinā parivāre vuttavidhāneneva anumodāpetabbaṃ, itarehi ca anumoditabbaṃ.
translation: “朋友，已经铺开的是僧团的卡提那,卡提那铺开是如法的，我们随喜”，这个等在附随中……后面没看懂

original: Evaṃ sabbesaṃ atthataṃ hoti kathinaṃ.
translation: 当这样时，所有比库所具有的卡提那都完成了铺展。

original: {Kambalamaddanamattenā}ti ekavāraṃyeva rajane pakkhittena dantavaṇṇena paṇḍupalāsavaṇṇena vā.
translation: 只染一次只在染汁中泡一次而带有象牙色或枯黄色的[布]。

original: Tattha tadaheva akatvā ṭhapetvā karaṇaṃ karaṇasannidhi.
translation: 其中的制作存储即当天就没做完而收工搁置后再制作。

original: Evañhi samaṇḍalikataṃ hoti, taṃ ṭhapetvā aññena acchinnakena vā dvatticatukhaṇḍena vā na vaṭṭati.
translation: 确实，除了这样做成的具有（大、小）格子的[ 衣 ]，其他未割截或只割截两、三、四片都不行。

original: 311. Na paccessan ti na puna āgamissaṃ.
translation: 311 . 不回来了，我将不再回来。

original: 372. Sabbanīlakādīni rajanaṃ dhovitvā puna rajitvā dhāretabbāni.
translation:
372 .
纯青等衣洗掉颜色后重新染是可以穿的。

original: Na sakkā ce honti dhovituṃ, paccattharaṇāni vā kātabbāni.
translation: 如果漂不掉，可以做被单。

original: Pādapīṭhan ti dhotapādaṭṭhapanakaṃ.
translation: 脚凳，洗完之后放脚的。

original: Pādakathalikan ti adhotapādaṭṭhapanakaṃ pādaghaṃsanaṃ vā.
translation: 脚垫，放未洗的脚或蹭脚。

original: Pañca yathāvuḍḍhan ti pakatattehipi saddhiṃ vuḍḍhapaṭipāṭiyā eva.
translation: 五种长幼顺序，依照（比库）自己原本的（雨安居）的长幼。

original: 270. Gilānassa chattan ti ettha yassa kāyaḍāho vā pittakopo vā hoti, cakkhu vā dubbalaṃ, añño vā koci ābādho vinā chattena uppajjati, tassa gāme vā araññe vā chattaṃ vaṭṭati.
translation:
270 .
这里有身体发热者、胆汁易怒、视力减退、没有伞会生其他的病，他所在的村落或林野可以打伞。

original: Vasse pana cīvaraguttatthaṃ vāḷamigacorabhayesu ca attaguttatthampi vaṭṭati.
translation: 下雨时为了保护袈裟，在猛兽、盗贼出没的危险处为了保护自己，[打伞]是可以的。

original: Ekapaṇṇacchattaṃ pana sabbattheva vaṭṭati.
translation: 另外，单叶伞在一切处都是可以的。

original: Tasmā yathā setapaṭā aḍḍhapālakanigaṇṭhā pārupanti, yathā ca ekacce paribbājakā uraṃ vivaritvā dvīsu aṃsakūṭesu pāvuraṇaṃ ṭhapenti, yathā ca ekasāṭakā manussā nivatthasāṭakassa ekenantena piṭṭhiṃ pārupitvā ubho kaṇṇe ubhosu aṃsakūṭesu ṭhapenti, yathā ca surāsoṇḍādayo sāṭakena gīvaṃ parikkhipantā ubho ante udare vā olambenti;
translation: 因此，如同白衣半护者尼犍陀所披着；以及如同有些遍行[外道]露胸而将外衣放在两肩上；以及如同一衣诸人下着的衣之一边在背[部]披着后两角置于两肩上；以及如同诸嗜酒者等以衣在脖子围绕，两边在胸[部]垂下或投在背[部]；

original: piṭṭhiyaṃ vā khipanti, yathā ca antepurikāyo akkhitārakamattaṃ dassetvā oguṇṭhikaṃ pārupanti, yathā ca mahājeṭṭhā dīghasāṭakaṃ nivāsetvā tasseva ekenantena sakalasarīraṃ pārupanti, yathā ca kassakā khettakuṭiṃ pavisantā sāṭakaṃ paliveṭhetvā upakacchake pakkhipitvā tasseva ekenantena sarīraṃ pārupanti, yathā ca brāhmaṇā ubhinnaṃ upakacchakānaṃ antarena sāṭakaṃ pavesetvā aṃsakūṭesu pakkhipanti, yathā ca pāḷikārako bhikkhu ekaṃsapārupanena pārutaṃ vāmabāhuṃ vivaritvā cīvaraṃ aṃsakūṭaṃ āropeti;
translation:
以及如同诸宫女只是现（露）出眼睛，缠绕[头]而披着；以及如同诸大长者用长衣下着后，只以那一边而披覆全身；
以及如同农夫在进入田间小屋时卷绕衣后投入腋窝，只以那一边而披覆身体；
以及如同婆罗门把衣的中间塞入两个腋下后而放在双肩；
以及如同巴利原典工作者比库通过包裹一肩，（两个衣角持平）露出本应包裹的左臂，而拉到肩上。

original: evaṃ apārupitvā sabbepi ete aññe ca evarūpe pārupanadose vajjetvā nibbikāraṃ parimaṇḍalaṃ pārupitabbaṃ.
translation: 不以如披着后，以及舍离一切其他与此相似披着的过失，应当不改变齐整而披着。

original: 285. {Kalyāṇavākkaraṇā}ti madhurasaddā.
translation: 语音柔美，语音柔和。

original: Chandaso {āropemā}ti vedaṃ viya sakkatabhāsāya vācanāmaggaṃ āropema.
translation: 用雅辞提升，如同吠陀一样用梵语(sakkatabhāsā)来提升读诵方式。

original: Sakāya {niruttiyā}ti ettha sakā nirutti nāma sammāsambuddhena vuttappakāro māgadhiko vohāro.
translation: 用我本人的语言，这里我本人的语言即被完全自我觉悟者所说的那种马嘎塔的方言。

original: 297. {Āsandiko}ti caturassapīṭhaṃ vuccati.
translation:
297 .
方凳
所谓的四方凳。

original: Sattaṅgo nāma tīsu disāsu apassayaṃ katvā katamañco, ayampi pamāṇātikkanto vaṭṭati.
translation:
七支椅，
在三个方向设置倚靠而制作的椅榻，其尺寸超标也是可以的。

original: 336. {Kheḷāsakassā}ti ettha micchājīvena uppannapaccayā ariyehi vantabbā kheḷasadisā, tathārūpe paccaye ayaṃ ajjhoharatīti katvā kheḷāsakoti bhagavatā vutto.
translation:
嗟唾食者(kheḷāsaka)
，这里指由于邪命而出现的资具好像圣们吐出的口水一样，他[ 天赐 ]吞食的正是这样资具；世尊把这样的行为称为嗟唾食者。

original: Na tāva therena bhuñjitabban ti idaṃ yaṃ paricchinnabhikkhukaṃ bhattaggaṃ, yattha manussā sabbesaṃ pāpetvā dātukāmā honti, taṃ sandhāya vuttaṃ.
translation: 之前上座不应先吃这是就下面的情况而言，在斋堂(bhattagga)比库是已分好组的，所有[人]的[钵]都已经装好后还有人们想要供养。

original: Yaṃ pana mahābhattaggaṃ hoti, yattha ekasmiṃ padese bhuñjanti, ekasmiṃ padese udakaṃ diyyati, tattha yathāsukhaṃ bhuñjitabbaṃ.
translation: 在大型的斋堂中，一个区域用餐，另一个区域给水，其中应根据方便来用餐。

original: evameva ye ime anuppanne vatthusmiṃ paṭikacceva avītikkamanatthāya garudhammā paññattā.
translation: 同样地，制定这[八]敬法(garudhamma)旨在未雨绸缪。

original: Tesu apaññattesupi mātugāmassa pabbajitattā pañceva vassasatāni saddhammo tiṭṭheyya.
translation: 只有在其（[八]敬法）未制定的情况下，正法才会因为女性的出家而只持续五百年。

original: Paṭikacceva paññattattā pana aparānipi pañcavassasatāni ṭhassatīti evaṃ paṭhamaṃ vuttaṃ vassasahassameva ṭhassatīti.
translation:
而因为提前制定[八]敬法的缘故而可以再延续五百年，
这样就解释了为什么先说维持千年。

original: Vassasahassan ti cetaṃ paṭisambhidāpabhedappattakhīṇāsavavaseneva vuttaṃ.
translation: 而所说的千年这个词只是依照如辨析等各种达成漏尽的方式。

original: Tato pana uttarimpi sukkhavipassakakhīṇāsavavasena vassasahassaṃ, anāgāmivasena vassasahassaṃ, sakadāgāmivasena vassasahassaṃ, sotāpannavasena vassasahassanti evaṃ pañcavassasahassāni paṭivedhasaddhammo ṭhassati.
translation:
而从此之后依干观者漏尽者而持续千年，
依不来者而持续千年，
依一来者而持续千年，
依入流而持续千年，
如此通达正法会持续五千年。

original: Pariyattidhammopi tāniyeva.
translation: 教理法亦有这么久。

original: Na hi pariyattiyā asati paṭivedho atthi, nāpi pariyattiyā sati paṭivedho na hoti;
translation: 事实上，没有教理就没有通达，有教理就不可能没有通达。

original: liṅgaṃ pana pariyattiyā antarahitāyapi ciraṃ pavattissatīti.
translation: 不过，即使教理灭没了，出家外相也会长期存续。

original: Bhikkhunīupasampadānujānanakathā
translation: 比丘尼]]（佛教女僧人）受具足戒（正式出家仪式）[[许可的讨论

original: 404. Anujānāmi bhikkhave bhikkhūhi bhikkhuniyo upasampādetun ti imāya anupaññattiyā bhikkhū pañcasatā sākiyāniyo mahāpajāpatiyā saddhivihāriniyo katvā upasampādesuṃ.
translation: 授 由于这一许可，五百位释迦族女众将大爱道瞿昙弥及其共住弟子们授了具足戒。

original: Iti tā sabbāpi ekatoupasampannā nāma ahesuṃ.
translation: 如此，她们（那五百释迦族公主）全都成为了]]upasampannā（受具足戒者）[[。

original: Ye kho tvaṃ gotamīti iminā ovādena gotamī arahattaṃ pattā.
translation: “Gotamī（乔达弥）啊，正是通过这番教导，你已证得arahattaṃ（阿罗汉果）。”

original: 409. Kammaṃ na {karīyatī}ti tajjanīyādi sattavidhampi kammaṃ na karīyati.
translation: （业）不应造作"tajjanīyādi（谴责等）七种kamma[[（业）都不应造作。

original: {Khamāpentī}ti na puna evaṃ karissāmīti khamāpenti.
translation: "（他们）请求原谅，说'我不会再这样做了'，。"

original: Sace pana aññasmiṃ ropite aññaṃ karonti,‘‘ tajjanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṃ karotī’’ ti ettha vuttanayena kāretabbataṃ āpajjanti.
translation: 若他人在已提出的tajjanīyakamma（谴责行为）议题上提出其他议案，则应按照《Mahāvagga（大品）》中所述方式处理（即以dukkaṭa（恶作罪）裁定）。

original: 411. {Kaddamodakenā}ti ettha na kevalaṃ kaddamodakena, vippasannaudakarajanakaddamādīsupi yena kenaci osiñcantassa dukkaṭameva.
translation: "用泥水"：此处不仅单纯指泥水（kaddamodakena），[还包括]用特别清澈的水、污水、泥浆等任何液体泼洒（osiñcantassa）时，都只犯]]dukkaṭa[[（恶作）罪。

original: Avandiyo so bhikkhave bhikkhu bhikkhunisaṅghena {kātabbo}ti bhikkhunupassaye sannipatitvā‘‘ asuko nāma ayyo bhikkhunīnaṃ apasādanīyaṃ dasseti, etassa ayyassa avandiyakaraṇaṃ ruccatī’’ ti evaṃ tikkhattuṃ sāvetabbaṃ.
translation: 比丘们，]]bhikkhu（比丘）bhikkhunī（比丘尼）不应向]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）合掌礼敬。若某位]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）]在bhikkhunupassaya（比丘尼寺院）]中做出不敬行为（如显示不净信之举），比丘僧团应集会并三次宣告："这位ayyo（尊者）对]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）做出不敬行为，僧团决议取消其受礼资格，诸位是否同意？"

original: Ettāvatā avandiyo kato hoti.
translation: 如此三遍告知后，]]avandiyo[[（不礼敬者）已被处理。`

original: Tato paṭṭhāya yathā sāmaṇere disvā na vandanti;
translation: 从那以后，他们看见]]sāmaṇera。

original: evameva disvāpi na vanditabbo.
translation: 见了evameva（如此）这般情形，连disvāpi（即使见到）也不该vanditabbo（礼拜）。

original: Tena bhikkhunā sammā vattantena bhikkhunupassayaṃ āgantvā vihāreyeva saṅghaṃ vā gaṇaṃ vā ekapuggalaṃ vā upasaṅkamitvā ukkuṭikaṃ nisīditvā añjaliṃ paggahetvā‘‘ bhikkhunisaṅgho mayhaṃ khamatū’’ ti khamāpetabbaṃ.
translation: 该比丘应端正行持，前往比丘尼住处，在寺院内拜诣僧团、团体或单独一位比丘，蹲跪合掌乞求："请比丘尼僧团宽恕我。"（应如是求忏悔）`

original: Tena bhikkhunā bhikkhunīnaṃ santikaṃ āgantvā‘‘ eso bhikkhu tumhe khamāpetī’’ ti vattabbaṃ.
translation: 那位]]bhikkhu（比丘）应前往bhikkhunī（比丘尼）们那里，[对她们]说："这位bhikkhu[[（比丘）请求你们原谅"。

original: Tato paṭṭhāya so vanditabbo.
translation: 从那时起，那位]]bhikkhu[[（比丘）]应当被礼敬。

original: Ayamettha saṅkhepo, vitthāraṃ pana kammavibhaṅge vakkhāma.
translation: 这是kammavibhaṅga（业分别论）的简要说明，详细解释我们将在]]kammavibhaṅga（业分别论）[[中阐述。

original: {Obhāsentī}ti asaddhammena obhāsenti.
translation: 他们用]]asaddhamma[[（不正法）虚饰自己，恶言相向。

original: Avandiyakaraṇaṃ vuttanayameva.
translation: 对不敬者（avandiyakaraṇaṃ）的处置方式，按照（vuttanayameva）所说的规矩即可。[1]

original: Āvaraṇan ti vihārappavesane nivāraṇaṃ .
translation: 障碍是指]]āvaraṇa（阻挡）vihārappavesane

original: Ovādaṃ ṭhapetun ti ettha na bhikkhunupassayaṃ gantvā ṭhapetabbo.
translation: 在此处不应停止]]ovādaṃ（教诫），即[不应]前往bhikkhunupassayaṃ[[（比丘尼住处）后停止。

original: Ovādatthāya pana āgatā bhikkhuniyo vattabbā‘‘ asukā nāma bhikkhunī sāpattikā, tassā ovādaṃ ṭhapemi, mā tāya saddhiṃ uposathaṃ karitthā’’ ti.
translation: 前来求取]]ovāda（教诫）的bhikkhunī（比丘尼）们应当被告知：“某位名叫某某的bhikkhunī（比丘尼）犯戒了，她的教诫已被中止，不要与她一起做uposatha

original: Kāyavivaraṇādīsupi daṇḍakammaṃ vuttanayameva.
translation: 在]]kāyavivaraṇādīsupi（身体裸露等情况）中，daṇḍakammaṃ[[（处罚措施）也[应]按照既定规则处理。

original: 413. Na bhikkhave bhikkhuniyā ovādo na {gantabbo}tiādi bhikkhunivibhaṅgavaṇṇanāyaṃ vuttameva.
translation: “诸比丘！不应为]]bhikkhunī

original: 416. Phāsukā {namentī}ti gihidārikāyo viya ghanapaṭṭakena kāyabandhanena phāsukā namanatthāya bandhanti.
translation: 所谓"phāsukā]]（肋骨）[[弯曲"，就像俗家少女们用一整块[宽]腰带束腰那样，为了使其弯曲而绑住肋骨。

original: Ekapariyākatan ti ekavāraṃ parikkhipanakaṃ.
translation: "Ekapariyākatan（一遍围绕）即ekavāraṃ（一次）parikkhipanakaṃ（周匝环绕）。"

original: Vilīvena {paṭṭenā}ti saṇhehi veḷuvilīvehi katapaṭṭena.
translation: 用柔软的竹篾编织而成的席子 。

original: {Dussapaṭṭenā}ti setavatthapaṭṭena.
translation: ，即（白色的布片）[[。

original: {Dussaveṇiyā}ti dussena kataveṇiyā.
translation:
“dussaveṇiyāti dussena kataveṇiyā”译为：
“用布制成的盘发”

original: {Dussavaṭṭiyā}ti dussena katavaṭṭiyā.
translation: 用布制成的轮子（指用多层布料叠制而成的圆盘状物）。

original: Coḷapaṭṭā dīsu coḷakāsāvaṃ coḷanti veditabbaṃ.
translation: 在]]Coḷapaṭṭā（地名）]]等地，应知用]]coḷa（橙黄色染料）]]染色的织物称为]]coḷa（橙黄色织物）]]。

original: {Aṭṭhillenā}ti gojaṅghaṭṭhikena.
translation:
用牛的小腿骨。`
：就是。
：用牛的小腿骨。
（“ghaṃsāpenti”在巴利经典中意为“摩擦”）。
[注释中提到“aṭṭhillenāti”解释为“用湿骨头”，但湿骨头令人厌恶，因此应理解为“aṭṭhi（骨头）”加上“illa（后缀）”]。`

original: Jaghanan ti kaṭippadeso vuccati.
translation:
"jaghanan"（指）身体后腰部分 [1] [2]。
[1] 指腰部区域 [2] 被称作

original: Hatthaṃ {koṭṭāpentī}ti aggabāhaṃ koṭṭāpetvā morapattādīhi cittālaṅkāraṃ karonti.
translation:
译文：
"捶打手臂"即击打上臂aggabāhaṃ使之肿胀，再用孔雀羽毛等物进行华丽装饰。

original: Hatthakocchan ti piṭṭhihatthaṃ.
translation: 至于“hatthakoccha”（手背）这个词，指的是]]piṭṭhihatthaṃ[[（手背）。

original: Pādan ti jaṅghaṃ.
translation: 脚是（指）]]jaṅghaṃ[[（小腿）]

original: Pādakocchan ti piṭṭhipādaṃ.
translation: "pādakocchan"指的是piṭṭhipādaṃ（脚背）。

original: 417. Mukhalimpanā dīni vuttanayāneva.
translation: 涂面等（指涂抹面部等行为）应依上述方法（即“涂面”的方式）进行。

original: Avaṅgaṃ {karontī}ti akkhī añjantiyo avaṅgadese adhomukhaṃ lekhaṃ karonti.
translation: 她们在眼角（]]apāṅga[[处）画下向下的线条。

original: Visesakan ti gaṇḍappadese vicitrasaṇṭhānaṃ visesakaṃ karonti.
translation: 在脸颊部位（gaṇḍappadese）制造出奇特形状的斑纹（vicitrasaṇṭhānaṃ visesakaṃ）。

original: Sāloke {tiṭṭhantī}ti dvāraṃ vivaritvā upaḍḍhakāyaṃ dassentiyo tiṭṭhanti.
translation:
她们将大门打开，着站立。
（注释："将大门打开"对应dvāraṃ vivaritvā，`"半身显露"对应upaḍḍhakāyaṃ dassentiyo）

original: Naccan ti naṭasamajjaṃ kārenti.
translation: 他们举行]]naṭasamajjaṃ[[（舞蹈表演）：进行舞蹈表演：舞者们的娱乐活动：安排举办`。

original: Vesiṃ {vuṭṭhāpentī}ti gaṇikaṃ vuṭṭhāpenti.
translation: "他们让]]gaṇikaṃ（妓女）vesiṃ[[（沐浴后）出来"  [或供养她]。

original: Pānāgāraṃ {ṭhapentī}ti suraṃ vikkiṇanti.
translation: 他们开设酒铺，贩卖]]suraṃ（酒）。

original: Sūnaṃ {ṭhapentī}ti maṃsaṃ vikkiṇanti.
translation: 他们把肉放在砧板上卖。

original: Āpaṇan ti nānābhaṇḍānaṃ anekavidhaṃ āpaṇaṃ pasārenti.
translation: （指不同类型的商品店铺）（摆放展示），（形成）。

original: Dāsaṃ {upaṭṭhāpentī}ti dāsaṃ gahetvā tena attano veyyāvaccaṃ kārenti.
translation: "使唤奴隶"即抓来奴隶，让他为自己做各种杂务。

original: Dāsīādīsupi eseva nayo.
translation: 在女奴等（dāsīādīsupi）中，此理（eseva nayo）亦同。

original: Haritakapakkikaṃ {pakiṇantī}ti haritakañceva pakkañca pakiṇanti;
translation: 卖青叶和熟叶的人叫haritakapakkikaṃ（青熟叶商），他们既卖诃子(harītaka)（青叶）也卖pakka（熟叶）。

original: pakiṇṇakāpaṇaṃ pasārentīti vuttaṃ hoti.
translation: “这被称为‘杂货铺’（指售卖各种混杂商品的小店）。”

original: 418. Sabbanīlakā dikathā kathitāyeva.
translation: 关于]]sabbanīlakā[[（一切青色等）的论述已经被讲述完毕。

original: 419. Bhikkhunī ce, bhikkhave, kālaṃ {karontī}tiādīsu ayaṃ pāḷimuttakavinicchayo– sace hi pañcasu sahadhammikesu yo koci kālaṃ karonto‘‘ mamaccayena mayhaṃ parikkhāro upajjhāyassa hotu, ācariyassa hotu, saddhivihārikassa hotu, antevāsikassa hotu, mātu hotu, pitu hotu, aññassa vā yassa kassaci hotū’’ ti vadati tesaṃ na hoti, saṅghasseva hoti.
translation: 比丘们，若]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）临终时等在经典中有此裁决：若五位同修中任何一人临终时说"我死后，我的parikkhāro（资具）应归upajjhāya（和尚）、ācariya（阿阇梨）、saddhivihārī（同住弟子）、antevāsī[[（近住弟子）、母亲、父亲或其他任何人"，这些（遗物）不归他们，应归僧团。

original: Na hi pañcannaṃ sahadhammikānaṃ accayadānaṃ ruhati, gihīnaṃ pana ruhati.
translation:
（五位同修）举行
（注：此处根据注释说明"五位同修临终布施难以实现"）

original: Bhikkhu hi bhikkhunivihāre kālaṃ karoti, tassa parikkhāro bhikkhūnaṃyeva hoti.
translation: （比丘尼寺院）中去世，他的遗物仅属于

original: Bhikkhunī bhikkhuvihāre kālaṃ karoti, tassā parikkhāro bhikkhunīnaṃyeva hoti.
translation: 比库尼在]]bhikkhu（比库）[[的寺院中去世，其遗物仅属于比库尼们。

original: 420. {Purāṇamallī}ti purāṇe gihikāle mallakassa bhariyā.
translation: 古时的Mallī是拳师Malla在gihikāla(在家时期)的妻子。[后来她出家成为乞食尼(比丘尼)]。

original: Purisabyañjanan ti purisanimittaṃ, chinnaṃ vā hotu acchinnaṃ vā, paṭicchannaṃ vā appaṭicchannaṃ vā.
translation: 男性特征是指男性的相（标志），无论[这个标志]是被切断的、未切断的、被遮盖的，或未被遮盖的。

original: Sace etasmiṃ ṭhāne purisabyañjananti cittaṃ uppādetvā upanijjhāyati, dukkaṭaṃ.
translation: 若在此处对]]purisabyañjanaṃ（男性特征）生起念头并持续观察，[则]犯dukkaṭaṃ[[（恶作罪）。

original: 421. Attano paribhogatthāya dinnaṃ nāma yaṃ‘‘ tumheyeva paribhuñjathā’’ ti vatvā dinnaṃ, taṃ aññassa dadato dukkaṭaṃ.
translation:
凡为自受用而施舍的饮食（即说"请你们自己享用"后所施之物），若将该物转赠他人，则（施者）犯dukkaṭa（恶作罪）。`

恶作

original: Aggaṃ gahetvā pana dātuṃ vaṭṭati.
translation: 先取上首（之物），而后施与[方为]适宜。`

original: Sace asappāyaṃ, sabbaṃ apanetuṃ vaṭṭati.
translation: 若不适宜，理应尽数去除（可以去除后布施他人）。

original: Cīvaraṃ ekāhaṃ vā dvīhaṃ vā paribhuñjitvā dātuṃ vaṭṭati.
translation: 使用]]cīvaraṃ（僧衣）[[一天或两天后，可以布施。

original: Pattādīsupi eseva nayo.
translation: 关于]]patta（钵）[[等物品也是如此。

original: Bhikkhūnaṃ sannidhiṃ bhikkhunīhi {paṭiggāhāpetvā}ti hiyyo paṭiggahetvā ṭhapitamaṃsaṃ ajja aññasmiṃ anupasampanne asati bhikkhūhi paṭiggāhāpetvā bhikkhunīhi paribhuñjitabbaṃ.
translation: 比丘们昨日接受乞食尼（比丘尼）供养存放的肉食，若今日无其他达上（具足戒）比丘在场，可由比丘们重新接受乞食尼（比丘尼）供养后食用。

original: Bhikkhūhi paṭiggahitañhi bhikkhunīnaṃ appaṭiggahitakaṭṭhāne tiṭṭhati, bhikkhunīnaṃ paṭiggahitampi bhikkhūsu eseva nayo.
translation: 比丘们接受的食物，若未被比丘尼们接受，则仍属（比丘尼们）不应受用的范畴；。

original: 426. Āsanaṃ saṃkasāyantiyo kālaṃ vītināmesun ti aññaṃ vuṭṭhāpetvā aññaṃ nisīdāpentiyo bhojanakālaṃ atikkāmesuṃ.
translation: 她们来回移动]]āsanaṃ（坐具），[以此]拖延时间；让一位bhikkhunī（比丘尼）起身，又让另一位坐下，就这样错过了bhojanakāla[[（用餐时间）。`

original: Aṭṭhannaṃ bhikkhunīnaṃ yathāvuḍḍhan ti ettha sace pure aṭṭhasu nisinnāsu tāsaṃ abbhantarimā aññā āgacchati, sā attano navakaṃ uṭṭhāpetvā nisīdituṃ labhati.
translation: 关于八位]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）[[依长幼次序就座的规定：若已有八位比丘尼在座，此时另一位（戒腊更高的）比丘尼到来，她有权让座中最年轻的比丘尼起身让座。`

original: Yā pana aṭṭhahipi navakatarā, sā sacepi saṭṭhivassā hoti, āgatapaṭipāṭiyāva nisīdituṃ labhati.
translation: 若有比丘尼]]bhikkhuni[[（即便）在八位比丘尼中更为年幼，纵使她已六十戒腊，仍只能按照后来者次序就座。

original: Aññattha sabbattha yathāvuḍḍhaṃ na paṭibāhitabban ti ṭhapetvā bhattaggaṃ aññasmiṃ catupaccayabhājanīyaṭṭhāne‘‘ ahaṃ pubbe āgatā’’ ti vuḍḍhaṃ paṭibāhitvā kiñci na gahetabbaṃ;
translation: 除斋堂（食堂）外，在其他任何地方都应按长幼顺序礼让，但在catupaccaya（四资具）分配处，若对长老说"我先到"而阻拦对方，则不应拿取任何物品。

original: yathāvuḍḍhameva vaṭṭati.
translation: 依长幼之序而行

original: Pavāraṇākathā kathitāyeva.
translation: 自恣]]（僧人结束雨安居时的忏悔仪式）[[的讨论已经完成。]]

original: 429. Itthiyuttan tiādīhi sabbayānāni anuññātāni.
translation: 连同"itthiyuttan"（关于妇女的表述）等用语，一切]]yāna[[（交通工具）都被允许（对病患予以开许）。

original: Pāṭaṅkin ti paṭapoṭṭalikaṃ.
translation: 所谓pāṭaṅki（床具）就是指用布料制成的]]paṭapoṭṭalika[[（折叠床）。`

original: 430. Dūtena upasampadā dasannaṃ antarāyānaṃ yena kenaci vaṭṭati.
translation: 通过使者受具（达上（具足戒））时，若存在十种障碍antarāyānaṃ（障碍）中的任意一种，[该受具]即不成立。

original: Kammavācāpariyosāne sā bhikkhunī bhikkhunupassaye ṭhitā vā hotu nipannā vā jāgarā vā niddaṃ okkantā vā, upasampannāva hoti.
translation: 在]]kammavācā（羯磨）仪式结束时，那位bhikkhunī（比丘尼）无论站立、躺卧、清醒或入眠于bhikkhunupassaya（比丘尼住处）中，皆已完成upasampadā[[（具足戒）。

original: Tāvadeva chāyādīni āgatāya dūtabhikkhuniyā ācikkhitabbāni.
translation: 就在那业语结束的瞬间，应当将阴影等事物告知]]dūtabhikkhuniyā[[（作为使者的比丘尼）。在此处指代各种征兆或预示。

original: 431. {Udosito}ti bhaṇḍasālā.
translation: 仓库就是bhaṇḍasālā（储藏室）。[原文中"vā"（或者）和"dinnā"（已布施）等词未在句中实际出现]`

original: Na {sammatī}ti nappahoti.
translation: 不认为是这样，就不足够。

original: Upassayan ti gharaṃ.
translation: 住所即gharaṃ（房屋）。

original: Navakamman ti saṅghassatthāya bhikkhuniyā navakammampi kātuṃ anujānāmīti attho.
translation: 为了僧团（saṃghassatthāya）的利益，允许比丘尼（bhikkhuniyā）进行新工作（navakammampi）。

original: 432. Tassā {pabbajitāyā}ti tassā pabbajitakāle.
translation: 在她出家时pabbajitā（比丘尼）。[某些版本写作"tassā pabbajite"，可理解为"她出家之际"]

original: Yāva so dārako viññutaṃ {pāpuṇātī}ti yāva khādituṃ bhuñjituṃ nahāyituñca maṇḍituñca attano dhammatāya sakkotīti attho.
translation: 译文：，意思是说他能够[自己]按照天性吃东西、饮水、沐浴和装饰自己。`

original: Ṭhapetvā sāgāran ti sahagāraseyyamattaṃ ṭhapetvā.
translation: 除sāgāran（意为同住）外，仅保留同室而卧的程度。

original: Yathā aññasmiṃ purise;
translation: 如同对待其他男人一样（应当遵循）。

original: evaṃ dutiyikāya bhikkhuniyā tasmiṃ dārake paṭipajjitabbanti dasseti.
translation: 如是，第二位]]bhikkhunī（比丘尼）[[应对那个男孩如此行事。

original: Mātā pana nahāpetuṃ pāyetuṃ bhojetuṃ maṇḍetuṃ ure katvā sayituñca labhati.
translation: 那位比丘尼mātā可以获得（为她）沐浴nahāpetuṃ、喂奶pāyetuṃ、供食bhojetuṃ、梳妆maṇḍetuṃ、抱在胸前ure katvā以及哄睡sayituñca（的权利）。

original: 434. Yadeva sā {vibbhantā}ti yasmā sā vibbhantā attano ruciyā khantiyā odātāni vatthāni nivatthā, tasmāyeva sā abhikkhunī, na sikkhāpaccakkhānenāti dasseti.
translation:
sikkhāpaccakkhāna

（注释：odātāni vatthāni指白色衣物，nivatthā表示穿着）

original: Sā puna upasampadaṃ na labhati.
translation: 那位还俗的乞食尼（比丘尼）再次未能获得]]upasampadaṃ[[（具足戒）。

original: Sā āgatā na {upasampādetabbā}ti na kevalaṃ na upasampādetabbā, pabbajjampi na labhati.
translation:
她（指比丘尼）若前来，不仅不应授予]]upasampādā（具足戒），连pabbajjā[[（出家）资格也不得获取。`
指佛教中最高级别的正式受戒仪式，

original: Odātāni gahetvā vibbhantā pana pabbajjāmattaṃ labhati.
translation: 她虽已还俗，后仍能获得]]pabbajjāmattaṃ[[（出家者身份）。[背离佛教者不再受戒律约束，但对在家人而言戒律尚未失效，故仍可受沙弥戒。]

original: Abhivādanan tiādīsu purisā pāde sambāhantā vandanti, kese chindanti, nakhe chindanti, vaṇapaṭikammaṃ karonti, taṃ sabbaṃ kukkuccāyantā na sādiyantīti attho.
translation: 在《Abhivādana（敬礼）等》中，男子们（为僧人）按摩双脚行礼，修剪头发，修剪指甲，进行伤口治疗，但（僧众）因持戒严谨而拒绝接受这些侍奉这里的含义是：对于敬礼等所有服务，僧人们出于戒律的考虑而不愿接受

original: Tatreke ācariyā‘‘ sace ekato vā ubhato vā avassutā honti sārattā, yathāvatthukameva’’.
translation: 在那些礼节等事务中，某些ācariyā（导师）说："如果avassutā（贪欲）从单方面或双方面渗透，并深陷sārattā（贪爱）之中，那么（罪过）就完全取决于具体事件本身了。"

original: Eke ācariyā‘‘ natthi ettha āpattī’’ ti vadanti.
translation: 一些老师说道："在这（指接受供养等行为）中没有]]āpatti[[（罪过）。"

original: Evaṃ ācariyavādaṃ dassetvā idaṃ odissa anuññātaṃ vaṭṭatīti aṭṭhakathāsu vuttaṃ.
translation: 如此展示了]]ācariyavādaṃ[[（师说）后，这（指礼敬师长等行为）被特别允许[1]，正如注释书中所说。

original: Taṃ pamāṇaṃ.
translation: 那便是pamāṇaṃ（标准/依据）。

original: ‘‘ Anujānāmi bhikkhave sāditun’’ ti hi vacaneneva taṃ kappiyaṃ.
translation: “比丘们，我允许食用]]sāditun（美味的食物）[[。”

original: 435. Pallaṅkena {nisīdantī}ti pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā nisīdanti.
translation: "盘腿而坐"指将]]pallaṅka[[（坐垫）叠起后坐着。（这里说的不是佛像的莲花坐姿，而是像缅甸人那样盘腿而坐。这样坐时，脚后跟会与大腿内侧接触，因此人们觉得这种坐姿很舒适。）

original: Aḍḍhapallaṅkan ti ekaṃ pādaṃ ābhujitvā katapallaṅkaṃ.
translation: "半跏趺坐"是指将一条腿盘成]]pallaṅka[[（莲花座）姿势，另一条腿膝盖着地。[现代通常指单腿盘坐、另一腿垂下的坐姿，而非双盘坐法]。

original: Heṭṭhā vivaṭe upari {paṭicchanne}ti ettha sace kūpo khato hoti, upari pana padaramattameva sabbadisāsu paññāyati, evarūpepi vaṭṭati.
translation: "若下方开放而上方遮蔽——此处假设有已挖掘的粪坑，虽已被挖好，但上方仅覆盖薄木板[且]四面皆可见——此类kūpo(粪坑)亦可使用。"

original: 436. Kukkusaṃ mattikan ti kuṇḍakañceva mattikañca.
translation: "小鸡的粮食"是指碎米和细土。[注：此处经文原文为"kukkusaṃ mattikan ti kuṇḍakañceva mattikañca"]

original: Sesamettha uttānamevāti.
translation: 剩下的部分只有]]uttānameva[[（唯一的）而已。`

original: Bhikkhunīupasampadānujānanakathā niṭṭhitā.
translation: 关于允许]]bhikkhunī（比库尼）[[受具足戒的讨论结束了。

original: Bhikkhunikkhandhakavaṇṇanā niṭṭhitā.
translation: ]]Bhikkhunikkhandhakavaṇṇanā（比丘尼分章注释）]] niṭṭhitā（完成）。`

original: Katamaṃ taṇhāmamattaṃ?
translation: 何为爱我执（taṇhāmamattaṃ）？

original: Yāvatā taṇhāsaṅkhātena sīmakataṃ mariyādikataṃ odhikataṃ pariyantakataṃ pariggahitaṃ mamāyitaṃ.
translation: 如此，因所谓渴爱，而形成了界限、分别，划定了范围，哪些是我拥有的、我珍爱的。

original: Idaṃ mamaṃ, etaṃ mamaṃ, ettakaṃ mamaṃ, ettāvatā mamaṃ, mama rūpā saddā gandhā rasā phoṭṭhabbā, attharaṇā pāvuraṇā dāsidāsā ajeḷakā kukkuṭasūkarā hatthigavāssavaḷavā khettaṃ vatthu hiraññaṃ suvaṇṇaṃ gāmanigamarājadhāniyo raṭṭhañca janapado ca koso ca koṭṭhāgārañca, kevalampi mahāpathaviṃ taṇhāvasena mamāyati.
translation: 这是我的，那是我的，我的色、声、香、味、触，我的毯子、衣服、女奴、男奴、羊群、鸡、猪、象、牛、马、耕地、田地、货币、黄金、村、镇、都城、国家、区域，军库、仓库，乃至整个世界，因渴爱而对所有这些产生我执。

original: Yāvatā aṭṭhasataṃ taṇhāvicaritaṃ, idaṃ taṇhāmamattaṃ.
translation: 如此一百零八种渴爱遍布，此为爱我执。

original: Katamaṃ diṭṭhimamattaṃ?
translation: 何为见我执（diṭṭhimamattaṃ）？

original: Vīsativatthukā sakkāyadiṭṭhi, dasavatthukā micchādiṭṭhi, dasavatthukā antaggāhikā diṭṭhi;
translation: 二十种有身见，十种邪见，十种边见；[[can i translate dasavatthukā to ten kinds？？

original: yā evarūpā diṭṭhi diṭṭhigataṃ diṭṭhigahanaṃ diṭṭhikantāro diṭṭhivisūkāyikaṃ diṭṭhivipphandikaṃ diṭṭhisaññojanaṃ gāho paṭiggāho abhiniveso parāmāso kummaggo micchāpatho micchattaṃ titthāyatanaṃ vipariyesaggāho viparītaggāho vipallāsaggāho micchāgāho‘‘ ayāthāvakasmiṃ yāthāvakan’’ ti gāho.
translation: 凡如此的见：见生、丛林之见、险难之见、见芒、动摇之见、见结、执取、固着、黏附、曲解、歧途、邪路、邪性、外道处、扭曲执、妄执、颠倒执、邪执、执真为假。[[？根据下文再调整用词

original: Yāvatā dvāsaṭṭhidiṭṭhigatāni, idaṃ diṭṭhimamattaṃ.
translation: 乃至六十二邪见，此为见我执。[[Yāvatā refer to and even? untill? "diṭṭhigataṃ...ayāthāvakasmiṃ yāthāvakan ’ ’ ti gāho" & dvāsaṭṭhidiṭṭhigatāni relation? 这诸多见与六十二邪见是并列？还是包含被包含关系？

original: Kutopahūtā kalahā {vivādā}ti.
translation: “纷争、分歧何处生？"中，

original: {Kalaho}ti ekena ākārena kalaho;
translation: **Kalahoti(纷争)：**一种说法为，

original: vivādotipi taññeva.
translation: 它就是分歧（vivādo）。

original: Yo kalaho so vivādo, yo vivādo so kalaho.
translation: 纷争即是分歧，分歧即是纷争。

original: Atha vā aparena ākārena vivādo vuccati kalahassa pubbabhāgo vivādo.
translation: 或者另一种说法：分歧（vivādo）是纷争（ kalaha）的前半部分。

original: Rājānopi rājūhi vivadanti, khattiyāpi khattiyehi vivadanti, brāhmaṇāpi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti, gahapatīpi gahapatīhi vivadanti, mātāpi puttena vivadati, puttopi mātarā vivadati, pitāpi puttena vivadati, puttopi pitarā vivadati, bhātāpi bhātarā vivadati, bhātāpi bhaginiyā vivadati, bhaginīpi bhātarā vivadati, sahāyopi sahāyena vivadati– ayaṃ vivādo.
translation: 诸王与诸王分歧，刹帝利与刹帝利分歧，婆罗门与婆罗门分歧，家族与家族分歧，母与子分歧，子与母分歧，父与子分歧，子与父分歧，兄弟与兄弟分歧，兄弟与姐妹分歧，姐妹与兄弟分歧，朋友与朋友分歧。——此即分歧。

original: Katamo kalaho?
translation: 何为纷争？

original: Āgārikā daṇḍapasutā kāyena vācāya kalahaṃ karonti, pabbajitā āpattiṃ āpajjantā kāyena vācāya kalahaṃ karonti– ayaṃ kalaho.
translation: 在家人当受到侵犯之时，他们以身、以语起纷争；出家人当犯戒之时，他们以身、以语起纷争。——此即纷争。

original: Kutopahūtā kalahā {vivādā}ti.
translation: **“纷争、分歧何处生？”**中，

original: Kalahā ca vivādā ca kutopahūtā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti kalahassa ca vivādassa ca mūlaṃ pucchati, hetuṃ pucchati , nidānaṃ pucchati, sambhavaṃ pucchati, pabhavaṃ pucchati, samuṭṭhānaṃ pucchati, āhāraṃ pucchati, ārammaṇaṃ pucchati, paccayaṃ pucchati, samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati[ ajjhosati( sī.)] pasādetīti– kutopahūtā kalahā vivādā.
translation: “纷争、分歧从何处产生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——“纷争、分歧何处生？”

original: Paridevasokā sahamaccharā {cā}ti.
translation: **“又及悲诉、忧愁、悭；”**中，

original: {Paridevo}ti ñātibyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, bhogabyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, rogabyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, sīlabyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, diṭṭhibyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, aññataraññatarena vā byasanena samannāgatassa, aññataraññatarena vā dukkhadhammena phuṭṭhassa, ādevo paridevo, ādevanā paridevanā, ādevitattaṃ paridevitattaṃ, vācā palāpo vippalāpo lālappo lālappāyanā lālappāyitattaṃ.
translation:
悲戚：痛失亲人、财产损失、罹患疾病、破戒、信念崩塌以及其他种种损失、苦难的遭遇；
引起的悲恸、悲戚、悲恸中、悲戚中、悲恸的情况、悲戚的情况；
胡言乱语、废话连篇、自言自语、絮絮叨叨，喋喋不休。

original: {Soko}ti ñātibyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, bhogarogasīladiṭṭhibyasanena vā phuṭṭhassa, aññataraññatarena vā byasanena samannāgatassa, aññataraññatarena vā dukkhadhammena phuṭṭhassa, soko socanā socitattaṃ, antosoko antoparisoko, antoḍāho antopariḍāho, cetaso parijjhāyanā domanassaṃ sokasallaṃ.
translation: soko（忧愁）：痛失亲人、财产损失、罹患疾病、破戒、信念崩塌以及其他种种损失、苦难的遭遇；引起的忧愁、郁闷、愁闷、焦心、焦灼、忧心如焚、苦闷、愁箭。

original: Maccharan ti pañca macchariyāni– āvāsamacchariyaṃ, kulamacchariyaṃ, lābhamacchariyaṃ, vaṇṇamacchariyaṃ, dhammamacchariyaṃ.
translation: Macchara（悭吝）：五种悭吝：住所悭、施主悭、利养悭、优势悭、法悭。

original: Yaṃ evarūpaṃ macchariyaṃ maccharāyanaṃ maccharāyitattaṃ vevicchaṃ kadariyaṃ kaṭukañcukatā aggahitattaṃ cittassa– idaṃ vuccati macchariyaṃ.
translation: 诸如悭吝、吝惜、小气、捂紧荷包、一毛不拔拔雁毛——此为悭吝。

original: Api ca, khandhamacchariyampi macchariyaṃ , dhātumacchariyampi macchariyaṃ, āyatanamacchariyampi macchariyaṃ gāho.
translation: 此外，蕴悭吝也是悭吝，界悭吝也是悭吝，处悭吝也是悭吝。

original: Idaṃ vuccati macchariyanti– paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca.
translation: 此为悭吝。——又及悲诉、忧愁、悭；

original: Mānātimānā sahapesuṇā {cā}ti.
translation: **“自负、轻蔑及离间”**中，

original: {Māno}ti idhekacco mānaṃ janeti jātiyā vā gottena vā kolaputtiyena vā vaṇṇapokkharatāya vā dhanena vā ajjhenena vā kammāyatanena vā sippāyatanena vā vijjāṭṭhānena vā sutena vā paṭibhānena vā aññataraññatarena vā vatthunā.
translation:
Māno
(自负)：某人生起自负，因出身、因姓氏、因家族、因姿色、因财富、因习诵、因职业、因手艺、因学术背景、因博闻、因辩才或其它种种原因。

original: {Atimāno}ti idhekacco paraṃ atimaññati jātiyā vā gottena vā… pe… aññataraññatarena vā vatthunā.
translation: Atimāno（轻蔑）某人轻蔑他人，因出身、因姓氏、... ... 或种种其它原因。

original: Pesuññan ti idhekacco pisuṇavāco hoti– ito sutvā amutra akkhātā imesaṃ bhedāya, amutra vā sutvā imesaṃ akkhātā amūsaṃ bhedāya.
translation: Pesuññan（离间）：于此某人讲离间语——从这里听到后传到那里，以达到败坏这里的目的；或从那里听到后传到这里，以达到败坏那里的目的。

original: Iti samaggānaṃ vā bhettā, bhinnānaṃ vā anuppadātā, vaggārāmo vaggarato vagganandī vaggakaraṇiṃ vācaṃ bhāsitā hoti– idaṃ vuccati pesuññaṃ.
translation: 破坏团结，加深裂痕，乐于拉帮结派，喜欢拉帮结派，庆祝拉帮结派，说拉帮结派的言辞。——这就是所谓的离间。

original: Api ca dvīhi kāraṇehi pesuññaṃ upasaṃharati– piyakamyatāya vā bhedādhippāyena vā.
translation: 另外，因两种理由而挑拨离间，渴求亲密或试图分裂。

original: Kathaṃ piyakamyatāya pesuññaṃ upasaṃharati?
translation: 何为因渴求亲密而挑拨离间？

original: Imassa piyo bhavissāmi, manāpo bhavissāmi, vissāsiko bhavissāmi, abbhantariko bhavissāmi, suhadayo bhavissāmīti– evaṃ piyakamyatāya pesuññaṃ upasaṃharati.
translation: 我将是他衷爱的、可心的、值得依赖的，我将是他的心腹、挚爱。——如此即为渴求亲密而挑拨离间。

original: Kathaṃ bhedādhippāyena pesuññaṃ upasaṃharati?
translation: 何为因试图分裂而挑拨离间？

original: Kathaṃ ime nānā assu, vinā assu, vaggā assu, dvidhā assu, dvejjhā assu, dve pakkhā assu, bhijjeyyuṃ na samāgaccheyyuṃ, dukkhaṃ na phāsu vihareyyunti– evaṃ bhedādhippāyena pesuññaṃ upasaṃharatīti– mānātimānā sahapesuṇā ca.
translation: 怎样会让他们相悖、远离、分裂、分歧、分开，让他们分为两派，让他们破裂不联合，让他们生活痛苦不安乐。如此为试图分裂而挑拨离间。——此即”自负、轻蔑及离间。“

original: Kutopahūtā te tadiṅgha {brūhī}ti.
translation: 请说生起于何处？

original: Kalaho ca vivādo ca paridevo ca soko ca macchariyañca māno ca atimāno ca pesuññañcāti– ime aṭṭha kilesā kutopahūtā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti.
translation: 纷争、分歧、悲诉、忧愁、悭吝、自负、轻蔑、离间——此八烦恼，从何处产生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？

original: Imesaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ kilesānaṃ mūlaṃ pucchati, hetuṃ pucchati, nidānaṃ pucchati, sambhavaṃ pucchati, pabhavaṃ pucchati, samuṭṭhānaṃ pucchati, āhāraṃ pucchati, ārammaṇaṃ pucchati, paccayaṃ pucchati, samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– kutopahūtā te tadiṅghaṃ brūhīti.
translation: 对这八烦恼问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——“请说生起于何处？”

original: Iṅgha brūhi ācikkha desehi paññapehi paṭṭhapehi vivara vibhaja uttānīkarohi pakāsehīti– kutopahūtā te tadiṅgha brūhi.
translation: 请您说（Iṅgha brūhi），请您示名，请您略说，请您详说，请您解说，请您开示，请您辨析，请您阐发，请您展示。——“请说生起于何处？”

original: Piyappahūtā kalahā vivādā, paridevasokā sahamaccharā {cā}ti.
translation: “爱故纷争分歧生，又有悲诉、忧愁、悭，”中，

original: {Piyā}ti dve piyā– sattā vā saṅkhārā vā.
translation: Piyā(所爱)分两种。——所喜爱的有情与所喜爱的事物。

original: Katame sattā piyā?
translation: 什么是所喜爱的有情？

original: Idha yassa te honti atthakāmā hitakāmā phāsukāmā yogakkhemakāmā mātā vā pitā vā bhātā vā bhaginī vā putto vā dhītā vā mittā vā amaccā vā ñātī vā sālohitā vā– ime sattā piyā.
translation: 在此，希望他们获得利益、快乐、禅定（乐住）、涅槃（安稳），如母亲、父亲、兄弟、姐妹、儿子、女儿、朋友、同事、眷属、血亲。——此即所喜爱的有情。

original: Katame saṅkhārā piyā?
translation: 什么是所喜爱的事物？

original: Manāpikā rūpā manāpikā saddā manāpikā gandhā manāpikā rasā manāpikā phoṭṭhabbā– ime saṅkhārā piyā.
translation: 可意的颜色、可意的声音、可意的气味、可意的味道、可意的触感——此即所喜爱的事物。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ acchedasaṅkinopi kalahaṃ karonti, acchijjantepi kalahaṃ karonti, acchinnepi kalahaṃ karonti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象被夺而产生纷争，被夺之时纷争，被夺后亦纷争。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ vipariṇāmasaṅkinopi kalahaṃ karonti, vipariṇāmantepi kalahaṃ karonti, vipariṇatepi kalahaṃ karonti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象变易而产生纷争，变易之时纷争，变易后亦纷争。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ acchedasaṅkinopi vivadanti, acchijjantepi vivadanti, acchinnepi vivadanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象被夺而产生分歧，被夺之时生分歧，被夺后亦生分歧。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ vipariṇāmasaṅkinopi vivadanti, vipariṇāmantepi vivadanti, vipariṇatepi vivadanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象变易而产生分歧，变易之时生分歧，变易后亦生分歧。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ acchedasaṅkinopi paridevanti, acchijjantepi paridevanti, acchinnepi paridevanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象被夺而悲诉，被夺之时悲诉，被夺后亦悲诉。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ vipariṇāmasaṅkinopi paridevanti, vipariṇāmantepi paridevanti, vipariṇatepi paridevanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象变易而悲诉，变易之时悲诉，变易后亦悲诉。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ acchedasaṅkinopi socanti, acchijjantepi socanti, acchinnepi socanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象被夺而忧愁，被夺之时忧愁，被夺后亦忧愁。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ vipariṇāmasaṅkinopi socanti , vipariṇāmantepi socanti, vipariṇatepi socanti.
translation: 担心所喜爱的对象变易而忧愁，变易之时忧愁，变易后亦忧愁。

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ rakkhanti gopenti pariggaṇhanti mamāyanti maccharāyanti.
translation: 人们保护、隐藏、占据、吝惜所喜爱的对象，并执著它是我的。

original: Mānātimānā sahapesuṇā {cā}ti.
translation: “自负轻蔑及离间。”中，

original: Piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya mānaṃ janenti, piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya atimānaṃ janenti.
translation: 依于所喜爱的对象，自负生起；依于所喜爱的对象，轻蔑生起。

original: Kathaṃ piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya mānaṃ janenti?
translation: 自负如何依于所喜爱的对象而生起？

original: Mayaṃ lābhino manāpikānaṃ rūpānaṃ saddānaṃ gandhānaṃ rasānaṃ phoṭṭhabbānanti.
translation: 我们能得到可意的色、声、香、味、触。

original: Evaṃ piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya mānaṃ janenti.
translation: 如此，依于所喜爱的对象，自负生起。

original: Kathaṃ piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya atimānaṃ janenti?
translation: 轻蔑如何依于所喜爱的对象而生起？

original: Evaṃ piyaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya atimānaṃ janenti.
translation: 如此，依于所喜爱的对象，轻蔑生起。

original: Pesuññan ti idhekacco pisuṇavāco hoti, ito sutvā amutra akkhātā imesaṃ bhedāya… pe… evaṃ bhedādhippāyena pesuññaṃ upasaṃharatīti… pe… mānātimānā sahapesuṇā ca.
translation: Pesuññan：于此某人讲离间语——从这里听到后传到那里，以达到败坏这里的目的；...中略...此即因试图分裂而挑拨离间...中略...此为“自负轻蔑及离间”。

original: Maccherayuttā kalahā {vivādā}ti.
translation: “纷争、分歧与悭联”中，

original: Kalaho ca vivādo ca paridevo ca soko ca māno ca atimāno ca pesuññañcāti– ime satta kilesā macchariye yuttā payuttā āyuttā samāyuttāti– maccherayuttā kalahā vivādā.
translation: 纷争、分歧、悲泣、忧愁、自负、轻蔑和离间——这七种烦恼与悭吝相连、关联、连接、结合。——此即“纷争、分歧与悭联。”

original: Vivādajātesu ca {pesuṇānī}ti.
translation: “分歧之时有离间。”中，

original: Vivāde jāte sañjāte nibbatte abhinibbatte pātubhūte pesuññaṃ upasaṃharanti;
translation: 当分歧生、发生、起、生起、出现之时，便会有人挑拨离间。

original: ito sutvā amutra akkhāyanti imesaṃ bhedāya, amutra vā sutvā imesaṃ akkhāyanti amūsaṃ bhedāya.
translation: 从这里听到后传到那里，以败坏这里；或从那里听到后传到这里，以败坏那里。

original: Iti samaggānaṃ vā bhettāro, bhinnānaṃ vā anuppadātāro, vaggārāmā vaggaratā vagganandī vaggakaraṇiṃ vācaṃ bhāsitāro honti– idaṃ vuccati pesuññaṃ.
translation: 破坏和合、加深裂痕、欢喜分裂、 乐于分裂、喜见分裂、传播造成分裂的言语。——此为离间

original: Api ca dvīhi kāraṇehi pesuññaṃ upasaṃharanti– piyakamyatāya vā bhedādhippāyena vā.
translation: 另外，因两种理由而挑拨离间，渴求亲密或试图分裂。

original: Kathaṃ piyakamyatāya pesuññaṃ upasaṃharanti?
translation: 何为因渴求亲密而挑拨离间？

original: Imassa piyā bhavissāma, manāpā bhavissāma, vissāsikā bhavissāma, abbhantarikā bhavissāma, suhadayā bhavissāmāti.
translation: 我将是他衷爱的、可心的、值得依赖的，我将是他的心腹、挚爱。

original: Evaṃ piyakamyatāya pesuññaṃ upasaṃharanti.
translation: ——如此即为渴求亲密而挑拨离间。

original: Kathaṃ bhedādhippāyena pesuññaṃ upasaṃharanti?
translation: 何为因试图分裂而挑拨离间？

original: ‘‘ Kathaṃ ime nānā assu, vinā assu, vaggā assu, dvedhā assu, dvejjhā assu, dve pakkhā assu, bhijjeyyuṃ na samāgaccheyyuṃ, dukkhaṃ na phāsu vihareyyun’’ ti– evaṃ bhedādhippāyena pesuññaṃ upasaṃharantīti– vivādajātesu ca pesuṇāni.
translation: 怎样会让他们相悖、远离、分裂、分歧、分开，让他们分为两派，让他们破裂不联合，让他们生活痛苦不安乐。——如此为试图分裂而挑拨离间。——此即“自负、轻蔑及离间。“

original: Piyā su lokasmiṃ kutonidānā, ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke;
translation:
爱于世间何因生？ 贪者流连于世间; (所爱源自世间何处？贪婪者于世间四处游荡。
）

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca kutonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa honti.
translation: 世人未来所依处，渴望、成就何处生？（人们关于未来有所依靠、保障的渴望与其实现又生起于何处？）

original: Piyā su lokasmiṃ {kutonidānā}ti.
translation: "爱于世间何因生？"中，

original: Piyā kutonidānā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti piyānaṃ mūlaṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– piyā su lokasmiṃ kutonidānā.
translation: “所爱何因生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即“爱于世间何因生？”

original: Ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti {loke}ti.
translation: “贪者流连于世间;"中，

original: Ye {cāpī}ti khattiyā ca brāhmaṇā ca vessā ca suddā ca gahaṭṭhā ca pabbajitā ca devā ca manussā ca.
translation: Ye cāpīti（那些人）:指刹帝利、婆罗门、吠舍、首陀罗、在家人、出家人、天与人。

original: {Lobhā}ti yo lobho lubbhanā lubbhitattaṃ sārāgo sārajjanā sārajjitattaṃ abhijjhā lobho akusalamūlaṃ.
translation: Lobhā：贪、贪相、贪状、爱著、爱著相、爱著状、贪婪、贪不善根。

original: {Vicarantī}ti vicaranti viharanti iriyanti vattanti pālenti yapenti yāpenti.
translation: Vicarantī（流连）：流连、居住、行住坐卧、存在、维持、生存、生活。

original: {Loke}ti apāyaloke manussaloke devaloke khandhaloke dhātuloke āyatanaloketi– ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke.
translation: Loke（世间）：苦趣世间、人世间、天世间、蕴世间、界世间、处世间。——此即”贪者游荡于世间。”

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca {kutonidānā}ti.
translation: “渴望、成就何处生？”中，

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca kutonidānā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti āsāya ca niṭṭhāya ca mūlaṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– āsā ca niṭṭhā ca kutonidānā.
translation: “渴望、成就何因生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即“渴望、成就何处生？”

original: Ye samparāyāya narassa {hontī}ti.
translation: “世人未来所依处，”中，

original: Ye narassa parāyanā honti dīpā honti tāṇā honti leṇā honti saraṇā honti niṭṭhā parāyanā hontīti– ye samparāyāya narassa honti.
translation: 那些人们的依靠，即岛屿、保护、庇护所、依恃、完全的依靠。——此即“世人未来所依处。”

original: Tenāha so nimmito–
translation: 由此化身佛说，

original: ‘ ‘ Piyā su lokasmiṃ kutonidānā, ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke;
translation: “爱于世间何因生？ 贪者流连于世间;

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca kutonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa hontī’’ ti.
translation: 世人未来所依处，渴望、成就何处生？”

original: Chandānidānāni piyāni loke, ye cāpi[ ye vāpi( syā.)] lobhā vicaranti loke;
translation:
世间所爱生于欲，贪者流连于世间;
(于此世间中所爱产生于欲，贪婪者流连于世间。)

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca itonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa honti.
translation: 世人未来所依处，渴望、成就由此生。（人们对未来的渴望与成就亦生起于此处。）

original: Chandānidānāni piyāni {loke}ti.
translation: “世间所爱生于欲，”中，

original: {Chando}ti yo kāmesu kāmacchando kāmarāgo kāmanandī kāmataṇhā kāmasneho kāmapariḷāho kāmamucchā kāmajjhosānaṃ kāmogho kāmayogo kāmupādānaṃ kāmacchandanīvaraṇaṃ.
translation: Chando（欲）:所有于[色、声、香、味、触五种]感官享乐的欲欲、染欲、喜欲、爱欲、黏着欲、灼欲、痴迷、极尽享受、欲洪流、欲枷锁、欲取、贪欲盖。

original: Api ca pañca chandā– pariyesanacchando, paṭilābhacchando, paribhogacchando, sannidhicchando, visajjanacchando.
translation: 欲又可分为五种：寻求欲、获得欲、受用欲、贮藏欲、消费欲。

original: Katamo pariyesanacchando?
translation: 什么是寻求欲？

original: Idhekacco ajjhositoyeva atthiko chandajāto rūpe pariyesati, sadde… gandhe… rase… phoṭṭhabbe pariyesati– ayaṃ pariyesanacchando.
translation: 在此，某人是执著的、希求的，欲已生起，他寻求色……声……香……味……触，此为寻求欲。

original: Katamo paṭilābhacchando?
translation: 什么是获得欲？

original: Idhekacco ajjhositoyeva atthiko chandajāto rūpe paṭilabhati, sadde… gandhe… rase… phoṭṭhabbe paṭilabhati– ayaṃ paṭilābhacchando.
translation: 在此某人是执著的、希求的，欲已生起，他获得色……声……香……味……触，此为获得欲。

original: Katamo paribhogacchando?
translation: 什么是受用欲？

original: Idhekacco ajjhositoyeva atthiko chandajāto rūpe paribhuñjati, sadde… gandhe… rase… phoṭṭhabbe paribhuñjati– ayaṃ paribhogacchando.
translation: 在此，某人是执著的、希求的，欲已生起，他享受色……声……香……味……触，此为受用欲。

original: Katamo sannidhicchando?
translation: 什么是储藏欲？

original: Idhekacco ajjhositoyeva atthiko chandajāto dhanasannicayaṃ karoti‘‘ āpadāsu bhavissatī’’ ti– ayaṃ sannidhicchando.
translation: 在此，某人是执著的、希求的，欲已生起，他将财物储存起来，心想：“防患于未然。”此为储藏欲。

original: Katamo visajjanacchando?
translation: 什么是消费欲？

original: Idhekacco ajjhositoyeva atthiko chandajāto dhanaṃ visajjeti hatthārohānaṃ assārohānaṃ rathikānaṃ dhanuggahānaṃ pattikānaṃ‘‘ ime maṃ rakkhissanti gopissanti samparivārissantī’’ ti– ayaṃ visajjanacchando.
translation: 在此，某人是执著的、希求的，欲已生起，他出资组建象兵、骑兵、车兵、弓箭手、步兵，心想：“他们会守卫、保护、追随着我。”此为消费欲。

original: {Piyānī}ti dve piyā– sattā vā saṅkhārā vā… pe… ime sattā piyā… pe… ime saṅkhārā piyā.
translation: Piyā(所爱)分两种——有情与事物……同上……此为所爱的有情……同上……此为所爱的事物。

original: Chandānidānāni piyāni {loke}ti.
translation: "世间所爱生于欲"中，

original: Piyā chandanidānā chandasamudayā chandajātikā chandapabhavāti– chandānidānāni piyāni loke.
translation: 所爱以欲为因由、以欲为根源、以欲为来由、以欲为发源——此即”世间所爱生于欲。“

original: Ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti {loke}ti.
translation: “贪者流连于世间；”中，

original: Ye {cāpī}ti khattiyā ca brāhmaṇā ca vessā ca suddā ca gahaṭṭhā ca pabbajitā ca devā ca manussā ca.
translation: Ye cāpīti（那些人）:指刹帝利、婆罗门、吠舍、首陀罗、在家人、出家人、天与人。

original: {Lobhā}ti yo lobho lubbhanā lubbhitattaṃ sārāgo sārajjanā sārajjitattaṃ abhijjhā lobho akusalamūlaṃ.
translation: Lobhā：贪、贪相、贪状、爱著、爱著相、爱著状、贪婪、贪不善根。

original: {Vicarantī}ti vicaranti viharanti iriyanti vattanti pālenti yapenti yāpenti.
translation: Vicarantī（流连）：流连、居住、行住坐卧、存在、维持、生存、生活。

original: {Loke}ti apāyaloke… pe… āyatanaloketi– ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke.
translation: Loke（世间）：苦趣世间、人世间、天世间、蕴世间、界世间、处世间。——此即”贪者流连于世间。”

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca {itonidānā}ti.
translation: “渴望、成就由此生。”中，

original: Āsā vuccati taṇhā.
translation: Āsā（渴望）：渴爱，

original: Yo rāgo sārāgo… pe… abhijjhā lobho akusalamūlaṃ.
translation: 即所有贪染、爱著……同上……贪婪、贪不善根。

original: {Niṭṭhā}ti idhekacco rūpe pariyesanto rūpaṃ paṭilabhati, rūpaniṭṭho hoti, sadde… gandhe… rase… phoṭṭhabbe… kulaṃ… gaṇaṃ… āvāsaṃ… lābhaṃ… yasaṃ… pasaṃsaṃ… sukhaṃ… cīvaraṃ… piṇḍapātaṃ… senāsanaṃ… gilānapaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṃ … suttantaṃ… vinayaṃ… abhidhammaṃ… āraññikaṅgaṃ… piṇḍapātikaṅgaṃ… paṃsukūlikaṅgaṃ… tecīvarikaṅgaṃ… sapadānacārikaṅgaṃ… khalupacchābhattikaṅgaṃ… nesajjikaṅgaṃ… yathāsanthatikaṅgaṃ… paṭhamaṃ jhānaṃ… dutiyaṃ jhānaṃ… tatiyaṃ jhānaṃ… catutthaṃ jhānaṃ… ākāsānañcāyatanasamāpattiṃ… viññāṇañcāyatanasamāpattiṃ… ākiñcaññāyatanasamāpattiṃ … nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiṃ pariyesanto nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiṃ paṭilabhati, nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiniṭṭho hoti.
translation: Niṭṭhā（成就）：在此，某人追求色并如愿以偿，此即色成就，声……香……味……触……家庭……团体……住所……利益……名誉……赞赏……快乐……衣物……钵食……坐卧住……药品……经……律……论……林野住支……常乞食支……粪扫衣支……三衣支……次第乞食支……时后不食支……常坐不卧支……随处住支……初禅……二禅……三禅……四禅……空无边处定……识无边处定……无所有处定……他追求非想非非想处定并如愿以偿，此即非想非非想处定成就。

original: ‘ ‘ Āsāya kasate khettaṃ, bījaṃ āsāya vappati;
translation: 由渴望而耕田地，由渴望而播种子；

original: Āsāya vāṇijā yanti, samuddaṃ dhanahārakā;
translation: 商贾漂泊由渴望，越洋过海贩运长。

original: Yāya āsāya tiṭṭhāmi, sā me āsā samijjhatī’’ ti.
translation: 我站在那儿发愿，希望我的愿望能够实现。

original: Āsāya samiddhi vuccate niṭṭhā.
translation: 渴望的实现为成就。

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca {itonidānā}ti.
translation: “渴望、成就由此生。”

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca ito chandanidānā chandasamudayā chandajātikā chandapabhavāti– āsā ca niṭṭhā ca itonidānā.
translation: 渴望与成就以欲为因由、以欲为根源、以欲为来历、以欲为来源——此即”渴望、成就由此生。“

original: Ye samparāyāya narassa {hontī}ti.
translation: "世人未来所依处，“中，

original: Ye narassa parāyanā honti dīpā honti tāṇā honti leṇā honti saraṇā honti niṭṭhā parāyanā hontīti– ye samparāyāya narassa honti.
translation: 那些人们的依靠，即岛屿、保护、庇护所、依恃、完全的依靠。——此即“世人未来所依处。”

original: Tenāha bhagavā–
translation: 世尊由此说了，

original: ‘ ‘ Chandānidānāni piyāni loke, ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke;
translation: “世间所爱生于欲，贪者流连于世间;

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca itonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa hontī’’ ti.
translation: 世人未来所依处，渴望、成就由此生。”

original: Chando nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno, vinicchayā cāpi[ vāpi( sī. syā.)] kutopahūtā;
translation: 欲于世间何因生？又于何处生评判？

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, ye cāpi dhammā samaṇena vuttā.
translation: 愤怒妄语和疑惑，以及沙门所说法。

original: Chando nu lokasmiṃ {kutonidāno}ti.
translation: ”欲于世间何因生？“中，

original: Chando kutonidāno kutojāto kutosañjāto kutonibbatto kutoabhinibbatto kutopātubhūto, kiṃnidāno kiṃsamudayo kiṃjātiko kiṃpabhavoti chandassa mūlaṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– chando nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno.
translation: 欲从何因生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？对欲问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即”欲于世间何因生？“

original: Vinicchayā cāpi {kutopahūtā}ti.
translation: ”又于何处生评判？“中，

original: Vinicchayā kutopahūtā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā , kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti vinicchayānaṃ mūlaṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– vinicchayā cāpi kutopahūtā.
translation: 评判从何处产生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？对评判问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即”欲于世间何因生？“——此即”又于何处生评判？

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā {cā}ti.
translation: ”愤怒妄语和疑惑“中，

original: {Kodho}ti yo evarūpo cittassa āghāto paṭighāto, paṭighaṃ paṭivirodho, kopo pakopo sampakopo, doso padoso sampadoso, cittassa byāpatti manopadoso, kodho kujjhanā kujjhitattaṃ, doso dussanā dussitattaṃ, byāpatti byāpajjanā byāpajjitattaṃ, virodho paṭivirodho, caṇḍikkaṃ asuropo anattamanatā cittassa.
translation: Kodho（愤怒）：所有心生不快、怒气冲冲，瞋恚、顽抗，激怒、激愤、愤愤不平，瞋、瞋恨、瞋害，心的堕落、恶意，愤怒、瞋、腐败、对抗、顽抗，粗暴、恶语、心的不满。

original: Mosavajjaṃ vuccati musāvādo.
translation: 所谓的谎言即说谎。

original: Kathaṃkathā vuccati vicikicchāti– kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca.
translation: Kathaṃkathā（疑惑）：怀疑。——此即”愤怒妄语和疑惑。“

original: Ye cāpi dhammā samaṇena {vuttā}ti.
translation: ”以及沙门所说法“中，

original: Ye {cāpī}ti ye kodhena ca mosavajjena ca kathaṃkathāya ca sahagatā sahajātā saṃsaṭṭhā sampayuttā, ekuppādā ekanirodhā ekavatthukā ekārammaṇā– ime vuccanti ye cāpi dhammā.
translation: Ye cāpīti(及那些也……)：那些与愤怒、妄语、疑相伴、共生、混杂、关联、同生、同灭、同依处、同所缘，它们被称为"那些法"。

original: Atha vā ye te kilesā aññajātikā aññavihitakā– ime vuccanti ye cāpi dhammā.
translation: 又或者，ye cāpi dhammā（那些法）指其它性质、其它形式的烦恼。

original: Samaṇena {vuttā}ti samaṇena samitapāpena brāhmaṇena bāhitapāpadhammena bhikkhunā bhinnakilesamūlena sabbākusalamūlabandhanā pamuttena vuttā pavuttā ācikkhitā desitā paññapitā paṭṭhapitā vivaṭā vibhattā uttānīkatā pakāsitāti– ye cāpi dhammā samaṇena vuttā.
translation: ”Samaṇena vuttāti“（沙门所说）：沙门即止息恶的沙门、去除恶法的婆罗门、斩断烦恼之根的比库，以及那些从一切不善根束缚中挣脱者; 所说即宣说、示名、略说、详说、解说、开示、辨析、阐发、展示。——此即”又及沙门所说法。“

original: Tenāha so nimmito–
translation: 由此化身佛说，

original: ‘ ‘ Chando nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno, vinicchatā cāpi kutopahūtā;
translation: ”欲于世间何因生？又于何处生评判？

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, ye cāpi dhammā samaṇena vuttā’’ ti.
translation: 愤怒妄语和疑惑，以及沙门所说法。“

original: Sātaṃ asātanti yamāhu loke, tamūpanissāya pahoti chando;
translation: 于世所言悦非悦，因彼之故欲乃生；

original: Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ bhavañca, vinicchayaṃ kubbati[ kūrute( syā.)] jantu loke.
translation: 见于诸色无有、有，评判起于世人中。

original: Sātaṃ asātanti yamāhu {loke}ti.
translation: “于世所言悦非悦”中，

original: Sātan ti sukhā ca vedanā, iṭṭhañca vatthu[ vatthuṃ( sī. ka.)].
translation: Sātan(悦)：乐受及可爱的事物。

original: Asātan ti dukkhā ca vedanā, aniṭṭhañca vatthu.
translation: Asātan（非悦)：苦受及不可爱的事物。

original: Yamāhu {loke}ti yaṃ āhaṃsu yaṃ kathenti yaṃ bhaṇanti yaṃ dīpenti yaṃ voharantīti– sātaṃ asātanti yamāhu loke.
translation: Yamāhu loke（于世间说了这个）：已说了这个、讲述、诉说、说明、表达。——此即“于世所言悦非悦。”

original: Tamūpanissāya pahoti {chando}ti.
translation: “因彼之故欲乃生。“中，

original: Sātāsātaṃ nissāya, sukhadukkhaṃ nissāya, somanassadomanassaṃ nissāya, iṭṭhāniṭṭhaṃ nissāya, anunayapaṭighaṃ nissāya chando pahoti pabhavati jāyati sañjāyati nibbattati abhinibbattatīti– tamūpanissāya pahoti chando.
translation: 由愉悦、不愉悦之故，由苦、乐之故，由喜悦、忧恼之故，由可爱、不可爱之故，由爱好、厌恶之故，欲产生、启动、生、发生、起、生起。——此即”因彼之故欲乃生。“

original: Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ {bhavañcā}ti.
translation: ”见于诸色无有、有，“中,

original: {Rūpesū}ti cattāro ca mahābhūtā catunnañca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ.
translation: ”Rūpesū"（于诸色）：四大种色与四大所造色。

original: Katamo rūpānaṃ bhavo?
translation: 什么是诸色的“有”？

original: Yo rūpānaṃ bhavo jāti sañjāti nibbatti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo– ayaṃ rūpānaṃ bhavo.
translation: 所有诸色的“有”、生、发生、起、生起、出现——此即是诸色的“有”。

original: Katamo rūpānaṃ vibhavo?
translation: 什么是诸色的“无有”？

original: Yo rūpānaṃ khayo vayo bhedo paribhedo aniccatā antaradhānaṃ– ayaṃ rūpānaṃ vibhavo.
translation: 所有诸色的灭尽、衰亡、瓦解、崩溃、无常性、隐没。——此即诸色的“无有”。

original: Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ {bhavañcā}ti rūpesu bhavañca vibhavañca disvā passitvā tulayitvā tīrayitvā vibhāvayitvā vibhūtaṃ katvāti– rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ bhavañca.
translation: ”Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ bhavañcā“（见于诸色无有、有）：于诸色的有、无有看到、见到、衡量、审察、逐步显明、了然后。——此即“见于诸色无有、有。”

original: Vinicchayaṃ kubbati jantu {loke}ti.
translation: ”评判起于世人中。“中，

original: {Vinicchayā}ti dve vinicchayā– taṇhāvinicchayo ca, diṭṭhivinicchayo ca.
translation: “Vinicchayā”（评判）：两种评判——渴爱评判、见评判。

original: Kathaṃ taṇhāvinicchayaṃ karoti?
translation: 渴爱评判是如何形成的？

original: Idhekaccassa anuppannā ceva bhogā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca bhogā parikkhayaṃ gacchanti.
translation: 在此，一个人得不到新的财产，而已有的财产又丧失殆尽。

original: Tassa evaṃ hoti–
translation: 他这样想：

original: Tassa pana evaṃ hoti‘‘ surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhānānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa me anuppannā ceva bhogā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca bhogā parikkhayaṃ gacchanti;
translation: 进而他想：“因沉溺于为放逸而饮酒，所以我旧财耗尽，而新财不得；

original: vikālavisikhācariyānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa me anuppannā ceva bhogā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca bhogā parikkhayaṃ gacchanti;
translation: 因于不当的时间在街头巷尾闲逛，所以我旧财耗尽，而新财不得；

original: samajjābhicaraṇaṃ anuyuttassa me… jutappamādaṭṭhānānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa me… pāpamittānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa me anuppannā ceva bhogā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca bhogā parikkhayaṃ gacchanti;
translation: 因热衷于歌舞娱乐...沉溺于为放逸而赌博...好结交恶友，所以我旧财耗尽，而新财不得;

original: ālasyānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa me anuppannā ceva bhogā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca bhogā parikkhayaṃ gacchantī’’ ti evaṃ ñāṇaṃ katvā cha bhogānaṃ apāyamukhāni na sevati, cha bhogānaṃ āyamukhāni sevati.
translation: 因好逸恶劳，所以我旧财耗尽，而新财不得；” 如此智慧生起后，他堵住了财富漏失的六门，敞开了财源广进的六道。

original: Evampi taṇhāvinicchayaṃ karoti.
translation: 渴爱评判是如此形成的。

original: Atha vā kasiyā vā vaṇijjāya vā gorakkhena vā issatthena[ issattena( ka. sī. ka.) isu+ sattha] vā rājaporisena vā sippaññatarena vā paṭipajjati.
translation: 又或，一个人以耕作、贸易、放牧、箭术、公职、手艺为生。

original: Evampi taṇhāvinicchayaṃ karoti.
translation: 渴爱评判如此形成。

original: Kathaṃ diṭṭhivinicchayaṃ karoti?
translation: "见评判"是如何形成的？

original: Cakkhusmiṃ uppanne jānāti–
translation: 当眼生起时，他认为：

original: ‘‘ attā me uppanno’’ ti, cakkhusmiṃ antarahite jānāti–
translation: “我的自我生起。”；于眼消失时，他认为：

original: ‘‘ attā me antarahito vigato me attā’’ ti.
translation: “我的自我灭去，我的自我消失。”

original: Evampi diṭṭhivinicchayaṃ karoti.
translation: 见评判如此形成。

original: Sotasmiṃ… ghānasmiṃ… jivhāya… kāyasmiṃ… rūpasmiṃ… saddasmiṃ… gandhasmiṃ… rasasmiṃ… phoṭṭhabbasmiṃ uppanne jānāti–
translation: 当耳…鼻…舌…身…色…声…香…味…触生起时，他认为：

original: ‘‘ attā me uppanno’’ ti, phoṭṭhabbasmiṃ antarahite jānāti–
translation: “我的自我生起。” 于触消失时，他认为：

original: ‘‘ attā me antarahito vigato me attā’’ ti.
translation: “我的自我消失，我的自我离去。”

original: Evampi diṭṭhivinicchayaṃ karoti janeti sañjaneti nibbatteti abhinibbatteti.
translation: 见评判如此形成、生、发生、起、生起。

original: {Jantū}ti satto naro mānavo… pe… manujo.
translation: Jantū（人）：有情、人、人们…同上…人类。

original: {Loke}ti apāyaloke … pe… āyatanaloketi– vinicchayaṃ kubbati jantu loke.
translation: Loke（世间）：苦趣世间…处世间。——此即“评判起于世人中。”

original: Tenāha bhagavā–
translation: 由此，世尊说：

original: ‘ ‘ Sātaṃ asātanti yamāhu loke, tamūpanissāya pahoti chando;
translation: ”世人所言悦、非悦，因彼之故欲乃生；

original: Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ bhavañca, vinicchayaṃ kubbati jantu loke’’ ti.
translation: 见于诸色无有、有，评判起于世人中。“

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, etepi dhammā dvayameva sante;
translation: 愤怒妄语和疑惑，此等亦由二者生；

original: Kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya sikkhe, ñatvā pavuttā samaṇena dhammā.
translation: 迷者应学为智路，沙门彻悟而说法。

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā {cā}ti.
translation: “愤怒妄语和疑惑，”中，

original: {Kodho}ti yo evarūpo cittassa āghāto paṭighāto… pe… mosavajjaṃ vuccati musāvādo.
translation: 愤怒（Kodho）：所有心的憎恨、厌恶…同上…妄语（Mosavajjaṃ）：说谎。

original: Kathaṃkathā vuccati vicikicchā.
translation: 疑惑（Kathaṃkathā）：怀疑。

original: Iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi kodho jāyati, aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi kodho jāyati.
translation: 因可爱的事物愤怒；因不可爱的事物愤怒；

original: Iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi musāvādo uppajjati, aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi musāvādo uppajjati.
translation: 因可爱的事物说谎；因不可爱的事物说谎；

original: Iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi kathaṃkathā uppajjati, aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāyapi kathaṃkathā uppajjati.
translation: 因可爱的事物疑惑；因不可爱的事物疑惑；

original: Kathaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kodho jāyati?
translation: 如何因不可爱的事物而愤怒？

original: Pakatiyā aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kodho jāyati.
translation: 面对不可爱的事物，愤怒会很自然地生起。

original: Anatthaṃ me acarīti kodho jāyati, anatthaṃ me caratīti kodho jāyati, anatthaṃ me carissatīti kodho jāyati;
translation: “他曾伤害我。”，愤怒因此生起；"他正在伤害我。"，愤怒因此生起；“他未来将会伤害我。”，愤怒因此生起。

original: piyassa me manāpassa anatthaṃ acari … anatthaṃ carati… anatthaṃ carissatīti kodho jāyati;
translation: “他曾伤害我喜爱的、可意的...正在伤害...将会伤害。”，愤怒因此生起。

original: appiyassa me amanāpassa atthaṃ acari… atthaṃ carati… atthaṃ carissatīti kodho jāyati.
translation: “他曾利益我不喜爱的、不可意的...正在利益...将会利益。”，愤怒因此生起。

original: Evaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kodho jāyati.
translation: 如此，因不可爱的事物而愤怒。

original: Kathaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kodho jāyati?
translation: 又如何因可爱的事物而愤怒？

original: Iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ acchedasaṅkinopi kodho jāyati, acchijjantepi kodho jāyati, acchinnepi kodho jāyati.
translation: 担心可爱的事物被夺走而生起愤怒，正被夺走时生起愤怒，被夺走后生起愤怒。

original: Iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ vipariṇāmasaṅkinopi kodho jāyati, vipariṇāmantepi kodho jāyati, vipariṇatepi kodho jāyati.
translation: 担心可爱的事物变坏而生起愤怒，正变坏时生起愤怒，已变坏后生起愤怒。

original: Evaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kodho jāyati.
translation: 如此，因可爱的事物而愤怒。

original: Kathaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya musāvādo uppajjati?
translation: 如何因不可爱的事物而说谎？

original: tassa bandhanassa mokkhatthāya sampajānamusā bhāsati… rajjubandhanena vā baddho… saṅkhalikabandhanena vā baddho… vettabandhanena vā baddho… latābandhanena vā baddho… pakkhepabandhanena vā baddho… parikkhepabandhanena vā baddho… gāmanigamanagararaṭṭhabandhanena vā baddho… janapadabandhanena vā baddho;
translation: 他为了摆脱束缚而说谎…为绳索束缚…为链条束缚…为藤条束缚…为蔓藤束缚…软禁…关押在围墙内、被限制于指定的范围内（村、镇、都城、王国）…被限制于某一地域；

original: tassa bandhanassa mokkhatthāya sampajānamusā bhāsati .
translation: 他为了从束缚中解脱而故意妄语。

original: Evaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya musāvādo uppajjatīti.
translation: 如此，因不可爱的事物而说谎。

original: Kathaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya musāvādo uppajjati?
translation: 又如何因可爱的事物而说谎？

original: Idhekacco manāpikānaṃ[ manāpānaṃ( sī.)] rūpānaṃ hetu sampajānamusā bhāsati… manāpikānaṃ saddānaṃ… gandhānaṃ… rasānaṃ… phoṭṭhabbānaṃ hetu… cīvarahetu… piṇḍapātahetu… senāsanahetu… gilānapaccayabhesajjaparikkhārahetu sampajānamusā bhāsati.
translation: 在此，某人因如意的色而故意妄语…因如意的声…如意的香…如意的味…如意的触…衣物…钵食…坐卧处…药品而故意妄语。

original: Evaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya musāvādo uppajjati.
translation: 如此，因可爱的事物而说谎。

original: Kathaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kathaṃkathā uppajjati?
translation: 如何因不可爱的事物而疑惑？

original: Muccissāmi nu kho sotarogato… ghānarogato… jivhārogato… kāyarogato… sīsarogato… kaṇṇarogato… mukharogato… muccissāmi nu kho dantarogato, na nu kho muccissāmi dantarogato’’ ti.
translation: 我的耳病会好吗？...鼻病...舌病...身病...头病...外耳病...口腔病...我的牙病会好吗？不会好吗？

original: Evaṃ aniṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kathaṃkathā uppajjati.
translation: 如此，因不可爱的事物而疑惑。

original: Kathaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kathaṃkathā uppajjati?
translation: 又如何因可爱的事物而疑惑？

original: Labhissāmi nu kho manāpike sadde… gandhe… rase… phoṭṭhabbe… kulaṃ… gaṇaṃ… āvāsaṃ… lābhaṃ… yasaṃ… pasaṃsaṃ… sukhaṃ… cīvaraṃ… piṇḍapātaṃ… senāsanaṃ… gilānapaccayabhesajjaparikkhāran’’ ti.
translation: 我能否获得如意的声…香…味…触…家庭…团体…住所…利益…名望…赞赏…快乐…衣物…钵食…坐卧处…药品？

original: Evaṃ iṭṭhaṃ vatthuṃ nissāya kathaṃkathā uppajjatīti– kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca.
translation: 如此，因可爱的事物而疑惑。——此即“愤怒妄语和疑惑，”

original: Etepi dhammā dvayameva {sante}ti.
translation: ”此等亦由二者生；“中，

original: Sātāsāte sante, sukhadukkhe sante, somanassadomanasse sante, iṭṭhāniṭṭhe sante, anunayapaṭighe sante saṃvijjamāne atthi upalabbhamāneti– etepi dhammā dvayameva sante.
translation: 当悦、非悦存在，当快乐、痛苦存在，当喜悦、忧恼存在，当可爱、不可爱存在，当喜好、厌恶存在。——此即”此等亦由二者生。“

original: Kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya {sikkhe}ti.
translation: ”迷者应学为智路，“中，

original: Ñāṇampi ñāṇapatho, ñāṇassa ārammaṇampi ñāṇapatho, ñāṇasahabhunopi dhammā ñāṇapatho.
translation: 智慧是智路，智慧的原因是智路、与智慧俱存之诸法也是智路。

original: Yathā ariyamaggo ariyapatho, devamaggo devapatho, brahmamaggo brahmapatho;
translation: 犹如圣道是圣路，天道是天路，梵道是梵路。

original: evameva ñāṇampi ñāṇapatho, ñāṇassa ārammaṇampi ñāṇapatho, ñāṇasahabhunopi dhammā ñāṇapatho.
translation: 如此，智慧是智路，智慧的原因是智路、与智慧俱存之诸法也是智路。

original: {Sikkhe}ti tisso sikkhā– adhisīlasikkhā, adhicittasikkhā, adhipaññāsikkhā.
translation: Sikkhe（学）：三学，增上戒学，增上心学，增上慧学。

original: Katamā adhisīlasikkhā?
translation: 什么是增上戒学？

original: Idha bhikkhu sīlavā hoti, pātimokkhasaṃvarasaṃvuto viharati ācāragocarasampanno, aṇumattesu vajjesu bhayadassāvī, samādāya sikkhati sikkhāpadesu, khuddako sīlakkhandho… mahanto sīlakkhandho… sīlaṃ patiṭṭhā ādi caraṇaṃ saṃyamo saṃvaro mukhaṃ pamukhaṃ kusalānaṃ dhammānaṃ samāpattiyā– ayaṃ adhisīlasikkhā.
translation: 在此，一位持戒的比库守护了巴帝摩卡律仪，俱足正行与行处，即使于微小的过失也见到其怖畏，受持诸学处后训练自己，无论小戒蕴...大戒蕴...都是戒，是基石、践行的起点、自制、守护，是通往善法的先导之门。——此即增上戒学。

original: Katamā adhicittasikkhā?
translation: 什么是增上心学？

original: Idha bhikkhu vivicceva kāmehi… pe… catutthaṃ jhānaṃ upasampajja viharati– ayaṃ adhicittasikkhā.
translation: 在此，比库远离诸欲...（略）...到达四禅而住。——此为增上心学。

original: Katamā adhipaññāsikkhā?
translation: 什么是增上慧学？

original: Idha bhikkhu paññavā hoti, udayatthagāminiyā paññāya samannāgato ariyāya nibbedhikāya sammādukkhakkhayagāminiyā.
translation: 于此，有比库是俱慧者，此智慧是生灭智、圣智、摧毁烦恼智以及彻底灭苦之智。

original: So‘‘ idaṃ dukkhan’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti… pe…‘‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti,‘‘ ime āsavā’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti… pe…‘‘ ayaṃ āsavanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti– ayaṃ adhipaññāsikkhā.
translation: 他如实了知“”此是苦。“...（略）...他如实了知“”此是苦灭之道。“，如实了知“”这些是烦恼。“...（略）...如实了知“”此是通往烦恼灭尽之道。“——此为增上慧学。

original: Kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya {sikkhe}ti.
translation: ”迷者应学为智路。“中，

original: Kathaṃkathī puggalo sakaṅkho savilekho sadveḷhako savicikiccho, ñāṇādhigamāya ñāṇaphusanāya ñāṇasacchikiriyāya adhisīlampi sikkheyya, adhicittampi sikkheyya, adhipaññampi sikkheyya;
translation: 有疑惑、犹豫、疑心、怀疑、狐疑的人，为了获得智慧、通达智慧、亲证智慧应培育增上戒、增上心、增上慧；

original: imā tisso sikkhāyo āvajjanto sikkheyya, jānanto sikkheyya, passanto sikkheyya, paccavekkhanto sikkheyya, cittaṃ adhiṭṭhahanto sikkheyya, saddhāya adhimuccanto sikkheyya, vīriyaṃ paggaṇhanto sikkheyya, satiṃ upaṭṭhahanto sikkheyya, cittaṃ samādahanto sikkheyya, paññāya pajānanto sikkheyya, abhiññeyyaṃ abhijānanto sikkheyya, pariññeyyaṃ parijānanto sikkheyya, pahātabbaṃ pajahanto sikkheyya, bhāvetabbaṃ bhāvento sikkheyya, sacchikātabbaṃ sacchikaronto sikkheyya ācareyya samācareyya samādāya vatteyyāti– kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya sikkhe.
translation: 针对此三学，应专注而训练，应了知而训练，应明见而训练，应省察而训练，应坚定其心而训练，应满怀信心而训练，应精进努力而训练，应守护念而训练，应平心静气而训练，应以智慧悉知而训练，证知应证知而训练，遍知应遍知而训练，舍断应舍断而训练，修习应修习而训练，体证应体证而训练，其应练习、熟练、受持后实行此三学。——此即**“迷者应学为智路”**。

original: Ñatvā pavuttā samaṇena {dhammā}ti.
translation: **沙门彻悟而说法。**中，

original: {Ñatvā}ti ñatvā jānitvā tulayitvā tīrayitvā vibhāvayitvā vibhūtaṃ katvā vuttā pavuttā ācikkhitā desitā paññapitā paṭṭhapitā vivaṭā vibhattā uttānīkatā[ uttāniṃ katā( ka.)] pakāsitā.
translation: 彻悟（Ñatvā）：在彻悟、知道、衡量、审察、逐步显明、了然之后，言说、宣说、示名、略说、详说、解说、开示、辨析、阐发、展示。

original: ‘‘ Sabbe saṅkhārā aniccā’’ ti ñatvā jānitvā tulayitvā tīrayitvā vibhāvayitvā vibhūtaṃ katvā vuttā pavuttā ācikkhitā desitā paññapitā paṭṭhapitā vivaṭā vibhattā uttānīkatā pakāsitā,‘‘ sabbe saṅkhārā dukkhā’’ ti…‘‘ sabbe dhammā anattā’’ ti…‘‘ avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā’’ ti… pe…‘‘ jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇan’’ ti…‘‘ avijjānirodhā saṅkhāranirodho’’ ti… pe…‘‘ jātinirodhā jarāmaraṇanirodho’’ ti…‘‘ idaṃ dukkhan’’ ti… pe…‘‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’’ ti…‘‘ ime āsavā’’ ti… pe…‘‘ ayaṃ āsavanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’’ ti…‘‘ ime dhammā abhiññeyyā’’ ti…‘‘ ime dhammā pariññeyyā’’ ti…‘‘ ime dhammā pahātabbā’’ ti…‘‘ ime dhammā bhāvetabbā’’ ti…‘‘ ime dhammā sacchikātabbā’’ ti… channaṃ phassāyatanānaṃ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca… pañcannaṃ upādānakkhandhānaṃ… catunnaṃ mahābhūtānaṃ…‘‘ yaṃ kiñci samudayadhammaṃ sabbaṃ taṃ nirodhadhamma’’ ntntti ñatvā jānitvā tulayitvā tīrayitvā vibhāvayitvā vibhūtaṃ katvā vuttā pavuttā ācikkhitā desitā paññapitā paṭṭhapitā vivaṭā vibhattā uttānīkatā pakāsitā.
translation: 在彻悟、知道、衡量、审察、逐步显明、了然之后，言说、宣说、示名、略说、详说、解说、开示、辨析、阐发、展示了“诸行无常。”... ..."诸法是苦。"... ..."诸法是苦。"... ...“无明缘行。”...略...“生缘老死”... ...“无明灭则行灭。”...略...“生灭则老死灭。”... ...“此是苦。”...略...“此是苦灭之道。”... ...“此是烦恼。”...略...“此是息灭烦恼之道。”... ...“这些法应被证知。”... ...“这些法应被遍知。”... ...“这些法应被舍断。”... ...“这些法应被修习。”... ...“这些法应被亲证。”... ...“六触处的因、灭、乐味、过患、出离”... ...“五取蕴”... ...“四大种”... ... 在在彻悟、知道、衡量、审察、逐步显明、了然之后，言说、宣说、示名、略说、详说、解说、开示、辨析、阐发、展示了“一切诸因聚合之法，终会消亡。”

original: Vuttañhetaṃ bhagavatā–
translation: 世尊如此说：

original: ‘‘ abhiññāyāhaṃ, bhikkhave, dhammaṃ desemi, no anabhiññāya.
translation: “诸比库，在彻知后，我教示法，非未彻知。

original: Sanidānāhaṃ, bhikkhave, dhammaṃ desemi, no anidānaṃ.
translation: 比库们，我开示有起因之法，非无起因。

original: Sappāṭihāriyāhaṃ, bhikkhave, dhammaṃ desemi, no appāṭihāriyaṃ.
translation: 诸比库，我教示具净化力之法，非无净化力。

original: Tassa mayhaṃ, bhikkhave, abhiññāya dhammaṃ desayato, no anabhiññāya, sanidānaṃ dhammaṃ desayato, no anidānaṃ, sappāṭihāriyaṃ dhammaṃ desayato, no appāṭihāriyaṃ, karaṇīyo ovādo, karaṇīyā anusāsanī.
translation: 诸比库，我在完全体证后教示法，非未完全体证；我教示有因之法，非无因；我教示出离法，非不出离；我做了应做的教诫及随教诫。

original: Alañca pana, bhikkhave, vo tuṭṭhiyā alaṃ pāmojjāya alaṃ somanassāya sammāsambuddho bhagavā, svākkhāto dhammo, suppaṭipanno saṅghoti.
translation: “世尊为正自觉者，法已被善说，僧乃善行道者。”诸比库，当如此忆念，你们应感到满意、欢喜、愉悦。

original: Imasmiñca pana veyyākaraṇasmiṃ bhaññamāne dasasahassī lokadhātu akampitthā’’ ti– ñatvā pavuttā samaṇena dhammā.
translation: 就在此宣说之时，一万个世界系为之震动。——此即**沙门彻悟而说法。

original: Tenāha bhagavā–
translation: 由此，世尊说，

original: ‘ ‘ Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, etepi dhammā dvayameva sante;
translation: “愤怒妄语和疑惑，此等亦由二者生；

original: Kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya sikkhe, ñatvā pavuttā samaṇena dhammā’’ ti.
translation: 迷者应学为智路，沙门彻悟而说法。”

original: Sātaṃ asātañca kutonidānā, kismiṃ asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: 悦与非悦何因生？是何消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ me pabrūhi yatonidānaṃ.
translation: 及彼无有、有之义，请说彼之因由处。

original: Sātaṃ asātañca {kutonidānā}ti.
translation: “悦与非悦何因生？”中，

original: Sātā asātā kutonidānā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti sātāsātānaṃ mūlaṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– sātaṃ asātañca kutonidānā.
translation: “悦与非悦何因生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即“悦与非悦何因生？”

original: Kismiṃ asante na bhavanti {hete}ti.
translation: “是何消逝其亦逝；”中，

original: Kismiṃ asante asaṃvijjamāne natthi anupalabbhamāne sātāsātā na bhavanti nappabhavanti na jāyanti na sañjāyanti na nibbattanti na abhinibbattantīti– kismiṃ asante na bhavanti hete.
translation: 什么消逝、不存在、没有、不得之时，悦、非悦消逝、无发源、不生、不发生、不起、不生起。——此即“是何消逝其亦逝；”

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthan ti.
translation: “其等无有、有之义，”中，

original: Katamo sātāsātānaṃ bhavo?
translation: 什么是“悦、非悦”的有？

original: Yo sātāsātānaṃ bhavo pabhavo jāti sañjāti nibbatti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo– ayaṃ sātāsātānaṃ bhavo.
translation: 悦、非悦有、发源、生、发生、起、生起、显现，此[种见解]即悦、非悦的有。

original: Katamo sātāsātānaṃ vibhavo?
translation: 什么是“悦、非悦”的无有？

original: Yo sātāsātānaṃ khayo vayo bhedo paribhedo aniccatā antaradhānaṃ– ayaṃ sātāsātānaṃ vibhavo.
translation: 悦、非悦灭尽、衰亡、崩溃、粉碎、无常性、隐没，此[种见解]即悦、非悦的无有。

original: Yametamatthan ti yaṃ paramatthanti– vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ.
translation: Yametamatthan（此义）：它真实的含义——其等无有、有之义。

original: Etaṃ me pabrūhi yatonidānan ti.
translation: “请说彼之因由处。”中，

original: Etan ti yaṃ pucchāmi yaṃ yācāmi yaṃ ajjhesāmi yaṃ pasādemi.
translation: Etan（彼）为我所寻问、祈请、请求、需要澄清的。

original: {Pabrūhī}ti brūhi vadehi ācikkha desehi paññapehi paṭṭhapehi vivara vibhaja uttānīkarohi pakāsehīti– etaṃ me pabrūhi.
translation: Pabrūhī（请说）：请讲，请宣说，请示名，请略说，请详说，请解说，请开示，请辨析，请阐发，请展示。——请对我说。

original: Yatonidānan ti yaṃnidānaṃ yaṃsamudayaṃ yaṃjātikaṃ yaṃpabhavanti– etaṃ me pabrūhi yatonidānaṃ.
translation: Yatonidānan（因由处）：那因由、那根源、那来由、那发源。此为“请说此于何处生。”

original: Tenāha so nimmito–
translation: 由此，化身佛说，

original: ‘ ‘ Sātaṃ asātañca kutonidānā, kismiṃ asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: “悦与非悦何因生？是何消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ me pabrūhi yatonidānan’’ ti.
translation: 其等无有、有之义，请说彼之因由处。”

original: Phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātaṃ, phasse asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: 悦与非悦由触生，触若消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ te pabrūmi itonidānaṃ.
translation: 其等无有、有之义，我说彼亦由此生。

original: Phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātan ti.
translation: “悦与非悦由触生，”中，

original: Sukhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppajjati sukhā vedanā.
translation: 依于会被感受为乐的触，乐受生起。

original: Yā tasseva sukhavedanīyassa phassassa nirodhā, yaṃ tajjaṃ vedayitaṃ sukhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppannā sukhā vedanā sā nirujjhati, sā vūpasammati.
translation: 当会被感受为乐的触灭去，那些相应的依于它而生起的乐受也会灭去，止息。

original: Dukkhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppajjati dukkhā vedanā.
translation: 依于会被感受为苦的触，苦受生起。

original: Yā tasseva dukkhavedanīyassa phassassa nirodhā, yaṃ tajjaṃ vedayitaṃ dukkhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppannā dukkhā vedanā sā nirujjhati, sā vūpasammati.
translation: 当会被感受为苦的触灭去，那些相应的依于它而生起的苦受也会灭去，止息。

original: Adukkhamasukhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppajjati adukkhamasukhā vedanā.
translation: 依于会被感受为不苦不乐的触，不苦不乐受生起。

original: Yā tasseva adukkhamasukhavedanīyassa phassassa nirodhā, yaṃ tajjaṃ vedayitaṃ adukkhamasukhavedanīyaṃ phassaṃ paṭicca uppannā adukkhamasukhā vedanā sā nirujjhati, vūpasammati.
translation: 当会被感受为不苦不乐的触灭去，那些相应的依于它而生起的不苦不乐受也会灭去，止息。

original: Phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātan ti .
translation: “悦与非悦由触生”，

original: Sātāsātā phassanidānā phassasamudayā phassajātikā phassappabhavāti– phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātaṃ.
translation: 悦与非悦以触为因由、以触为根源、以触为来由、以触为因发源。——此即“悦与非悦由触生。”

original: Phasse asante na bhavanti {hete}ti.
translation: “触若消逝其亦逝；”中，

original: Phasse asante asaṃvijjamāne natthi anupalabbhamāne sātāsātā na bhavanti nappabhavanti na jāyanti na sañjāyanti na nibbattanti nābhinibbattanti na pātubhavantīti– phasse asante na bhavanti hete.
translation: 当触消逝、不存在、没有、不得时，悦与非悦也不存在、不生、不发生、不起、不生起、不显现。——此“即触若消逝其亦逝；”

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthan ti.
translation: “其等无有、有之义”中，

original: Bhavadiṭṭhipi phassanidānā, vibhavadiṭṭhipi phassanidānā.
translation: 有见也以触为因由，无有见也以触为因由。

original: Yametamatthan ti yaṃ paramatthanti– vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ.
translation: Yametamatthan（此义）：它真实的含义——此即其等无有、有之义。

original: Etaṃ te pabrūmi itonidānan ti.
translation: “我说彼亦由此生”中，

original: Etan ti yaṃ pucchasi yaṃ yācasi yaṃ ajjhesasi yaṃ pasādesi.
translation: Etan（此）为你所寻问、祈请、请求、需要澄清的。

original: {Pabrūmī}ti brūmi ācikkhāmi desemi paññapemi paṭṭhapemi vivarāmi vibhajāmi uttānīkaromi pakāsemīti– etaṃ te pabrūmi.
translation: Pabrūmī（我说）：我说，请示名，我略说，我详说，我解说，我开示，我辨析，我阐发，我展示。——我对你说这些。

original: Itonidānan ti ito phassanidānaṃ phassasamudayaṃ phassajātikaṃ phassappabhavanti– etaṃ te pabrūmi itonidānaṃ.
translation: Itonidānan（由此生）：以触为因由、以触为根源、以触为来由、以触为发源。此为“我说彼亦由此生。”

original: Tenāha bhagavā–
translation: 由此世尊说，

original: ‘ ‘ Phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātaṃ, phasse asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: “悦与非悦由触生，触若消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ te pabrūmi itonidānan’’ ti.
translation: 其等无有、有之义，我说彼亦由此生。”

original: Phasso nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno, pariggahā cāpi[ vāpi( sī. syā.)] kutopahūtā;
translation: 触于世间何因生？所属亦由何处生？

original: Kismiṃ asante na mamattamatthi, kismiṃ vibhūte na phusanti phassā.
translation: 何逝之时我执逝？何灭之时触难触？

original: Phasso nu lokasmiṃ {kutonidāno}ti.
translation: ”触于世间何因生？“中，

original: Phasso kutonidāno kutojāto kutosañjāto kutonibbatto kutoabhinibbatto kutopātubhūto, kiṃnidāno kiṃsamudayo kiṃjātiko kiṃpabhavoti phassassa mūlaṃ pucchati hetuṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– phasso nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno.
translation: “触从何因生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即“触于世间何因生？”

original: Pariggahā cāpi {kutopahūtā}ti pariggahā kutopahūtā kutojātā kutosañjātā kutonibbattā kutoabhinibbattā kutopātubhūtā, kiṃnidānā kiṃsamudayā kiṃjātikā kiṃpabhavāti pariggahānaṃ mūlaṃ pucchati hetuṃ pucchati… pe… samudayaṃ pucchati papucchati yācati ajjhesati pasādetīti– pariggahā cāpi kutopahūtā.
translation: “Pariggahā cāpi kutopahūtā”（所属亦由何处生？）中，所属从何处产生？从何处生？从何处发生？从何处起？从何处生起？从何处显现？以何为因由？以何为根源？以何为来由？以何为发源？” 如此对于纷争、分歧问根、问因、问因由、问起因、问发源、问起源、问来源、问原因、问助缘、问根源，寻问，细问，祈请，请求、澄清。——此即“所属亦由何处生？“

original: Kismiṃ asante na {mamattamatthī}ti.
translation: **何逝之时我执逝？**中，

original: Kismiṃ asante asaṃvijjamāne natthi anupalabbhamāne mamattā natthi na santi na saṃvijjanti nupalabbhanti, pahīnā samucchinnā vūpasantā paṭipassaddhā abhabbuppattikā ñāṇagginā daḍḍhāti– kismiṃ asante na mamattamatthi.
translation: 当什么消逝、不存在、没有、不得之时，我执才会没有、不在、不存在、不得、舍断、根绝、熄灭、灭尽、不能再生、为智火烧尽。——此为“何逝之时我执逝？”

original: Kismiṃ vibhūte na phusanti {phassā}ti.
translation: ”何无之时触难触？“中

original: Kismiṃ vibhūte vibhavite atikkante samatikkante vītivatte phassā na phusantīti– kismiṃ vibhūte na phusanti phassā.
translation: 什么无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越时，[感官]触不能触合。——此为“何无之时触难触？”

original: Tenāha so nimmito–
translation: 由此化身佛说，

original: ‘ ‘ Phasso nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno, pariggahā cāpi kutopahūtā;
translation: “触于世间何因生？所属亦由何处生？

original: Kismiṃ asante na mamattamatthi, kismiṃ vibhūte na phusanti phassā’’ ti.
translation: 何逝之时我执逝？何灭之时触难触？”

original: Nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso, icchānidānāni pariggahāni;
translation: 触乃源于名与色，欲求而为所执因；

original: Icchāyasantyā na mamattamatthi, rūpe vibhūte na phusanti phassā.
translation: 欲求寂灭我执灭，色无之时触难触。

original: Nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca {phasso}ti.
translation: “触乃源于名与色”，

original: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于眼与色，眼识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Cakkhu ca[ cakkhuñca( bahūsu)] rūpā ca rūpasmiṃ cakkhusamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 眼与色属于色法，眼触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Sotañca paṭicca sadde ca uppajjati sotaviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于耳与声，耳识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Sotañca saddā ca rūpasmiṃ sotasamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 耳与声属于色法，耳触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Ghānañca paṭicca gandhe ca uppajjati ghānaviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于鼻与香，鼻识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Ghānañca gandhā ca rūpasmiṃ ghānasamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 鼻与香属于色法，鼻触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Jivhañca paṭicca rase ca uppajjati jivhāviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于舌与味，舌识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Jivhā ca rasā ca rūpasmiṃ jivhāsamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 舌与味属于色法，舌触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Kāyañca paṭicca phoṭṭhabbe ca uppajjati kāyaviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于身与所触，身识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Kāyo ca phoṭṭhabbā ca rūpasmiṃ kāyasamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 身与所触属于色法，身触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṃ, tiṇṇaṃ saṅgati phasso.
translation: 依于意与法，意识生起，三者结合为触。

original: Vatthu rūpaṃ rūpasmiṃ, dhammā rūpino rūpasmiṃ manosamphassaṃ ṭhapetvā sampayuttakā dhammā nāmasmiṃ.
translation: 依处色属于色法，法色（ dhammā rūpino）属于色法，意触以外的相关法为名法。

original: Evampi nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso.
translation: 由此说，触乃源于名与色。

original: Icchānidānāni {pariggahānī}ti.
translation: "欲求而为所执因；"，

original: Icchā vuccati taṇhā.
translation: 欲求为渴爱，

original: Yo rāgo sārāgo… pe… abhijjhā lobho akusalamūlaṃ.
translation: 即那些贪染、爱著、...略... 贪婪、贪不善根。

original: {Pariggahā}ti dve pariggahā– taṇhāpariggaho ca diṭṭhipariggaho ca… pe… ayaṃ taṇhāpariggaho… pe… ayaṃ diṭṭhipariggaho.
translation: Pariggahā（所执）：有两种所执，爱所执和见所执 ...略 ... 此为爱所执 ...略 ... 此为见所执。

original: Icchānidānāni {pariggahānī}ti.
translation: "欲求而为所执因；"中，

original: Pariggahā icchānidānā icchāhetukā icchāpaccayā icchākāraṇā icchāpabhavāti– icchānidānāni pariggahāni.
translation: 所执以欲求为因由、为因、为助缘、为根据、为发源。——此即“欲求而为所执因；”。

original: Icchāyasantyā na {mamattamatthī}ti.
translation: “欲求消逝我执逝，”中，

original: Icchā vuccati taṇhā.
translation: 欲求为渴爱，

original: Yo rāgo sārāgo… pe… abhijjhā lobho akusalamūlaṃ.
translation: 即那些贪染、爱著、...略... 贪婪、贪不善根。

original: {Mamattā}ti dve mamattā– taṇhāmamattañca diṭṭhimamattañca … pe… idaṃ taṇhāmamattaṃ … pe… idaṃ diṭṭhimamattaṃ.
translation: Mamattā（我执）：有两种我执，爱我执和见我执 ...略 ... 此为爱我执 ...略 ... 此为见我执。

original: Icchāyasantyā na {mamattamatthī}ti.
translation: “欲求消逝我执逝，”中，[[Pariggahā and mamattam are same meaning?

original: Icchāya asantyā asaṃvijjamānāya natthi anupalabbhamānāya mamattā natthi na santi na saṃvijjanti nupalabbhanti, pahīnā samucchinnā vūpasantā paṭipassaddhā abhabbuppattikā ñāṇagginā daḍḍhāti– icchāyasantyā na mamattamatthi.
translation: 当欲求消逝、不存在、没有、不得之时，我执才会没有、不在、不存在、不得、舍断、根绝、熄灭、寂止、不能再生、为智火烧尽。——此即欲求寂灭我执灭。

original: Rūpe vibhūte na phusanti {phassā}ti.
translation: “色无之时触难触。”中，

original: {Rūpe}ti cattāro ca mahābhūtā catunnañca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ.
translation: 色（Rūpe）：四大种及四大所造色。

original: Rūpe {vibhūte}ti catūhākārehi[ catūhi kāraṇehi( syā.)] rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti– ñātavibhūtena[ ñāṇavibhūtena( sī.), tadaṭṭhakathāyaṃ pana ñātavītivattenāti dissati], tīraṇavibhūtena, pahānavibhūtena, samatikkamavibhūtena.
translation: 色无（Rūpe vibhūte）：由四种因而色无——了知无、测度无、舍断无、超越无。

original: Kathaṃ ñātavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti?
translation: 何为因了知而色无？

original: Rūpaṃ jānāti–
translation: 当色生起，

original: ‘‘ yaṃ kiñci rūpaṃ sabbaṃ rūpaṃ cattāri ca mahābhūtāni catunnañca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpan’’ ti jānāti passati.
translation: 他了知、明白：“所有的色都由四大及四大所造色构成。”[[ 1 need to see kalapa?? 2 why ñātavibhūta cause "Rūpe vibhūte na phusanti phassā"?了知怎么导致色无，及触难触？（依于眼与色，眼识生起，三者结合为触） 测度也存在同样问题。

original: Evaṃ ñātavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 此即以了知而色无。

original: Kathaṃ tīraṇavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti?
translation: 何为因测度而色无？

original: Evaṃ ñātaṃ katvā rūpaṃ tīreti, aniccato dukkhato rogato gaṇḍato sallato aghato ābādhato parato palokato ītito upaddavato bhayato upasaggato calato pabhaṅguto adhuvato atāṇato aleṇato asaraṇato rittato tucchato suññato anattato ādīnavato vipariṇāmadhammato asārakato aghamūlato vadhakato vibhavato sāsavato saṅkhatato mārāmisato jātidhammato jarādhammato byādhidhammato maraṇadhammato, sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsadhammato saṃkilesikadhammato samudayato atthaṅgamato, assādato ādīnavato nissaraṇato tīreti.
translation:
如此了知后，他测度色是无常、苦、病、痈、箭、恶、疾、敌、毁、难、祸、怖畏、灾患、动、脆弱、不恒、非保护所、非避难所、非归依处、无、虚、空、无我、患、变易法、不实、恶之根、杀戮者、无有、有漏、有为、魔食、生法、老法、病法、死法、愁悲苦忧恼法、杂染法、samudayato、灭法、乐味、过患、出离。[[1 samudayato same with dukkha samudaya ariya sacca?？
2 assādato？色无为什么要看成它是乐味？其它都是看作一些不好的东西。

original: Evaṃ tīraṇavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 此即以测度而色无。

original: Kathaṃ pahānavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti?
translation: 何为因舍断而色无？

original: Evaṃ tīrayitvā rūpe chandarāgaṃ pajahati vinodeti byantiṃ karoti anabhāvaṃ gameti.
translation: 如此测度后，对于色舍弃、驱散、远离欲染，令其化为乌有。[[联系下文：舍断.......未来无法再生，舍断指anagami magga?? or araham magga??

original: Vuttañhetaṃ bhagavatā–
translation: 世尊如此说——

original: ‘‘ yo, bhikkhave, rūpe chandarāgo taṃ pajahatha.
translation: ”诸比库，应于色舍断欲染，

original: Evaṃ taṃ rūpaṃ pahīnaṃ bhavissati ucchinnamūlaṃ tālāvatthukataṃ anabhāvaṃkataṃ āyatiṃ anuppādadhamman’’ ti.
translation: 如此，色将被舍断、根除、连根拔除、无后续、未来无法再生。“[[舍断指anagami magga?? or araham magga??

original: Evaṃ pahānavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 此即以舍断而色无。

original: Kathaṃ samatikkamavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 何为因超越而色无？

original: Catasso arūpasamāpattiyo paṭiladdhassa rūpā vibhūtā honti vibhāvitā atikkantā samatikkantā vītivattā.
translation: 得无色定者为无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越。

original: Evaṃ samatikkamavibhūtena rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 此即以超越而色无。

original: Imehi catūhi kāraṇehi rūpaṃ vibhūtaṃ hoti.
translation: 以此四种原因而为色无。

original: Rūpe vibhūte na phusanti {phassā}ti.
translation: “色无之时触难触。”中，

original: Rūpe vibhūte vibhāvite atikkante samatikkante vītivatte pañca phassā na phusanti– cakkhusamphasso, sotasamphasso, ghānasamphasso, jivhāsamphasso, kāyasamphassoti– rūpe vibhūte na phusanti phassā.
translation: 色无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越时，五种触不能触合——眼触、耳触、鼻触、舌触、身触，此即“色无之时触难触。”

original: Tenāha bhagavā–
translation: 由此，世尊说：

original: ‘ ‘ Nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso, icchānidānāni pariggahāni;
translation: ”触乃源于名与色，欲求而为所执因；

original: Icchāyasantyā na mamattamatthi, rūpe vibhūte na phusanti phassā’’ ti.
translation: 欲求消逝我执逝，色无之时触难触。“

original: Kathaṃ sametassa vibhoti rūpan ti.
translation: **如何行道色为无？**中，

original: Kathaṃ {sametassā}ti kathaṃ sametassa kathaṃ paṭipannassa kathaṃ iriyantassa kathaṃ vattentassa kathaṃ pālentassa kathaṃ yapentassa kathaṃ yāpentassa rūpaṃ vibhoti vibhāvīyati atikkamīyati samatikkamīyati[ vibhāviyyati atikkamiyyati samatikkamiyyati( bahūsu)] vītivattīyatīti– kathaṃ sametassa vibhoti rūpaṃ.
translation: 如何行道（Kathaṃ sametassā）：一个人如何行道？如何行动？如何进行？如何维持？如何过活？如何生活？色会无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越。——如何行者色为无？

original: Sukhaṃ dukhañcāpi kathaṃ {vibhotī}ti sukhañca dukkhañca kathaṃ vibhoti vibhāvīyati atikkamīyati samatikkamīyati vītivattīyatīti– sukhaṃ dukhañcāpi kathaṃ vibhoti.
translation: 苦乐如何亦为无？：苦、乐如何成为无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越。

original: Etaṃ me pabrūhi yathā {vibhotī}ti.
translation: **请为我说如何无，**中，

original: Etan ti yaṃ pucchāmi yaṃ yācāmi yaṃ ajjhesāmi yaṃ pasādemīti– etaṃ.
translation:
此
（Etan）我所寻问、祈请、请求、澄清的。

original: Me {pabrūhī}ti me pabrūhi ācikkha desehi paññapehi paṭṭhapehi vivara vibhaja uttānīkarohi pakāsehīti– etaṃ me pabrūhi.
translation: 请为我说（Me pabrūhī），请为我示名、略说、详说、解说、开示、辨析、阐发、展示。

original: Yathā {vibhotī}ti yathā vibhoti vibhāvīyati atikkamīyati samatikkamīyati vītivattīyatīti– etaṃ me pabrūhi yathā vibhoti.
translation: 如何无（Yathā vibhotī）如何成为无有、逝去、超过、超越、逾越。

original: Taṃ jāniyāmāti me mano {ahū}ti.
translation: ”愿了其详我心愿。“中，

original: Taṃ {jāniyāmā}ti taṃ jāneyyāma ājāneyyāma vijāneyyāma paṭivijāneyyāma paṭivijjheyyāmāti– taṃ jāniyāma.
translation: 愿了其详（Taṃ jāniyāmā）：对此我们愿了知、了解、详知、彻知、贯通。

original: Iti me mano {ahū}ti iti me mano ahu, iti me cittaṃ ahu , iti me saṅkappo ahu, iti me viññāṇaṃ ahūti– taṃ jāniyāma iti me mano ahu.
translation: 我心愿（Iti me mano ahū）：如此是我的心意、心、意愿、识。——此为愿闻其详我心愿。

original: Tenāha so nimmito–
translation: 化身佛如此问：

original: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ sametassa vibhoti rūpaṃ, sukhaṃ dukhañcāpi kathaṃ vibhoti;
translation: “如何行道色为无？苦乐如何亦为无？

original: Etaṃ me pabrūhi yathā vibhoti, taṃ jāniyāmāti me mano ahū’’ ti.
translation: 请为我说如何无，愿闻其详我心愿。”

original: Saññasaññino vuccanti ye pakatisaññāya ṭhitā, napi so pakatisaññāya ṭhito.
translation: 想想者是指那些拥有自然想者。此处并非指自然想者。

original: Visaññasaññino vuccanti ummattakā ye ca khittacittā [ ukkhittacittā( syā.)], napi so ummattako, nopi khittacittoti– na saññasaññī na visaññasaññī.
translation: 异想者指疯狂者、精神错乱者，此处并非指疯狂者、精神错乱者。——

original: Asaññino vuccanti nirodhasamāpannā ye ca asaññasattā, napi so nirodhasamāpanno, napi asaññasatto.
translation: 无想者是入灭尽定者，或无想有情天众生，此处并非指入灭尽定者，或无想有情天众生。
