original: Vibhūtasaññino vuccanti ye catunnaṃ arūpasamāpattīnaṃ lābhino, napi so catunnaṃ arūpasamāpattīnaṃ lābhīti– nopi asaññī na vibhūtasaññī.
translation: 非想者是指四无色定获得者，此处并非指四无色定获得者。——

original: Evaṃ sametassa vibhoti rūpan ti.
translation: 如此行道色为无，

original: Idha bhikkhu sukhassa ca pahānā… pe… catutthaṃ jhānaṃ upasampajja viharati.
translation: 在此(世间)，比库因为舍离乐、因为舍离苦、因为之前的悦意和忧心消失而具足不苦不乐的舍念清静(upekkhāsatipārisuddhi)的第四禅而住。

original: So evaṃ samāhite citte parisuddhe pariyodāte anaṅgaṇe vigatūpakkilese mudubhūte kammaniye ṭhite āneñjappatte ākāsānañcāyatanasamāpattipaṭilābhatthāya cittaṃ abhinīharati abhininnāmeti āruppamaggasamaṅgīti.
translation: 当此定心清净、皎洁、无垢、远离害杂染、柔软、胜任、安住、不动，为了达到空无边处定，他将心转向无色界道（āruppamaggasamaṅgī）。[[前文说，此处并非指四无色定获得者？？到底怎么是色为无？

original: Ettāvataggaṃ nu vadanti heke, yakkhassa suddhiṃ idha paṇḍitāse;
translation: 在此（世间中），至此某些智者说成是有情的最上清静。

original: {Yakkhassā}ti sattassa narassa mānavassa posassa puggalassa jīvassa jāgussa jantussa indagussa manujassa.
translation: 被祭的神灵的，有情的，人类的，有思想者的，人的，个体的，命魂的，生物的，

original: Tesaṃ paneke samayaṃ vadanti, anupādisese kusalāvadānā.
translation: 他们(沙门和婆罗门)中的某些声称在无剩余方面有擅长，而说那（断灭见）的教义。

original: Kathaṃ tattha jātānaṃ dhammānaṃ anativattanaṭṭhena bhāvanā?
translation: 其中，依照所生诸法的[互]不超越的方式而修习的是什么？

original: Kāmacchandaṃ pajahato nekkhammavasena jātā dhammā aññamaññaṃ nātivattantīti– tattha jātānaṃ dhammānaṃ anativattanaṭṭhena bhāvanā.
translation:
对于舍断感官之欲者，通过出离的力量，[ 并重的定和慧 ]法生起且互不超越，
这是其中依照所生诸法的[互]不超越的方式[进行止观]的修习。

original: Nidānanirodhena avijjā nirujjhati, samudayanirodhena avijjā nirujjhati, jātinirodhena avijjā nirujjhati, pabhavanirodhena[ āhāranirodhena( syā.)] avijjā nirujjhati, hetunirodhena avijjā nirujjhati, paccayanirodhena avijjā nirujjhati, ñāṇuppādena avijjā nirujjhati, nirodhupaṭṭhānena avijjā nirujjhati– imehi aṭṭhahākārehi avijjā nirujjhati.
translation:
由于[根本]缘的灭而无明灭，
由于集(近缘)的灭而无明灭，
由于[根本缘的]产生的灭而无明之灭，
由于[近缘的]生起的灭而无明之灭，
由于因(生缘)的灭而无明之灭，
由于[支助]缘的灭而无明之灭，
由于智的生而无明之灭，
由于灭的现起而无明灭。
以此八种行相为无明之灭。

original: Dutiyabhāṇavāro .
translation: 第二诵分(bhāṇavāra)。

original: Aniccato manasikaronto adhimokkhabahulo katamaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati?
translation: 依无常作意者多坚定得怎样的解脱呢？

original: Aniccato manasikaronto adhimokkhabahulo animittaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati.
translation: 依无常作意者多坚定而得无相解脱。

original: Tattha yā vīmaṃsā ussāhanā tulanā upaparikkhā, ayaṃ sutamayī paññā.
translation: 对其[所讲之法]进行[言辞上的]理解[ 法的本质 ]、[持诵熟练上的]努力、[词与词、法的语义、特相和作用的]辨析研究

original: Yassa imā dve paññā atthi sutamayī cintāmayī ca, ayaṃ ugghaṭitaññū.
translation: 这敏锐知者具有两种闻所成(sutamaya)和思所成两种慧。

original: Yassa sutamayī paññā atthi, cintāmayī natthi, ayaṃ vipañcitaññū[ vipaccitaññū( sī.)].
translation: 这广演知者具有闻所成慧而没有思所成慧。

original: Yassa neva sutamayī paññā atthi na cintāmayī, ayaṃ neyyo.
translation: 这可引导者既没有闻所成慧也没有思所成慧。

original: 11 . Kalahavivādasuttaṃ
translation: 《纷争分歧经》

original: ‘ ‘ Kutopahūtā kalahā vivādā, paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca;
translation:
纷争分歧何处生？
悲戚忧愁及吝啬；

original: Mānātimānā sahapesuṇā ca, kutopahūtā te tadiṅgha brūhi’’.
translation: 尊己卑人跟离间，请您告知其源头。

original: ‘ ‘ Piyappahūtā kalahā vivādā,
translation: 眷恋生纷争分歧，

original: Paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca;
translation: 悲戚忧愁及吝啬；

original: Mānātimānā sahapesuṇā ca,
translation: 尊己卑人跟离间，

original: Maccherayuttā kalahā vivādā;
translation: 纷争分歧吝相伴；

original: Vivādajātesu ca pesuṇāni’’.
translation: 生分歧时有离间。

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca kutonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa honti’’.
translation:
有欲求，尽满足，
未来人有依自何？

original: ‘ ‘ Chandānidānāni piyāni loke, ye cāpi lobhā vicaranti loke;
translation:
世上眷恋因何生，
贪者徘徊于世间；

original: Āsā ca niṭṭhā ca itonidānā, ye samparāyāya narassa honti’’.
translation: 有欲求，尽满足，自此未来人有依。

original: ‘ ‘ Chando nu lokasmiṃ kutonidāno, vinicchayā cāpi[ vāpi( sī. syā. pī.)] kutopahūtā;
translation: 欲于世间何因生？又于何处生评判？

original: Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, ye vāpi dhammā samaṇena vuttā’’.
translation: 愤怒妄语和疑惑，及沙门所说诸法。

original: ‘ ‘ Sātaṃ asātanti yamāhu loke, tamūpanissāya pahoti chando;
translation: 于世所言悦非悦，因彼之故欲乃生；

original: Rūpesu disvā vibhavaṃ bhavañca, vinicchayaṃ kubbati[ kurute( bahūsu)] jantu loke.
translation: 于诸色见灭与存，判断起于世人中。

original: ‘ ‘ Kodho mosavajjañca kathaṃkathā ca, etepi dhammā dvayameva sante;
translation:
愤怒妄语和疑惑，
二者有时诸法生；

original: Kathaṃkathī ñāṇapathāya sikkhe, ñatvā pavuttā samaṇena dhammā’’.
translation: 迷者应学为智路，沙门了知而说法。

original: ‘ ‘ Sātaṃ asātañca kutonidānā, kismiṃ asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: 悦与非悦何因生？是何消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ me pabrūhi yatonidānaṃ’’.
translation: 其等无有、有之义，请说彼之因由处。

original: ‘ ‘ Phassanidānaṃ sātaṃ asātaṃ, phasse asante na bhavanti hete;
translation: 悦与非悦由触生，触若消逝其亦逝；

original: Vibhavaṃ bhavañcāpi yametamatthaṃ, etaṃ te pabrūmi itonidānaṃ’’.
translation: 其等无有、有之义，我说彼亦由此生。

original: ‘ ‘ Phasso nu lokasmi kutonidāno, pariggahā cāpi kutopahūtā;
translation: 触于世间何因生？所执亦由何处生？

original: Kismiṃ asante na mamattamatthi, kismiṃ vibhūte na phusanti phassā’’.
translation: 何逝之时我执逝？何灭之时触难触？

original: ‘ ‘ Nāmañca rūpañca paṭicca phasso, icchānidānāni pariggahāni;
translation: 触乃源于名与色，欲求而为所执因；

original: Icchāyasantyā na mamattamatthi, rūpe vibhūte na phusanti phassā’’.
translation: 欲求消逝我执逝，色无之时触难触。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃsametassa vibhoti rūpaṃ, sukhaṃ dukhañcāpi[ dukhaṃ vāpi( sī. syā.)] kathaṃ vibhoti;
translation: 如何前行色归无？苦乐如何亦归无？

original: Etaṃ me pabrūhi yathā vibhoti, taṃ jāniyāmāti[ jānissāmāti( sī. ka.)] me mano ahu’’.
translation: 请为我说如何无，愿了其详我心愿。

original: ‘ ‘ Na saññasaññī na visaññasaññī, nopi asaññī na vibhūtasaññī;
translation: 非有想非异想想，非无想非虚无想；

original: Evaṃsametassa vibhoti rūpaṃ, saññānidānā hi papañcasaṅkhā’’.
translation: 如此前行色归无，此想之源即迷障。

original: ‘ ‘ Yaṃ taṃ apucchimha akittayī no,
translation: 已向吾等答所问，

original: Aññaṃ taṃ pucchāma tadiṅgha brūhi;
translation: 吾等他问请师答；

original: Ettāvataggaṃ nu[ no( sī. syā.)] vadanti heke,
translation: 确有智者说有情，

original: Yakkhassa suddhiṃ idha paṇḍitāse;
translation: 至此世上最清净；

original: Udāhu aññampi vadanti etto.
translation: 或言比之更甚者。

original: ‘ ‘ Ettāvataggampi vadanti heke, yakkhassa suddhiṃ idha paṇḍitāse;
translation:
所谓智者说有情，
至此世上最清净；

original: Tesaṃ paneke samayaṃ vadanti, anupādisese kusalā vadānā.
translation:
其中某些说所见，
声称善于无余依。

original: ‘ ‘ Ete ca ñatvā upanissitāti, ñatvā munī nissaye so vimaṃsī;
translation:
了知他们所依仗，
考知所依即牟尼；

original: Ñatvā vimutto na vivādameti, bhavābhavāya na sameti dhīro’’ ti.
translation:
知后解脱不来诤，
贤者不聚种种有。

original: ‘ ‘ Kiñcāpi khomhi dukkhitā, dubbalā gatayobbanā;
translation: 青春虽已逝，体弱病苦多；

original: Daṇḍamolubbha gacchāmi, pabbataṃ abhirūhiya.
translation: 我仍倚手杖，行路登山峰。

original: Dassanā pahātabbāsavā
translation: 应由见舍断之漏

original: 17.‘‘ Katame ca, bhikkhave, āsavā dassanā pahātabbā?
translation: 17.诸比库，哪些漏应由见舍断呢？

original: Idha, bhikkhave , assutavā puthujjano– ariyānaṃ adassāvī ariyadhammassa akovido ariyadhamme avinīto, sappurisānaṃ adassāvī sappurisadhammassa akovido sappurisadhamme avinīto– manasikaraṇīye dhamme nappajānāti, amanasikaraṇīye dhamme nappajānāti.
translation: 于此，诸比库，无闻凡夫不见诸圣者，不熟知于圣法，不受教于圣法；不见诸善士，不熟知于善士法，不受教于善士法，不知应作意之法，不知不应作意之法。

original: So manasikaraṇīye dhamme appajānanto amanasikaraṇīye dhamme appajānanto, ye dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā, te dhamme manasi karoti, ye dhammā manasikaraṇīyā te dhamme na manasi karoti.
translation: 他不知应作意法，不知不应作意法。哪些法不应作意，却作意那些法；哪些法应作意，却不作意那些法。

original: ‘ ‘ Katame ca, bhikkhave, dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme manasi karoti?
translation: 诸比库，哪些法不应作意却被作意呢？

original: Yassa, bhikkhave, dhamme manasikaroto anuppanno vā kāmāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā kāmāsavo pavaḍḍhati;
translation: 诸比库，作意某些法者的[相续中]未生欲漏生起，已生欲漏增长；

original: anuppanno vā bhavāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā bhavāsavo pavaḍḍhati;
translation: 未生有漏生起，已生有漏增长；

original: anuppanno vā avijjāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā avijjāsavo pavaḍḍhati– ime dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme manasi karoti.
translation: 未生无明漏生起，已无明欲漏增长——这些法不应作意却被作意。

original: ‘ ‘ Katame ca, bhikkhave, dhammā manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme na manasi karoti?
translation: 诸比库，哪些法应作意却不被作意呢？

original: Yassa, bhikkhave, dhamme manasikaroto anuppanno vā kāmāsavo na uppajjati, uppanno vā kāmāsavo pahīyati;
translation: 诸比库，作意某些法者的[相续中]未生欲漏不生起，已生欲漏被舍断；

original: anuppanno vā bhavāsavo na uppajjati, uppanno vā bhavāsavo pahīyati;
translation: 未生有漏不生起，已生有漏被舍断；

original: anuppanno vā avijjāsavo na uppajjati, uppanno vā avijjāsavo pahīyati– ime dhammā manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme na manasi karoti.
translation: 未生无明漏不生起，已生无明漏被舍断——这些法应作意却未被作意。

original: ‘ ‘ Tassa amanasikaraṇīyānaṃ dhammānaṃ manasikārā manasikaraṇīyānaṃ dhammānaṃ amanasikārā anuppannā ceva āsavā uppajjanti uppannā ca āsavā pavaḍḍhanti.
translation: 不如理作意故，他的[相续中]未生诸漏生起，已生诸漏增长。

original: 18.‘‘ So evaṃ ayoniso manasi karoti–
translation: 18.“他如此不如理作意：

original: ‘ ahosiṃ nu kho ahaṃ atītamaddhānaṃ?
translation: ‘我过去世存在吗？

original: Na nu kho ahosiṃ atītamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我过去世不存在吗？

original: Kiṃ nu kho ahosiṃ atītamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我过去世是什么？

original: Kathaṃ nu kho ahosiṃ atītamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我过去世是怎样的[形象]？

original: Kiṃ hutvā kiṃ ahosiṃ nu kho ahaṃ atītamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我过去世从什么成为什么？

original: Bhavissāmi nu kho ahaṃ anāgatamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我未来世存在吗？

original: Na nu kho bhavissāmi anāgatamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我未来世不存在吗？

original: Kiṃ nu kho bhavissāmi anāgatamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我未来世将是什么？

original: Kathaṃ nu kho bhavissāmi anāgatamaddhānaṃ?
translation: 我未来世将是怎样的[形象]？

original: Kiṃ hutvā kiṃ bhavissāmi nu kho ahaṃ anāgatamaddhānan’ ti?
translation: 我未来世从什么成为什么？

original: Etarahi vā paccuppannamaddhānaṃ[ paccuppannamaddhānaṃ ārabbha( syā.)] ajjhattaṃ kathaṃkathī hoti–
translation: 或在当下的现在世有对内在[诸蕴]之疑：

original: ‘ ahaṃ nu khosmi?
translation: 我存在吗？

original: No nu khosmi?
translation: 我不存在吗？

original: Kiṃ nu khosmi?
translation: 我是什么？

original: Kathaṃ nu khosmi?
translation: 我是怎样的[形象]？

original: Ayaṃ nu kho satto kuto āgato?
translation: 此有情从何而来？

original: So kuhiṃ gāmī bhavissatī’ ti?
translation: 他将到哪里去？’

original: 19.‘‘ Tassa evaṃ ayoniso manasikaroto channaṃ diṭṭhīnaṃ aññatarā diṭṭhi uppajjati.
translation: 19.那如此不如理作意者的[相续中]，六见之义生起。

original: ‘ Atthi me attā’ ti vā assa[ vāssa( sī. syā. pī.)] saccato thetato diṭṭhi uppajjati;
translation: 他依真实、坚固而生起见：“有我的自我。”

original: ‘ natthi me attā’ ti vā assa saccato thetato diṭṭhi uppajjati;
translation: 或者，他依真实、坚固而生起见：“没有我的自我。”

original: ‘ attanāva attānaṃ sañjānāmī’ ti vā assa saccato thetato diṭṭhi uppajjati;
translation: 或者，他依真实、坚固而生起见：“我以自我认知我。”

original: ‘ attanāva anattānaṃ sañjānāmī’ ti vā assa saccato thetato diṭṭhi uppajjati;
translation: 或者，他依真实、坚固而生起见：“我以自我认知非我。”

original: ‘ anattanāva attānaṃ sañjānāmī’ ti vā assa saccato thetato diṭṭhi uppajjati;
translation: 或者，他依真实、坚固而生起见：“我以非我认知我。”

original: atha vā panassa evaṃ diṭṭhi hoti–
translation: 又或他有如此之见：

original: ‘ yo me ayaṃ attā vado vedeyyo tatra tatra kalyāṇapāpakānaṃ kammānaṃ vipākaṃ paṭisaṃvedeti so kho pana me ayaṃ attā nicco dhuvo sassato avipariṇāmadhammo sassatisamaṃ tatheva ṭhassatī’ ti.
translation: ‘若我的自我能说、能感受，在各处体验善恶业的果报，那么我的这个自我则是常、坚实、恒存、非变易性，等同恒存而如此住立。’

original: Idaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave , diṭṭhigataṃ diṭṭhigahanaṃ diṭṭhikantāraṃ diṭṭhivisūkaṃ diṭṭhivipphanditaṃ diṭṭhisaṃyojanaṃ.
translation: 诸比库，这称为见属、见的密林、见的险途、见的荆棘、见的摇摆、见的结缚。

original: Diṭṭhisaṃyojanasaṃyutto, bhikkhave, assutavā puthujjano na parimuccati jātiyā jarāya maraṇena sokehi paridevehi dukkhehi domanassehi upāyāsehi;
translation: 诸比库，我说见结所系的无闻凡夫无法从生、老、死、愁、悲、苦、忧、恼中解脱；

original: ‘ na parimuccati dukkhasmā’ ti vadāmi.
translation: 无法从苦中解脱。”

original: 20.‘‘ Sutavā ca kho, bhikkhave, ariyasāvako– ariyānaṃ dassāvī ariyadhammassa kovido ariyadhamme suvinīto, sappurisānaṃ dassāvī sappurisadhammassa kovido sappurisadhamme suvinīto– manasikaraṇīye dhamme pajānāti amanasikaraṇīye dhamme pajānāti.
translation: 诸比库！具闻圣弟子见诸圣者，熟知于圣法，受教于圣法；见诸善士，熟知于善士法，受教于善士法，了知应作意之法，了知不应作意之法。

original: So manasikaraṇīye dhamme pajānanto amanasikaraṇīye dhamme pajānanto ye dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā te dhamme na manasi karoti, ye dhammā manasikaraṇīyā te dhamme manasi karoti.
translation: 他了知应作意法，了知不应作意法。哪些法不应作意，即不作意那些法；哪些法应作意，即作意那些法。

original: ‘ ‘ Katame ca, bhikkhave, dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme na manasi karoti?
translation: 诸比库，哪些法不应作意即不作意呢？

original: Yassa, bhikkhave, dhamme manasikaroto anuppanno vā kāmāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā kāmāsavo pavaḍḍhati;
translation: 诸比库，作意某些法者的[相续中]未生欲漏生起，已生欲漏增长；

original: anuppanno vā bhavāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā bhavāsavo pavaḍḍhati;
translation: 或未生有漏生起，已生有漏增长；

original: anuppanno vā avijjāsavo uppajjati, uppanno vā avijjāsavo pavaḍḍhati– ime dhammā na manasikaraṇīyā, ye dhamme na manasi karoti.
translation: 或未生无明漏生起，已无明欲漏增长——这些法不应作意即不作意。

original: ‘ ‘ Katame ca, bhikkhave, dhammā manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme manasi karoti?
translation: 诸比库，哪些法应作意即被作意呢？

original: Yassa, bhikkhave, dhamme manasikaroto anuppanno vā kāmāsavo na uppajjati, uppanno vā kāmāsavo pahīyati;
translation: 诸比库，作意某些法者的[相续中]未生欲漏不生起，已生欲漏被舍断；

original: anuppanno vā bhavāsavo na uppajjati , uppanno vā bhavāsavo pahīyati;
translation: 或未生有漏不生起，已生有漏被舍断；

original: anuppanno vā avijjāsavo na uppajjati, uppanno vā avijjāsavo pahīyati– ime dhammā manasikaraṇīyā ye dhamme manasi karoti.
translation: 或未生无明漏不生起，已生无明漏被舍断——这些法应作意即被作意。

original: ‘ ‘ Tassa amanasikaraṇīyānaṃ dhammānaṃ amanasikārā manasikaraṇīyānaṃ dhammānaṃ manasikārā anuppannā ceva āsavā na uppajjanti, uppannā ca āsavā pahīyanti.
translation: 如理作意故，他的[相续中]未生诸漏不生，已生诸漏被舍断。

original: 21.‘‘ So ‘ idaṃ dukkhan’ ti yoniso manasi karoti,‘ ayaṃ dukkhasamudayo’ ti yoniso manasi karoti,‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodho’ ti yoniso manasi karoti,‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ ti yoniso manasi karoti.
translation: 21.他如理作意：‘这是苦’，如理作意：‘这是苦集’，如理作意：‘这是苦灭’，如理作意：‘这是趣向苦灭之道’。

original: Tassa evaṃ yoniso manasikaroto tīṇi saṃyojanāni pahīyanti– sakkāyadiṭṭhi, vicikicchā, sīlabbataparāmāso.
translation: 他如此如理作意而舍断三结：有身见、疑、戒禁取。

original: Ime vuccanti, bhikkhave, āsavā dassanā pahātabbā.
translation: 诸比库，这些漏称为应由见舍断。

original: 190.‘‘ Evaṃ vimuttacitto pana, bho gotama, bhikkhu kuhiṃ upapajjatī’’ ti?
translation: “最牛氏！那么这样解脱心的比库往生何处呢？”

original: ‘‘ Upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upeti’’.
translation: “犊氏，[说]‘往生’不合适”。

original: ‘‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, na upapajjatī’’ ti?
translation: “最牛氏尊师！那么，不往生吗？”

original: ‘‘ Na upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upeti’’.
translation: “犊氏，[说]‘不往生’不合适”。

original: ‘‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatī’’ ti?
translation: “最牛氏尊师！那么，往生且不往生吗？”

original: ‘‘ Upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upeti’’.
translation: “犊氏，[说]‘往生且不往生’不合适”。

original: ‘‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatī’’ ti?
translation: “最牛氏尊师！那么，非往生非不往生吗？”

original: ‘‘ Neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upeti’’.
translation: “犊氏，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适”。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Evaṃ vimuttacitto pana, bho gotama, bhikkhu kuhiṃ upapajjatī’ ti iti puṭṭho samāno‘ upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upetī’ ti vadesi.
translation: “当被问到：‘最牛氏！那么这样解脱心的比库往生何处呢？’你说：‘犊氏，[说]‘往生’不合适’。

original: ‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, na upapajjatī’ ti iti puṭṭho samāno‘ na upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upetī’ ti vadesi.
translation: “当被问到：‘最牛氏！那么，不往生吗？’你说：‘犊氏，[说]‘不往生’不合适’。

original: ‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatī’ ti iti puṭṭho samāno‘ upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upetī’ ti vadesi.
translation: “当被问到：‘最牛氏！那么，往生又不往生吗？’你说：‘犊氏，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适’。

original: ‘ Tena hi, bho gotama, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatī’ ti iti puṭṭho samāno‘ neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti kho, vaccha, na upetī’ ti vadesi.
translation: “当被问到：‘最牛氏！那么，非往生非不往生吗？’你说：‘犊氏，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适’。

original: Etthāhaṃ, bho gotama, aññāṇamāpādiṃ, ettha sammohamāpādiṃ.
translation: 最牛氏尊师！在这里我不懂了，在这里我迷惑了。

original: Yāpi me esā bhoto gotamassa purimena kathāsallāpena ahu pasādamattā sāpi me etarahi antarahitā’’ ti.
translation: 通过先前的交谈我对乔达摩尊师那仅有净信(pasāda)，现在都已离我而去了。”

original: ‘‘ Alañhi te, vaccha, aññāṇāya, alaṃ sammohāya.
translation: “犊氏！足以让你无法理解，足以[让你]迷惑。

original: Gambhīro hāyaṃ, vaccha, dhammo duddaso duranubodho santo paṇīto atakkāvacaro nipuṇo paṇḍitavedanīyo.
translation: 犊氏！这个法是深奥的、难以理解的、难以契入的、寂静的、胜妙的、无法思辩的、微妙的、能被智者感知的。

original: So tayā dujjāno aññadiṭṭhikena aññakhantikena aññarucikena aññatrayogena[ aññatrāyogena( dī. ni.1.420)] aññatrācariyakena’’[ aññatthācariyakena( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.)].
translation: 通过另外的见解、另外的信仰、另外的偏好、另外的修习、另外的老师，该[法]难以被你理解。

original: 191.‘‘ Tena hi, vaccha, taññevettha paṭipucchissāmi;
translation: 既然如此，犊氏！我就在这件事上反过来问你，

original: yathā te khameyya tathā naṃ byākareyyāsi.
translation: 你怎么接受就怎么回答。

original: Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, vaccha, sace te purato aggi jaleyya, jāneyyāsi tvaṃ–
translation: 犊氏！你怎么想：如果火在你的前面燃烧，你知道：

original: ‘ ayaṃ me purato aggi jalatī’’’ ti?
translation: ‘这个火在我的前面燃烧’吗？”

original: ‘‘ Sace me, bho gotama, purato aggi jaleyya, jāneyyāhaṃ–
translation: “最牛氏尊师！如果火在我的前面燃烧，我知道：

original: ‘ ayaṃ me purato aggi jalatī’’’ ti.
translation: ‘这个火在我的前面燃烧’。”

original: ‘ ‘ Sace pana taṃ, vaccha, evaṃ puccheyya–
translation: “犊氏！那么，如果这么问你：

original: ‘ yo te ayaṃ purato aggi jalati ayaṃ aggi kiṃ paṭicca jalatī’ ti, evaṃ puṭṭho tvaṃ, vaccha, kinti byākareyyāsī’’ ti?
translation: ‘在你的前面燃烧的火是缘于什么而燃烧？’犊氏！被这么问时你要怎么回答？”

original: ‘‘ Sace maṃ, bho gotama, evaṃ puccheyya–
translation: “最牛氏尊师！如果这么我被问到：

original: ‘ yo te ayaṃ purato aggi jalati ayaṃ aggi kiṃ paṭicca jalatī’ ti, evaṃ puṭṭho ahaṃ, bho gotama, evaṃ byākareyyaṃ –
translation: ‘在你的前面燃烧的火是缘于什么而燃烧？’最牛氏尊师！被这么问时我会这样回答：

original: ‘ yo me ayaṃ purato aggi jalati ayaṃ aggi tiṇakaṭṭhupādānaṃ paṭicca jalatī’’’ ti.
translation: ‘在我的前面燃烧的火是缘于柴草燃料而燃烧。’

original: ‘ ‘ Sace te, vaccha, purato so aggi nibbāyeyya, jāneyyāsi tvaṃ–
translation: “如果该火在你的前面熄灭，你会知道：

original: ‘ ayaṃ me purato aggi nibbuto’’’ ti?
translation: ‘这个火在我的前面已熄灭’吗？”

original: ‘‘ Sace me, bho gotama, purato so aggi nibbāyeyya, jāneyyāhaṃ–
translation: “最牛氏尊师！如果该火在我的前面熄灭，我会知道：

original: ‘ ayaṃ me purato aggi nibbuto’’’ ti.
translation: ‘这个火在我的前面已熄灭’。”

original: ‘ ‘ Sace pana taṃ, vaccha, evaṃ puccheyya–
translation: “犊氏！那么，如果这么问你：

original: ‘ yo te ayaṃ purato aggi nibbuto so aggi ito katamaṃ disaṃ gato– puratthimaṃ vā dakkhiṇaṃ vā pacchimaṃ vā uttaraṃ vā’ ti, evaṃ puṭṭho tvaṃ, vaccha, kinti byākareyyāsī’’ ti?
translation: ‘在你的前面已熄灭的火离开这里去到了哪个方向？东、南、西、还是北？’犊氏！被这么问时你要怎么回答？”

original: ‘‘ Na upeti, bho gotama, yañhi so, bho gotama, aggi tiṇakaṭṭhupādānaṃ paṭicca ajali[ jalati( syā. kaṃ. ka.)] tassa ca pariyādānā aññassa ca anupahārā anāhāro nibbuto tveva saṅkhyaṃ gacchatī’’ ti.
translation:
“最牛氏尊师！那不合适；最牛氏尊师！
缘于柴草燃料燃烧的火，因为其耗尽且没有带来其他的[火]，所以就把无滋养视为熄灭。

original: 192.‘‘ Evameva kho, vaccha, yena rūpena tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya taṃ rūpaṃ tathāgatassa pahīnaṃ ucchinnamūlaṃ tālāvatthukataṃ anabhāvaṃkataṃ āyatiṃ anuppādadhammaṃ.
translation: “同样的，犊氏！在如来上安立的色已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Rūpasaṅkhayavimutto[ rūpasaṅkhāvimutto( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.) evaṃ vedanāsaṅkhayādīsupi] kho, vaccha, tathāgato gambhīro appameyyo duppariyogāḷho– seyyathāpi mahāsamuddo.
translation: 犊氏！灭尽色而解脱的如来深不可测、难以深入了解，犹如汪洋大海。

original: Upapajjatīti na upeti, na upapajjatīti na upeti, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti na upeti, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti na upeti.
translation: [说]‘往生’不合适，[说]‘不往生’不合适，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适。 ”

original: ‘ ‘ Yāya vedanāya tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya sā vedanā tathāgatassa pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṃkatā āyatiṃ anuppādadhammā.
translation: “在如来上安立的受已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Vedanāsaṅkhayavimutto kho, vaccha, tathāgato gambhīro appameyyo duppariyogāḷho– seyyathāpi mahāsamuddo.
translation: 犊氏！灭尽受而解脱的如来深不可测、难以深入了解，犹如汪洋大海。

original: Upapajjatīti na upeti, na upapajjatīti na upeti, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti na upeti, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti na upeti.
translation: [说]‘往生’不合适，[说]‘不往生’不合适，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适。 ”

original: ‘ ‘ Yāya saññāya tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya sā saññā tathāgatassa pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṃkatā āyatiṃ anuppādadhammā.
translation: “在如来上安立的标记已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Saññāsaṅkhayavimutto kho, vaccha, tathāgato gambhīro appameyyo duppariyogāḷho– seyyathāpi mahāsamuddo.
translation: 犊氏！灭尽标记而解脱的如来深不可测、难以深入了解，犹如汪洋大海。

original: Upapajjatīti na upeti, na upapajjatīti na upeti, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti na upeti, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti na upeti.
translation: [说]‘往生’不合适，[说]‘不往生’不合适，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适。 ”

original: ‘ ‘ Yehi saṅkhārehi tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya te saṅkhārā tathāgatassa pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṃkatā āyatiṃ anuppādadhammā.
translation: “在如来上安立的行已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Saṅkhārasaṅkhayavimutto kho, vaccha, tathāgato gambhīro appameyyo duppariyogāḷho– seyyathāpi mahāsamuddo.
translation: 犊氏！灭尽行而解脱的如来深不可测、难以深入了解，犹如汪洋大海。

original: Upapajjatīti na upeti , na upapajjatīti na upeti, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti na upeti, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti na upeti.
translation: [说]‘往生’不合适，[说]‘不往生’不合适，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适。 ”

original: ‘ ‘ Yena viññāṇena tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya taṃ viññāṇaṃ tathāgatassa pahīnaṃ ucchinnamūlaṃ tālāvatthukataṃ anabhāvaṃkataṃ āyatiṃ anuppādadhammaṃ.
translation: “在如来上安立的识已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Viññāṇasaṅkhayavimutto kho, vaccha, tathāgato gambhīro appameyyo duppariyogāḷho– seyyathāpi mahāsamuddo.
translation: 犊氏！灭尽识而解脱的如来深不可测、难以深入了解，犹如汪洋大海。

original: Upapajjatīti na upeti, na upapajjatīti na upeti, upapajjati ca na ca upapajjatīti na upeti, neva upapajjati na na upapajjatīti na upeti’’.
translation: [说]‘往生’不合适，[说]‘不往生’不合适，[说]‘往生又不往生’不合适，[说]‘非往生非不往生’不合适。 ”

original: Evaṃ vutte, vacchagotto paribbājako bhagavantaṃ etadavoca–
translation: 在這麼說時，遊行者婆蹉氏對世尊說這個：

original: ‘‘ seyyathāpi, bho gotama, gāmassa vā nigamassa vā avidūre mahāsālarukkho.
translation: 「喬達摩尊師！猶如在村落或離村落不遠處有大沙羅樹，

original: so aparena samayena apagatasākhāpalāso apagatatacapapaṭiko apagataphegguko suddho assa, sāre patiṭṭhito;
translation: 過些時候，它枝葉已剝落，內皮、外皮已剝落，膚材已剝落，成為在心材上住立的純淨者。

original: evameva bhoto gotamassa pāvacanaṃ apagatasākhāpalāsaṃ apagatatacapapaṭikaṃ apagatapheggukaṃ suddhaṃ, sāre patiṭṭhitaṃ.
translation: 同樣的，喬達摩尊師的教語枝葉已剝落，內皮、外皮已剝落，膚材已剝落，成為在心材上住立的純淨者。

original: Abhikkantaṃ, bho gotama… pe… upāsakaṃ maṃ bhavaṃ gotamo dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṃ saraṇaṃ gatan’’ ti.
translation: 太偉大了，喬達摩尊師！……（中略）請喬達摩尊師記得我為優婆塞，從今天起已起終生歸依。」(192)

original: Aggivacchasuttaṃ niṭṭhitaṃ dutiyaṃ.
translation: 婆蹉火經第二終了。

original: 136. Evaṃ me sutaṃ– ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṃ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
translation: 如是我闻：一时，跋葛瓦住在沙瓦提城揭德林给孤独园。

original: Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi–
translation: 于其处，跋葛瓦对比库们说：

original: ‘‘ bhikkhavo’’ ti.
translation: “诸比库。”

original: ‘‘ Bhadante’’ ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ.
translation: 那些比库回答跋葛瓦:“尊者。”

original: Bhagavā etadavoca–
translation: 跋葛瓦如此说：

original: ‘‘ ariyaṃ vo, bhikkhave, sammāsamādhiṃ desessāmi saupanisaṃ saparikkhāraṃ.
translation: “诸比库，我将教导你们有缘由、有支助的圣正定。

original: Taṃ suṇātha, sādhukaṃ manasi karotha;
translation: 谛听，善作意之，

original: bhāsissāmī’’ ti.
translation: 我要说了。”

original: ‘‘ Evaṃ, bhante’’ ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ.
translation: 那些比库回答跋葛瓦：“是的，尊者。”

original: Bhagavā etadavoca–
translation: 跋葛瓦如是说：

original: ‘ ‘ Katamo ca, bhikkhave, ariyo sammāsamādhi saupaniso saparikkhāro?
translation: “诸比库，什么是有缘由、有支助的圣正定？

original: Seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati;
translation: 这就是：正见、正思惟、正语、正业、正命、正精进、正念。

original: yā kho, bhikkhave, imehi sattahaṅgehi cittassa ekaggatā parikkhatā– ayaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, ariyo sammāsamādhi saupaniso itipi, saparikkhāro itipi.
translation: 诸比库，伴随着此七支的心一境性，诸比库，这称为有缘由、有支助的圣正定。

original: Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Micchādiṭṭhiṃ‘ micchādiṭṭhī’ ti pajānāti, sammādiṭṭhiṃ‘ sammādiṭṭhī’ ti pajānāti– sāssa hoti sammādiṭṭhi.
translation: 了知邪见为邪见，了知正见为正见，这是他的正见。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamā ca, bhikkhave, micchādiṭṭhi?
translation: 诸比库，什么是邪见？

original: ‘ Natthi dinnaṃ, natthi yiṭṭhaṃ, natthi hutaṃ, natthi sukatadukkaṭānaṃ kammānaṃ phalaṃ vipāko, natthi ayaṃ loko, natthi paro loko, natthi mātā, natthi pitā, natthi sattā opapātikā, natthi loke samaṇabrāhmaṇā sammaggatā sammāpaṭipannā ye imañca lokaṃ parañca lokaṃ sayaṃ abhiññā sacchikatvā pavedentī’ ti– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, micchādiṭṭhi.
translation: 没有布施，没有供养，没有献供，没有善行恶行诸业之果的异熟，没有此世，没有他世，没有母亲，没有父亲，没有众生是化生者，世上没有沙门、婆罗门之正行者、正行道者，以自智证知此世及他世而宣说。诸比库，这是邪见。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi?
translation: 诸比库，什么是正见？

original: atthi, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā.
translation: 诸比库，有正见是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi sāsavā puññabhāgiyā upadhivepakkā ?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正见是有漏、福德分、所依果报呢？

original: ‘ Atthi dinnaṃ, atthi yiṭṭhaṃ, atthi hutaṃ, atthi sukatadukkaṭānaṃ kammānaṃ phalaṃ vipāko, atthi ayaṃ loko, atthi paro loko, atthi mātā, atthi pitā, atthi sattā opapātikā, atthi loke samaṇabrāhmaṇā sammaggatā sammāpaṭipannā ye imañca lokaṃ parañca lokaṃ sayaṃ abhiññā sacchikatvā pavedentī’ ti– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi sāsavā puññabhāgiyā upadhivepakkā.
translation: 有布施，有供养，有献供，有善行恶行诸业之果的异熟，有此世，有他世，有母亲，有父亲，有众生是化生者，世上有沙门、婆罗门之正行者、正行道者，以自智证知此世及他世而宣说。诸比库，这种正见是有漏、福德分、所依果报。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正见是圣、无漏、出世间、道支呢？

original: Yā kho, bhikkhave, ariyacittassa anāsavacittassa ariyamaggasamaṅgino ariyamaggaṃ bhāvayato paññā paññindriyaṃ paññābalaṃ dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo sammādiṭṭhi maggaṅgaṃ[ maggaṅgā( sī. pī.)]– ayaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā.
translation: 诸比库，那圣心者、无漏心者、拥有圣道者、修习圣道者的慧、慧根、慧力、择法觉支、正见道支，诸比库，这种正见是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: So micchādiṭṭhiyā pahānāya vāyamati, sammādiṭṭhiyā, upasampadāya, svāssa[ svāyaṃ( ka.)] hoti sammāvāyāmo.
translation: 他为捨断邪见、具足正见而精进，这是他的正精进。

original: So sato micchādiṭṭhiṃ pajahati, sato sammādiṭṭhiṃ upasampajja viharati, sāssa[ sāyaṃ( ka.)] hoti sammāsati.
translation: 他专念捨断邪见，专念具足正见而住，这是他的正念。

original: 137.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Micchāsaṅkappaṃ‘ micchāsaṅkappo’ ti pajānāti, sammāsaṅkappaṃ‘ sammāsaṅkappo’ ti pajānāti, sāssa hoti sammādiṭṭhi .
translation:
了知邪思惟为邪思惟，了知正思惟为正思惟，这是他的正见。
。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamo ca, bhikkhave, micchāsaṅkappo?
translation: 诸比库，什么是邪思惟？

original: Kāmasaṅkappo, byāpādasaṅkappo, vihiṃsāsaṅkappo– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, micchāsaṅkappo.
translation: 欲思惟、瞋思惟、害思惟，诸比库，这是邪思惟。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo?
translation: 诸比库，什么是正思惟？

original: Sammāsaṅkappaṃpahaṃ, bhikkhave, dvāyaṃ vadāmi– atthi, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko;
translation: 我说正思惟有两种。诸比库，有正思惟是有漏、福德分、所依果报；

original: atthi, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，有正思惟是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正思惟是有漏、福德分、所依果报呢？

original: Nekkhammasaṅkappo, abyāpādasaṅkappo, avihiṃsāsaṅkappo–
translation: 出离思惟、无瞋思惟、无害思惟，

original: ‘ ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko’’’.
translation: 诸比库，这种正思惟是有漏、福德分、所依果报。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正思惟是圣、无漏、出世间、道支呢？

original: Yo kho, bhikkhave, ariyacittassa anāsavacittassa ariyamaggasamaṅgino ariyamaggaṃ bhāvayato takko vitakko saṅkappo appanā byappanā cetaso abhiniropanā vacīsaṅkhāro– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，那圣心者、无漏心者、拥有圣道者、修习圣道者的思索、思考、思惟、安止、极安止、心固定、语行，诸比库，这种正思惟是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: So micchāsaṅkappassa pahānāya vāyamati, sammāsaṅkappassa upasampadāya, svāssa hoti sammāvāyāmo.
translation: 他为捨断邪思惟、具足正思惟而精进，这是他的正精进。

original: So sato micchāsaṅkappaṃ pajahati, sato sammāsaṅkappaṃ upasampajja viharati;
translation: 他专念捨断邪思惟，专念具足正思惟而住，

original: sāssa hoti sammāsati.
translation: 这是他的正念。

original: Itiyime tayo dhammā sammāsaṅkappaṃ anuparidhāvanti anuparivattanti, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati.
translation: 如是此三法围绕、跟随着正思惟，即正见、正精进和正念。

original: 138.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 138．诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Micchāvācaṃ‘ micchāvācā’ ti pajānāti, sammāvācaṃ‘ sammāvācā’ ti pajānāti;
translation: 了知邪语为邪语，了知正语为正语，

original: sāssa hoti sammādiṭṭhi.
translation: 这是他的正见。

original: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, micchāvācā?
translation: 诸比库，什么是邪语？

original: Musāvādo, pisuṇā vācā, pharusā vācā, samphappalāpo– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, micchāvācā.
translation: 虚妄语、离间语、粗恶语、杂秽语，诸比库，这是邪语。

original: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammāvācā?
translation: 诸比库，什么是正语？

original: Sammāvācaṃpahaṃ, bhikkhave, dvāyaṃ vadāmi– atthi, bhikkhave, sammāvācā sāsavā puññabhāgiyā upadhivepakkā;
translation: 我说正语有两种。诸比库，有正语是有漏、福德分、所依果报；

original: atthi, bhikkhave , sammāvācā ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā.
translation: 诸比库，有正语是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammāvācā sāsavā puññabhāgiyā upadhivepakkā?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正语是有漏、福德分、所依果报呢？

original: Musāvādā veramaṇī, pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇī, pharusāya vācāya veramaṇī, samphappalāpā veramaṇī– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāvācā sāsavā puññabhāgiyā upadhivepakkā.
translation: 离虚妄语，离离间语，离粗恶语，离杂秽语，诸比库，这种正语是有漏、福德分、所依果报。

original: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammāvācā ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正语是圣、无漏、出世间、道支呢？

original: Yā kho, bhikkhave, ariyacittassa anāsavacittassa ariyamaggasamaṅgino ariyamaggaṃ bhāvayato catūhi vacīduccaritehi ārati virati paṭivirati veramaṇī– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāvācā ariyā anāsavā lokuttarā maggaṅgā.
translation: 诸比库，那圣心者、无漏心者、拥有圣道者、修习圣道者的远离、离、捨离、避免四种语恶行，诸比库，这种正语是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: So micchāvācāya pahānāya vāyamati, sammāvācāya upasampadāya;
translation: 他为捨断邪语、具足正语而精进，

original: svāssa hoti sammāvāyāmo.
translation: 这是他的正精进。

original: So sato micchāvācaṃ pajahati, sato sammāvācaṃ upasampajja viharati;
translation: 他专念捨断邪语，专念具足正语而住，

original: sāssa hoti sammāsati.
translation: 这是他的正念。

original: Itiyime tayo dhammā sammāvācaṃ anuparidhāvanti anuparivattanti, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati.
translation: 如是此三法围绕、跟随着正语，即正见、正精进和正念。

original: 139.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Micchākammantaṃ‘ micchākammanto’ ti pajānāti, sammākammantaṃ‘ sammākammanto’ ti pajānāti ;
translation: 了知邪业为邪业，了知正业为正业，

original: sāssa hoti sammādiṭṭhi.
translation: 这是他的正见。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, micchākammanto?
translation: 诸比库，什么是邪业？

original: Pāṇātipāto, adinnādānaṃ, kāmesumicchācāro– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, micchākammanto.
translation: 杀生、不与取、欲邪行，诸比库，这是邪业。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammākammanto?
translation: 诸比库，什么是正业？

original: Sammākammantaṃpahaṃ, bhikkhave , dvāyaṃ vadāmi– atthi, bhikkhave, sammākammanto sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko;
translation: 我说正业有两种。诸比库，有正业是有漏、福德分、所依果报；

original: atthi, bhikkhave, sammākammanto ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，有正业是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammākammanto sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正业是有漏、福德分、所依果报呢？

original: Pāṇātipātā veramaṇī, adinnādānā veramaṇī, kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇī– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammākammanto sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko.
translation: 离杀生，离不与取，离欲邪行，诸比库，这种正业是有漏、福德分、所依果报。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammākammanto ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正业是圣、无漏、出世间、道支呢？

original: Yā kho, bhikkhave, ariyacittassa anāsavacittassa ariyamaggasamaṅgino ariyamaggaṃ bhāvayato tīhi kāyaduccaritehi ārati virati paṭivirati veramaṇī– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammākammanto ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，那圣心者、无漏心者、拥有圣道者、修习圣道者的远离、离、捨离、避免三种身恶行，诸比库，这种正业是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: So micchākammantassa pahānāya vāyamati, sammākammantassa upasampadāya;
translation: 他为捨断邪业、具足正业而精进，

original: svāssa hoti sammāvāyāmo.
translation: 这是他的正精进。

original: So sato micchākammantaṃ pajahati, sato sammākammantaṃ upasampajja viharati;
translation: 他专念捨断邪业，专念具足正业而住，

original: sāssa hoti sammāsati.
translation: 这是他的正念。

original: Itiyime tayo dhammā sammākammantaṃ anuparidhāvanti anuparivattanti, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati.
translation: 如是此三法围绕、跟随着正业，即正见、正精进和正念。

original: 140.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。诸比库，

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 如何正见为先导呢？

original: Micchāājīvaṃ‘ micchāājīvo’ ti pajānāti, sammāājīvaṃ‘ sammāājīvo’ ti pajānāti;
translation: 了知邪命为邪命，了知正命为正命，

original: sāssa hoti sammādiṭṭhi.
translation: 这是他的正见。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, micchāājīvo?
translation: 诸比库，什么是邪命？

original: Kuhanā, lapanā, nemittikatā, nippesikatā, lābhena lābhaṃ nijigīsanatā[ nijigiṃ sanatā( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.)]– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, micchāājīvo.
translation: 诡诈、虚谈、作暗示、诈骗、以利求利，诸比库，这是邪命。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo?
translation: 诸比库，什么是正命？

original: Sammāājīvaṃpahaṃ, bhikkhave , dvāyaṃ vadāmi– atthi, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko;
translation: 我说正命有两种。诸比库，有正命是有漏、福德分、所依果报；

original: atthi, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，有正命是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正命是有漏、福德分、所依果报呢？

original: Idha, bhikkhave, ariyasāvako micchāājīvaṃ pahāya sammāājīvena jīvikaṃ kappeti– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo sāsavo puññabhāgiyo upadhivepakko.
translation: 诸比库，在此，圣弟子捨离邪命，以正命而营生，诸比库，这种正命是有漏、福德分、所依果报。

original: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo?
translation: 诸比库，哪种正命是圣、无漏、出世间、道支呢？

original: Yā kho, bhikkhave, ariyacittassa anāsavacittassa ariyamaggasamaṅgino ariyamaggaṃ bhāvayato micchāājīvā ārati virati paṭivirati veramaṇī– ayaṃ, bhikkhave, sammāājīvo ariyo anāsavo lokuttaro maggaṅgo.
translation: 诸比库，那圣心者、无漏心者、拥有圣道者、修习圣道者的远离、离、捨离、避免邪命，诸比库，这种正命是圣、无漏、出世间、道支。

original: So micchāājīvassa pahānāya vāyamati, sammāājīvassa upasampadāya ;
translation: 他为捨断邪命、具足正命而精进，

original: svāssa hoti sammāvāyāmo.
translation: 这是他的正精进。

original: So sato micchāājīvaṃ pajahati, sato sammāājīvaṃ upasampajja viharati;
translation: 他专念捨断邪命，专念具足正命而住，

original: sāssa hoti sammāsati.
translation: 这是他的正念。

original: Itiyime tayo dhammā sammāājīvaṃ anuparidhāvanti anuparivattanti, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati.
translation: 如是此三法围绕、跟随着正命，即正见、正精进和正念。

original: 141.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Sammādiṭṭhissa , bhikkhave, sammāsaṅkappo pahoti, sammāsaṅkappassa sammāvācā pahoti, sammāvācassa sammākammanto pahoti, sammākammantassa sammāājīvo pahoti, sammāājīvassa sammāvāyāmo pahoti, sammāvāyāmassa sammāsati pahoti, sammāsatissa sammāsamādhi pahoti, sammāsamādhissa sammāñāṇaṃ pahoti, sammāñāṇassa sammāvimutti pahoti.
translation: 诸比库，有正见者才有正思惟，有正思惟者才有正语，有正语者才有正业，有正业者才有正命，有正命者才有正精进，有正精进者才有正念，有正念者才有正定，有正定者才有正智，有正智者才有正解脱。

original: 142.‘‘ Tatra, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，其中，正见为先导。

original: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sammādiṭṭhi pubbaṅgamā hoti?
translation: 诸比库，如何正见为先导呢？

original: Sammādiṭṭhissa, bhikkhave, micchādiṭṭhi nijjiṇṇā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，有正见者能破除邪见，

original: Ye ca micchādiṭṭhipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti.
translation: 也能破除缘于邪见而产生的各种恶、不善法。

original: Sammādiṭṭhipaccayā aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṃ gacchanti.
translation: 缘于正见，能修习成就各种善法。

original: Sammāsaṅkappassa, bhikkhave, micchāsaṅkappo nijjiṇṇo hoti… pe… sammāvācassa, bhikkhave, micchāvācā nijjiṇṇā hoti… sammākammantassa, bhikkhave, micchākammanto nijjiṇṇo hoti… sammāājīvassa, bhikkhave, micchāājīvo nijjiṇṇo hoti… sammāvāyāmassa , bhikkhave , micchāvāyāmo nijjiṇṇo hoti… sammāsatissa, bhikkhave, micchāsati nijjiṇṇā hoti… sammāsamādhissa, bhikkhave, micchāsamādhi nijjiṇṇo hoti… sammāñāṇassa, bhikkhave, micchāñāṇaṃ nijjiṇṇaṃ hoti… sammāvimuttassa, bhikkhave, micchāvimutti nijjiṇṇā hoti.
translation: 诸比库，有正思惟者能破除邪思惟……诸比库，有正语者能破除邪语……诸比库，有正业者能破除邪业……诸比库，有正命者能破除邪命……诸比库，有正精进者能破除邪精进……诸比库，有正念者能破除邪念……诸比库，有正定者能破除邪定……诸比库，有正智者能破除邪智……诸比库，有正解脱者能破除邪解脱，

original: Ye ca micchāvimuttipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti.
translation: 也能破除缘于邪解脱而产生的各种恶、不善法。

original: Sammāvimuttipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṃ gacchanti.
translation: 缘于正解脱，能修习成就各种善法。

original: ‘ ‘ Iti kho, bhikkhave, vīsati kusalapakkhā, vīsati akusalapakkhā– mahācattārīsako dhammapariyāyo pavattito appaṭivattiyo samaṇena vā brāhmaṇena vā devena vā mārena vā brahmunā vā kenaci vā lokasmiṃ.
translation: 诸比库，如是，所转的二十为善边、二十为不善边的大四十法门，于世间不能被沙门、婆罗门、天、魔、梵或任何人所逆转！

original: 143.‘‘ Yo hi koci, bhikkhave, samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā imaṃ mahācattārīsakaṃ dhammapariyāyaṃ garahitabbaṃ paṭikkositabbaṃ maññeyya tassa diṭṭheva dhamme dasasahadhammikā vādānuvādā gārayhaṃ ṭhānaṃ āgacchanti– sammādiṭṭhiṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati, ye ca micchādiṭṭhī samaṇabrāhmaṇā te bhoto pujjā, te bhoto pāsaṃsā;
translation: 诸比库，若任何沙门、婆罗门认为此大四十法门应受指责、非难，则有十种如法的观点主张使他于现法中至被呵责处：假如尊师呵责正见，则诸邪见的沙门、婆罗门是您敬奉、称赞的。

original: sammāsaṅkappaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati , ye ca micchāsaṅkappā samaṇabrāhmaṇā te bhoto pujjā, te bhoto pāsaṃsā;
translation: 假如尊师呵责正思惟，则诸邪思惟的沙门、婆罗门是您敬奉、称赞的。

original: sammāvācaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… pe… sammākammantaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… sammāājīvaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… sammāvāyāmaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… sammāsatiṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… sammāsamādhiṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati… sammāñāṇaṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati … sammāvimuttiṃ ce bhavaṃ garahati, ye ca micchāvimuttī samaṇabrāhmaṇā te bhoto pujjā, te bhoto pāsaṃsā.
translation: 假如尊师呵责正语……假如尊师呵责正业……假如尊师呵责正命……假如尊师呵责正精进……假如尊师呵责正念……假如尊师呵责正定……假如尊师呵责正智……假如尊师呵责正解脱，则诸邪解脱的沙门、婆罗门是您敬奉、称赞的。

original: Yo koci, bhikkhave, samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā imaṃ mahācattārīsakaṃ dhammapariyāyaṃ garahitabbaṃ paṭikkositabbaṃ maññeyya tassa diṭṭheva dhamme ime dasasahadhammikā vādānuvādā gārayhaṃ ṭhānaṃ āgacchanti.
translation: 诸比库，若任何沙门、婆罗门认为此大四十法门应受指责、非难，则有这十种如法的观点主张使他于现法中至被呵责处。

original: Yepi te, bhikkhave, ahesuṃ okkalā vassabhaññā[ vayabhiññā( ka.) saṃ. ni.3.62; a. ni.4.30 passitabbaṃ] ahetuvādā akiriyavādā natthikavādā tepi mahācattārīsakaṃ dhammapariyāyaṃ na garahitabbaṃ napaṭikkositabbaṃ amaññiṃsu[ maññeyyuṃ( ka.)].
translation: 诸比库，即使那欧格喇的瓦思和槃雅持无因见、无作见和虚无见，他们也认为大四十法门不应受指责、非难。

original: Taṃ kissa hetu?
translation: 那是何因呢？

original: Nindābyārosaupārambhabhayā’’ ti.
translation: 害怕被诘难、攻讦、谴责。”

original: Idamavoca bhagavā.
translation: 跋葛瓦如此说。

original: Attamanā te bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandunti.
translation: 那些比库满意与欢喜跋葛瓦之所说。

original: Mahācattārīsakasuttaṃ niṭṭhitaṃ sattamaṃ.
translation: ——大四十经结束——

original: 3 . Acchariyaabbhutasuttaṃ
translation: 3.稀有未曾有经

original: 197. Evaṃ me sutaṃ– ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṃ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
translation: 197.如是我闻：一时，世尊住在尽有城城胜利林给孤独园。

original: Atha kho sambahulānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ pacchābhattaṃ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantānaṃ upaṭṭhānasālāyaṃ sannisinnānaṃ sannipatitānaṃ ayamantarākathā udapādi–
translation: 那个时候，许多比库饭后从托钵集食处返回，在集会堂中共座集会，他们于交谈间隙有了这段谈话：

original: ‘‘ acchariyaṃ, āvuso, abbhutaṃ, āvuso, tathāgatassa mahiddhikatā mahānubhāvatā, yatra hi nāma tathāgato atīte buddhe parinibbute chinnapapañce chinnavaṭume pariyādinnavaṭṭe sabbadukkhavītivatte jānissati[ anussarissati jānissati( ka.)]–
translation: “如来的大神力、大威力真是稀有啊，贤友们！真是未曾有啊，贤友们！正因如来了知已般涅槃、断除戏论、断除[爱]途、止息轮回、超越一切苦的过去诸佛：

original: ‘ evaṃjaccā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃnāmā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃgottā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃsīlā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃdhammā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃpaññā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃvihārī te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipi,‘ evaṃvimuttā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ’ itipī’’ ti!
translation: “那些世尊有如此之生”，“那些世尊有如此之名”，“那些世尊有如此之姓”，“那些世尊有如此之法”，“那些世尊有如此之慧”，“那些世尊有如此之住”，“那些世尊有如此之解脱”。

original: Evaṃ vutte, āyasmā ānando te bhikkhū etadavoca–
translation: 当如是说时，具寿阿难如此对那些比库说：

original: ‘‘ acchariyā ceva, āvuso, tathāgatā acchariyadhammasamannāgatā ca;
translation: “贤友们，如来不仅稀有，更具足稀有之法；

original: abbhutā ceva, āvuso, tathāgatā abbhutadhammasamannāgatā cā’’ ti.
translation: 贤友们，如来不仅未曾有，更具足未曾有法。”

original: Ayañca hidaṃ tesaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ antarākathā vippakatā hoti.
translation: 这即是那些比库于交谈间隙中断的谈话。

original: 198. Atha kho bhagavā sāyanhasamayaṃ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito yenupaṭṭhānasālā tenupasaṅkami;
translation: 198.那个时候，世尊从禅坐中出定，前往集会堂。

original: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi .
translation: 抵达后，坐于备好的座位。

original: Nisajja kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi–
translation: 坐下后，世尊对比库们说：

original: ‘‘ kāya nuttha, bhikkhave, etarahi kathāya sannisinnā, kā ca pana vo antarākathā vippakatā’’ ti?
translation: “诸比库，你们现在以何话题共座，你们于交谈间歇所中断的谈话又是什么？”

original: ‘‘ Idha, bhante, amhākaṃ pacchābhattaṃ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantānaṃ upaṭṭhānasālāyaṃ sannisinnānaṃ sannipatitānaṃ ayamantarākathā udapādi–
translation: “尊者，于此，饭后从托钵集食处返回，于集会堂中共座集会的我们，在交谈间隙产生了这段谈话：

original: ‘ acchariyaṃ, āvuso, abbhutaṃ, āvuso, tathāgatassa mahiddhikatā mahānubhāvatā, yatra hi nāma tathāgato atīte buddhe parinibbute chinnapapañce chinnavaṭume pariyādinnavaṭṭe sabbadukkhavītivatte jānissati– evaṃjaccā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ itipi, evaṃnāmā… evaṃgottā… evaṃsīlā… evaṃdhammā.
translation: “稀有啊，贤友们！未曾有啊，贤友们！之所以如来有大神力、大威力，正因如来了知已般涅槃、断除戏论、断除[爱]途、止息轮回、超越一切苦的过去诸佛：“那些世尊有如此之生”，“那些世尊有如此之名”，“那些世尊有如此之姓”，“那些世尊有如此之法”，

original: evaṃpaññā… evaṃvihārī… evaṃvimuttā te bhagavanto ahesuṃ itipī’ ti!
translation: “那些世尊有如此之慧”，“那些世尊有如此之住”，“那些世尊有如此之解脱”。

original: Evaṃ vutte, bhante, āyasmā ānando amhe etadavoca–
translation: 当如是说时，具寿阿难如此对那些比库说：

original: ‘ acchariyā ceva, āvuso, tathāgatā acchariyadhammasamannāgatā ca, abbhutā ceva, āvuso, tathāgatā abbhutadhammasamannāgatā cā’ ti.
translation: “贤友们，如来不仅稀有，更具足稀有之法；贤友们，如来不仅未曾有，更具足未曾有法。”

original: Ayaṃ kho no, bhante, antarākathā vippakatā;
translation: 尊者，这是我们在交谈间隙所中断的话题。

original: atha bhagavā anuppatto’’ ti.
translation: 当时，世尊已抵达。”

original: 199. Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ āmantesi–
translation: 199.那个时候，世尊对具寿阿难说：

original: ‘‘ tasmātiha taṃ, ānanda, bhiyyosomattāya paṭibhantu tathāgatassa acchariyā abbhutadhammā’’ ti[ abbhutā dhammāti(?)].
translation: “既然如此，阿难，你来进一步阐明如来的稀有、未曾有法吧！”

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ sato sampajāno, ānanda, bodhisatto tusitaṃ kāyaṃ upapajjī’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，菩萨念与正知而投生喜足天之身。’

original: Yampi, bhante, sato sampajāno bodhisatto tusitaṃ kāyaṃ upapajji idaṃpāhaṃ , bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：尊者，菩萨念与正知而投生喜足天的身体。

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ sato sampajāno, ānanda, bodhisatto tusite kāye aṭṭhāsī’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，菩萨念与正知而住于喜足天的身体。’

original: Yampi, bhante, sato sampajāno bodhisatto tusite kāye aṭṭhāsi idaṃpāhaṃ[ idaṃpahaṃ( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.)], bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：尊者，菩萨念与正知而住于喜足天的身体。

original: 200.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 200.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yāvatāyukaṃ, ānanda, bodhisatto tusite kāye aṭṭhāsī’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，菩萨于喜足天的身体中住满[天]寿。’

original: Yampi, bhante, yāvatāyukaṃ bodhisatto tusite kāye aṭṭhāsi idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：尊者，菩萨于喜足天的身体中住满[天]寿。

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ sato sampajāno, ānanda, bodhisatto tusitā, kāyā cavitvā mātukucchiṃ okkamī’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，菩萨念与正知而从喜足天的身体死去后进入母胎。’

original: Yampi, bhante , sato sampajāno bodhisatto tusitā kāyā cavitvā mātukucchiṃ okkami idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：尊者，菩萨以念与正知而从喜足天的身体死去后进入母胎。

original: 201.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 201.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto tusitā kāyā cavitvā mātukucchiṃ okkamati, atha sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya appamāṇo uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvaṃ.
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨从喜足天的身体死去后进入母胎时，当时，于有诸天、魔、梵天的世间，有沙门、婆罗门、王与人的人间中，无量、广大的光芒超越了天神的天威而显现于世间。

original: Yāpi tā lokantarikā aghā asaṃvutā andhakārā andhakāratimisā, yatthapime candimasūriyā evaṃmahiddhikā evaṃmahānubhāvā ābhāya nānubhonti tatthapi appamāṇo uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvaṃ.
translation: 有那敞开、无底、黑暗、幽暗的诸世界中间[地狱]。连这如此大神力、如此大威力的日月都不能以光芒照耀该处。在那里，无量、广大的光芒也超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。

original: Yepi tattha sattā upapannā tepi tenobhāsena aññamaññaṃ sañjānanti– aññepi kira, bho, santi sattā idhūpapannāti.
translation: 投生于该处的那些有情也借助那光明知道彼此：“诸君，竟有其他有情也投生于此。”

original: Ayañca dasasahassī lokadhātu saṅkampati sampakampati sampavedhati appamāṇo ca uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvan’ ti.
translation: 这一万个世间界摇动、晃动、震动，无量、广大的光明超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为跋葛瓦的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨从喜足天的身体死去后进入母胎时，当时，于有诸天、魔、梵天的世间，有沙门、婆罗门、王与人的人间中，无量、广大的光芒超越了天神的天威而显现于世间。有那敞开、无底、黑暗、幽暗的诸世界中间[地狱]。连这如此大神力、如此大威力的日月都不能以光芒照耀该处。在那里，无量、广大的光芒也超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。投生于该处的那些有情也借助那光明知道彼此：“诸君，竟有其他有情也投生于此。”这一万个世间界摇动、晃动、震动，无量、广大的光明超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。’

original: 202.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 202.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti, cattāro devaputtā catuddisaṃ ārakkhāya upagacchanti– mā naṃ bodhisattaṃ vā bodhisattamātaraṃ vā manusso vā amanusso vā koci vā viheṭhesī’ ti.
translation: “阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，四位天子前来守护四方：‘人、非人或任何人都不要伤害菩萨和菩萨的母亲。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨进入母胎时，四位天子前来守护四方：‘人、非人或任何人都不要伤害菩萨和菩萨的母亲。’

original: 203.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 203.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti, pakatiyā sīlavatī bodhisattamātā hoti viratā pāṇātipātā viratā adinnādānā viratā kāmesumicchācārā viratā musāvādā viratā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā’ ti.
translation: “阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲自然成为持戒者，离杀生、离不与取、离欲邪行、离虚妄语、离放逸之因的诸酒类。”

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲自然成为持戒者，离杀生、离不与取、离欲邪行、离虚妄语、离放逸之因的诸酒类。”

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā , ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti, na bodhisattamātu purisesu mānasaṃ uppajjati kāmaguṇūpasaṃhitaṃ, anatikkamanīyā ca bodhisattamātā hoti kenaci purisena rattacittenā’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲不会对男人生起具爱欲之心，菩萨的母亲不会被任何有染心的男人所征服。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲不会对男人生起具爱欲之心，菩萨的母亲不被任何有染心的男人所征服。’

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti, lābhinī bodhisattamātā hoti pañcannaṃ kāmaguṇānaṃ.
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲是获得五种妙欲者。

original: Sā pañcahi kāmaguṇehi samappitā samaṅgībhūtā paricāretī’ ti.
translation: 她拥有、具足、享用五种妙欲。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨进入母胎时，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲是获得五种妙欲者。她拥有、具足、享用五种妙欲。’

original: 204.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 204.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti, na bodhisattamātu kocideva ābādho uppajjati;
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲不会罹患任何疾病。

original: sukhinī bodhisattamātā hoti akilantakāyā;
translation: 菩萨的母亲不疲累并且快乐。

original: bodhisattañca bodhisattamātā tirokucchigataṃ passati sabbaṅgapaccaṅgaṃ ahīnindriyaṃ.
translation: 菩萨的母亲看见腹中菩萨的大小肢体及诸根无缺。

original: Seyyathāpi, ānanda, maṇi veḷuriyo subho jātimā aṭṭhaṃso suparikammakato.
translation: 阿难，正如美妙、纯净、八面、打磨光滑的琉璃宝珠。

original: Tatrāssa suttaṃ āvutaṃ nīlaṃ vā pītaṃ vā lohitaṃ vā odātaṃ vā paṇḍusuttaṃ vā.
translation: 其中穿有青线、黄线、红线、白线或橙线。

original: Tamenaṃ cakkhumā puriso hatthe karitvā paccavekkheyya– ayaṃ kho maṇi veḷuriyo subho jātimā aṭṭhaṃso suparikammakato, tatridaṃ suttaṃ āvutaṃ nīlaṃ vā pītaṃ vā lohitaṃ vā odātaṃ vā paṇḍusuttaṃ vāti.
translation: 具眼之人将其放在手中——‘这确实是颗美妙、纯净、八面、打磨光滑的琉璃宝珠，其中穿有青线、黄线、红线、白线或橙线。’

original: Evameva kho, ānanda, yadā bodhisatto mātukucchiṃ okkanto hoti , na bodhisattamātu kocideva ābādho uppajjati;
translation: 同样地，阿难，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲不会罹患任何疾病。

original: sukhinī bodhisattamātā hoti akilantakāyā;
translation: 菩萨的母亲不疲累并且快乐。

original: bodhisattañca bodhisattamātā tirokucchigataṃ passati sabbaṅgapaccaṅgaṃ ahīnindriyan’ ti.
translation: 菩萨的母亲看见腹中菩萨的大小肢体及诸根无缺。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨进入母胎时，菩萨的母亲不会罹患任何疾病。菩萨的母亲不疲累并且快乐。菩萨的母亲看见腹中菩萨的大小肢体及诸根无缺。’……

original: 205.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 205.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ sattāhajāte, ānanda, bodhisatte bodhisattamātā kālaṃ karoti, tusitaṃ kāyaṃ upapajjatī’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨出生七天时，菩萨的母亲去世并投生喜足天的身体。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨出生七天时，菩萨的母亲去世并投生喜足天的身体。“

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yathā kho panānanda, aññā itthikā nava vā dasa vā māse gabbhaṃ kucchinā pariharitvā vijāyanti, na hevaṃ bodhisattaṃ bodhisattamātā vijāyati.
translation: ‘阿难，正如其他女人腹中怀胎九月或十月之后分娩，菩萨的母亲却不会如此产下菩萨。

original: Daseva māsāni bodhisattaṃ bodhisattamātā kucchinā pariharitvā vijāyatī’ ti.
translation: 菩萨的母亲腹中怀着菩萨整整十个月后才分娩。”

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，正如其他女人腹中怀胎九月或十月之后分娩，菩萨的母亲却不会如此产下菩萨。菩萨的母亲腹中怀着菩萨整整十个月后才分娩。”

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yathā kho panānanda, aññā itthikā nisinnā vā nipannā vā vijāyanti, na hevaṃ bodhisattaṃ bodhisattamātā vijāyati.
translation: ‘阿难，正如其他女人坐着或躺着分娩，菩萨的母亲却不会如此产下菩萨。

original: Ṭhitāva bodhisattaṃ bodhisattamātā vijāyatī’ ti.
translation: 菩萨的母亲只会站着分娩。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，正如其他女人坐着或躺着分娩，菩萨的母亲却不会如此产下菩萨。菩萨的母亲只会站着分娩。’

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā , ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, devā naṃ paṭhamaṃ paṭiggaṇhanti pacchā manussā’ ti.
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨出母胎时，天人先接住他，之后人类才[接住]。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，当菩萨出母胎时，天人先接住他，之后人类才[接住]。’’

original: 206.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 206.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, appattova bodhisatto pathaviṃ hoti, cattāro naṃ devaputtā paṭiggahetvā mātu purato ṭhapenti– attamanā, devi, hohi;
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨出母胎时，菩萨尚未落在地上，四位天子就接住他，放在母亲前面[说]“欢喜满足吧，王后！

original: mahesakkho te putto uppanno’ ti.
translation: 您大威势的儿子降生了。”

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，当菩萨出母胎时，菩萨尚未落在地上，四位天子就接住他，放在母亲前面[说]“欢喜满足吧，王后！您大威势的儿子降生了。”

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, visadova nikkhamati amakkhito udena[ uddena( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.)] amakkhito semhena amakkhito ruhirena amakkhito kenaci asucinā suddho visado[ visuddho( syā.)].
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨出母胎时，不为水所沾染，不为粘液所沾染，不为血所沾染，不为任何不净所沾染，只是清净、纯净、洁净地出来。

original: Seyyathāpi, ānanda, maṇiratanaṃ kāsike vatthe nikkhittaṃ neva maṇiratanaṃ kāsikaṃ vatthaṃ makkheti nāpi kāsikaṃ vatthaṃ maṇiratanaṃ makkheti.
translation: 阿难，正如将摩尼宝放于咖西国的布上时，宝珠不会沾染咖西国的布，咖西国的布也不会沾染摩尼宝。

original: Taṃ kissa hetu?
translation: 那是什么原因呢？

original: Ubhinnaṃ suddhattā.
translation: 二者都洁净。

original: Evameva kho, ānanda, yadā bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, visadova nikkhamati amakkhito udena amakkhito semhena amakkhito ruhirena amakkhito kenaci asucinā suddho visado’ ti.
translation: 同样地，阿难，当当菩萨出母胎时，不为水所沾染，不为粘液所沾染，不为血所沾染，不为任何不净所沾染，只是清净、纯净、洁净地出来。

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，当菩萨出母胎时，不为水所沾染，不为粘液所沾染，不为血所沾染，不为任何不净所沾染，只是清净、纯净、洁净地出来。……

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, dve udakassa dhārā antalikkhā pātubhavanti– ekā sītassa, ekā uṇhassa;
translation: ‘阿难，当菩萨出母胎时，一冷、一热——两股水流凭空而降。

original: yena bodhisattassa udakakiccaṃ karonti mātu cā’ ti.
translation: 以此冲洗菩萨及其母亲。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，当菩萨出母胎时，一冷、一热——两股水流凭空而降。以此冲洗菩萨及其母亲。’

original: 207.‘‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: 207.“尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ sampatijāto, ānanda, bodhisatto samehi pādehi pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhahitvā uttarābhimukho sattapadavītihārena gacchati, setamhi chatte anudhāriyamāne, sabbā ca disā viloketi, āsabhiñca vācaṃ bhāsati– aggohamasmi lokassa, jeṭṭhohamasmi lokassa, seṭṭhohamasmi lokassa.
translation: ‘阿难，刚刚出生的菩萨以平整的双足站立于大地，向北交错行走七步。当撑起白伞盖时，他环顾一切诸方，发出至上之语：“我是世间最上者，我是世间最高者，我是世间最胜者。

original: Ayamantimā jāti , natthi dāni punabbhavo’ ti.
translation: 这是最后生，今后已无再生。”

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremi.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为世尊的稀有、未曾有法：‘尊者，刚刚出生的菩萨以平整的双足站立于大地，向北交错行走七步。当撑起白伞盖时，他环顾一切诸方，发出至上之语：“我是世间最上者，我是世间最高者，我是世间最胜者。这是最后生，今后已无再生。”’

original: ‘ ‘ Sammukhā metaṃ, bhante, bhagavato sutaṃ, sammukhā paṭiggahitaṃ–
translation: “尊者，我曾当面从世尊那里如此听闻，当面[从世尊那里]如此领受：

original: ‘ yadā, ānanda, bodhisatto mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, atha sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya appamāṇo uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvaṃ.
translation: 阿难，当菩萨出母胎时，当时，于有诸天、魔、梵天的世间，有沙门、婆罗门、王与人的人间中，无量、广大的光芒超越了天神的天威而显现于世间。

original: Yāpi tā lokantarikā aghā asaṃvutā andhakārā andhakāratimisā yatthapime candimasūriyā evaṃmahiddhikā evaṃmahānubhāvā ābhāya nānubhonti tatthapi appamāṇo uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvaṃ.
translation: 有那敞开、无底、黑暗、幽暗的诸世界中间[地狱]。连这如此大神力、如此大威力的日月都不能以光芒照耀该处。在那里，无量、广大的光芒也超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。

original: Yepi tattha sattā upapannā tepi tenobhāsena aññamaññaṃ sañjānanti– aññepi kira, bho, santi sattā idhūpapannāti.
translation: 投生于该处的那些有情也借助那光明知道彼此：“诸君，竟有其他有情也投生于此。”

original: Ayañca dasasahassī lokadhātu saṅkampati sampakampati sampavedhati, appamāṇo ca uḷāro obhāso loke pātubhavati atikkammeva devānaṃ devānubhāvan’ ti.
translation: 这一万个世间界摇动、晃动、震动，无量、广大的光明超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。’

original: Yampi, bhante… pe… idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremī’’ ti.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为跋葛瓦的稀有、未曾有法：“尊者，当菩萨出母胎时，当时，于有诸天、魔、梵天的世间，有沙门、婆罗门、王与人的人间中，无量、广大的光芒超越了天神的天威而显现于世间。有那敞开、无底、黑暗、幽暗的诸世界中间[地狱]。连这如此大神力、如此大威力的日月都不能以光芒照耀该处。在那里，无量、广大的光芒也超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。投生于该处的那些有情也借助那光明知道彼此：“诸君，竟有其他有情也投生于此。”这一万个世间界摇动、晃动、震动，无量、广大的光明超越诸天的天威而显现于世间。’

original: 208.‘‘ Tasmātiha tvaṃ, ānanda, idampi tathāgatassa acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhārehi.
translation: 208.“所以，阿难，于此，你要忆持这也是如来的稀有、未曾有法。

original: Idhānanda, tathāgatassa viditā vedanā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṃ gacchanti;
translation: 阿难，于此，如来的[心中]受被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。

original: viditā saññā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṃ gacchanti;
translation: 想被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。

original: viditā vitakkā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṃ gacchanti.
translation: 寻被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。

original: Idampi kho, tvaṃ, ānanda, tathāgatassa acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhārehī’’ ti.
translation: 阿难，你要将此也忆持为如来的稀有、未曾有法。”

original: ‘‘ Yampi, bhante, bhagavato viditā vedanā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṃ gacchanti;
translation: “尊者，如来的[心中]受被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。

original: viditā saññā… viditā vitakkā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṃ gacchanti.
translation: 想被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。寻被了知而生起，被了知而存续，被了知而灭没。

original: Idaṃpāhaṃ, bhante, bhagavato acchariyaṃ abbhutadhammaṃ dhāremī’’ ti.
translation: 尊者，我也将此忆持为如来的稀有、未曾有法。”

original: Idamavoca āyasmā ānando.
translation: 具寿阿难如此说。

original: Samanuñño satthā ahosi;
translation: 导师认可。

original: attamanā ca te bhikkhū āyasmato ānandassa bhāsitaṃ abhinandunti.
translation: 那些满意的比库欢喜具寿阿难之所说。

original: Acchariyaabbhutasuttaṃ niṭṭhitaṃ tatiyaṃ.
translation: 第三、稀有未曾有法经结束

original: 1 . Bhaddekarattasuttaṃ
translation: 一夜贤者经

original: 272. Evaṃ me sutaṃ– ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṃ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
translation: 如是我闻：一时，跋葛瓦住在沙瓦提城揭德林给孤独园。

original: Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi–
translation: 于其处，跋葛瓦称呼比库们:

original: ‘‘ bhikkhavo’’ ti.
translation: “诸比库。”

original: ‘‘ Bhadante’’ ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ.
translation: 那些比库回答跋葛瓦:“尊者。”

original: Bhagavā etadavoca–
translation: 跋葛瓦如此说：

original: ‘‘ bhaddekarattassa vo, bhikkhave, uddesañca vibhaṅgañca desessāmi.
translation: “诸比库，我将为你们宣说一夜贤者的总说与分别。

original: Taṃ suṇātha, sādhukaṃ manasi karotha;
translation: 谛听，善作意之！

original: bhāsissāmī’’ ti.
translation: 我要说了！”

original: ‘‘ Evaṃ, bhante’’ ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ.
translation: 那些比库回答跋葛瓦:“是的，尊者。”

original: Bhagavā etadavoca–
translation: 跋葛瓦如此说：

original: ‘ ‘ Atītaṃ nānvāgameyya, nappaṭikaṅkhe anāgataṃ;
translation:
“不追忆过去，
不期待未来；

original: Yadatītaṃ pahīnaṃ taṃ, appattañca anāgataṃ.
translation:
过去已过去，
未来未到来；

original: ‘ ‘ Paccuppannañca yo[ yaṃ( nettipāḷi)] dhammaṃ, tattha tattha vipassati;
translation:
对现在之法，
当处即观照。

original: Asaṃhīraṃ [ asaṃhiraṃ( syā. kaṃ. ka.)] asaṃkuppaṃ, taṃ vidvā manubrūhaye.
translation:
智者增修彼，
不羁.不动摇。

original: ‘ ‘ Ajjeva kiccamātappaṃ[ kiccaṃ ātappaṃ( sī. ka.)], ko jaññā maraṇaṃ suve;
translation:
热忱今日事，
谁知明日死？

original: Na hi no saṅgaraṃ tena, mahāsenena maccunā.
translation:
绝没有不与
死大军相约！

original: ‘ ‘ Evaṃ vihāriṃ ātāpiṃ, ahorattamatanditaṃ;
translation:
如此热忱住，
日夜不懈惰；

original: 273.‘‘ Kathañca , bhikkhave, atītaṃ anvāgameti?
translation: 诸比库，如何是追忆过去呢？

original: ‘ Evaṃrūpo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti,‘ evaṃvedano ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti,‘ evaṃsañño ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti,‘ evaṃsaṅkhāro ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti,‘ evaṃviññāṇo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, atītaṃ anvāgameti.
translation: 追忆‘过去世有如此之色’而喜欢其处；追忆‘过去世有如此之受’而喜欢其处；追忆‘过去世有如此之想’而喜欢其处；追忆‘过去世有如此之行’而喜欢其处；追忆‘过去世有如此之识’而喜欢其处。诸比库，这就是追忆过去。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, atītaṃ nānvāgameti?
translation: 诸比库，如何是不追忆过去呢？

original: ‘ Evaṃrūpo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti,‘ evaṃvedano ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti,‘ evaṃsañño ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti,‘ evaṃsaṅkhāro ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti,‘ evaṃviññāṇo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, atītaṃ nānvāgameti.
translation: 不追忆‘过去世有如此之色’而喜欢其处；不追忆‘过去世有如此之受’而喜欢其处；不追忆‘过去世有如此之想’而喜欢其处；不追忆‘过去世有如此之行’而喜欢其处；不追忆‘过去世有如此之识’而喜欢其处。诸比库，这就是不追忆过去。

original: 274.‘‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, anāgataṃ paṭikaṅkhati?
translation: 诸比库，如何是期待未来呢？

original: ‘ Evaṃrūpo siyaṃ anāgatamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti, evaṃvedano siyaṃ… pe… evaṃsañño siyaṃ… evaṃsaṅkhāro siyaṃ… evaṃviññāṇo siyaṃ anāgatamaddhānanti tattha nandiṃ samanvāneti– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, anāgataṃ paṭikaṅkhati.
translation: 追求‘愿未来世有如此之色’而喜欢其处；追求‘愿未来世有如此之受’……‘愿未来世有如此之想’……‘愿未来世有如此之行’……追求‘愿未来世有如此之识’而喜欢其处。诸比库，这就是期待未来。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, anāgataṃ nappaṭikaṅkhati?
translation: 诸比库，如何是不期待未来呢？

original: ‘ Evaṃrūpo siyaṃ anāgatamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti, evaṃvedano siyaṃ … evaṃsañño siyaṃ… evaṃsaṅkhāro siyaṃ…‘ evaṃviññāṇo siyaṃ anāgatamaddhānan’ ti tattha nandiṃ na samanvāneti– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, anāgataṃ nappaṭikaṅkhati.
translation: 不追求‘愿未来世有如此之色’而喜欢其处；不追求‘愿未来世有如此之受’……‘愿未来世有如此之想’……‘愿未来世有如此之行’……不追求‘愿未来世有如此之识’而喜欢其处。诸比库，这就是不期待未来。

original: 275.‘‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, paccuppannesu dhammesu saṃhīrati?
translation: 诸比库，如何是受现在诸法牵制呢？

original: Idha, bhikkhave, assutavā puthujjano ariyānaṃ adassāvī ariyadhammassa akovido ariyadhamme avinīto sappurisānaṃ adassāvī sappurisadhammassa akovido sappurisadhamme avinīto rūpaṃ attato samanupassati, rūpavantaṃ vā attānaṃ, attani vā rūpaṃ, rūpasmiṃ vā attānaṃ;
translation: 诸比库，在此，无闻凡夫不见诸圣者、对圣法不熟知、不受圣法训导，不见诸善士、对善士法不熟知、不受善士法训导，认为色是我的，或我为色所有，或我中有色，或色中有我；

original: vedanaṃ… pe… saññaṃ… saṅkhāre… viññāṇaṃ attato samanupassati, viññāṇavantaṃ vā attānaṃ attani vā viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇasmiṃ vā attānaṃ– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, paccuppannesu dhammesu saṃhīrati.
translation: 受……想……诸行……认为识是我的，或我为识所有，或我中有识，或识中有我。诸比库，这样就受现在诸法牵制。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca , bhikkhave, paccuppannesu dhammesu na saṃhīrati?
translation: 诸比库，如何是不受现在诸法牵制呢？

original: Idha, bhikkhave, sutavā ariyasāvako ariyānaṃ dassāvī ariyadhammassa kovido ariyadhamme suvinīto sappurisānaṃ dassāvī sappurisadhammassa kovido sappurisadhamme suvinīto na rūpaṃ attato samanupassati, na rūpavantaṃ vā attānaṃ, na attani vā rūpaṃ, na rūpasmiṃ vā attānaṃ;
translation: 诸比库，在此，多闻圣弟子见诸圣者、熟知圣法、受圣法训导，见诸善士、熟知善士法、受善士法训导，不认为色是我的，或我为色所有，或我中有色，或色中有我；

original: na vedanaṃ… na saññaṃ… na saṅkhāre… na viññāṇaṃ attato samanupassati, na viññāṇavantaṃ vā attānaṃ, na attani vā viññāṇaṃ, na viññāṇasmiṃ vā attānaṃ– evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, paccuppannesu dhammesu na saṃhīrati.
translation: 受……想……诸行……不认为识是我的，或我为识所有，或我中有识，或识中有我。诸比库，这样就不受现在诸法牵制。

original: ‘ ‘ Atītaṃ nānvāgameyya, nappaṭikaṅkhe anāgataṃ;
translation:
不追忆过去，
不期待未来；

original: Yadatītaṃ pahīnaṃ taṃ, appattañca anāgataṃ.
translation:
过去已过去，
未来未到来；

original: ‘ ‘ Paccuppannañca yo dhammaṃ, tattha tattha vipassati;
translation:
对现在之法，
当处即观照。

original: Asaṃhīraṃ asaṃkuppaṃ, taṃ vidvā manubrūhaye.
translation:
智者增修彼，
不羁.不动摇。

original: ‘ ‘ Ajjeva kiccamātappaṃ, ko jaññā maraṇaṃ suve;
translation:
热忱今日事，
谁知明日死？

original: Na hi no saṅgaraṃ tena, mahāsenena maccunā.
translation:
绝没有不与
死大军相约！

original: ‘ ‘ Evaṃ vihāriṃ ātāpiṃ, ahorattamatanditaṃ;
translation:
如此热忱住，
日夜不懈惰；

original: Taṃ ve bhaddekarattoti, santo ācikkhate munī’’ ti.
translation:
此一夜贤者，
寂静牟尼说。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Bhaddekarattassa vo, bhikkhave, uddesañca vibhaṅgañca desessāmī’ ti– iti yaṃ taṃ vuttaṃ idametaṃ paṭicca vuttan’’ ti.
translation: 正如所说的:‘诸比库，我将为你们宣说一夜贤者的总说与分别。’乃缘于此而说。”

original: Idamavoca bhagavā.
translation: 跋葛瓦如此说。

original: Attamanā te bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandunti.
translation: 那些比库满意与欢喜跋葛瓦之所说。

original: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami;
translation: 马哈咖沙巴(Mahākassapa)来到世尊之处。

original: upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekamantaṃ nisīdi.
translation: 来到后顶礼世尊，然后坐在一边。

original: Ekamantaṃ nisinno kho āyasmā mahākassapo bhagavantaṃ etadavoca–
translation: 坐在一边的马哈咖沙巴这样问世尊:

original: ‘‘ ko nu kho, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yena pubbe appatarāni ceva sikkhāpadāni ahesuṃ bahutarā ca bhikkhū aññāya saṇṭhahiṃsu?
translation: “尊者，是何因、何缘以前很少学处，却有很多比库确立证知;

original: Ko pana, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yenetarahi bahutarāni ceva sikkhāpadāni appatarā ca bhikkhū aññāya saṇṭhahantī’’ ti?
translation: 尊者又是何因、何缘现在有很多学处，却很少比库确立证知。”

original: ‘‘ Evañcetaṃ, kassapa, hoti sattesu hāyamānesu saddhamme antaradhāyamāne, bahutarāni ceva sikkhāpadāni honti appatarā ca bhikkhū aññāya saṇṭhahanti.
translation: “咖沙巴，是这样的，有情堕落、正法殒没时，有很多学处却很少比库能确立证知;

original: Na tāva, kassapa, saddhammassa antaradhānaṃ hoti yāva na saddhammappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati.
translation: 咖沙巴，只要相似正法还没有出现于世间，正法就不会殒没；

original: Yato ca kho, kassapa, saddhammappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati, atha saddhammassa antaradhānaṃ hoti’’.
translation: 咖沙巴，只有相似正法出现于世间，正法才殒没。”

original: ‘ ‘ Seyyathāpi, kassapa, na tāva jātarūpassa antaradhānaṃ hoti yāva na jātarūpappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati.
translation: “咖沙巴，犹如伪金还没有出现于世间，金就不会殒没；

original: Yato ca kho, kassapa, jātarūpappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati, atha jātarūpassa antaradhānaṃ hoti.
translation: 咖沙巴，只有伪金出现于世间，金才殒没。

original: Evameva kho, kassapa, na tāva saddhammassa antaradhānaṃ hoti yāva na saddhammappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati.
translation: 同样的，咖沙巴，只要相似正法还没有出现于世间，正法就不会殒没；

original: Yato ca kho, kassapa, saddhammappatirūpakaṃ loke uppajjati, atha saddhammassa antaradhānaṃ hoti.
translation: 咖沙巴，只有相似正法出现于世间，正法才殒没。

original: ‘ Ahaṃ rūpaṃ, mama rūpan’ ti pariyuṭṭhaṭṭhāyī hoti.
translation: （该凡夫）是被‘色是我，色是我的（东西）’（的见）困扰的而住者。

original: Tassa‘ ahaṃ rūpaṃ, mama rūpan’ ti pariyuṭṭhaṭṭhāyino taṃ rūpaṃ vipariṇamati aññathā hoti.
translation: 该凡夫所错误执取的色被颠倒了/是颠倒的，且（与色的变坏性的事实）相悖。

original: Tassa rūpavipariṇāmaññathābhāvā uppajjanti sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsā.
translation: 由于其对色的颠倒且（与色法变坏的事实）相悖的缘故，愁悲(sokaparideva)、苦、忧心、恼生起。

original: ‘‘ samādhiṃ, bhikkhave, bhāvetha;
translation: 比库们，你们要修定；

original: ‘ ‘ Tasmātiha, bhikkhave, yaṃ kiñci rūpaṃ atītānāgatapaccuppannaṃ ajjhattaṃ vā bahiddhā vā oḷārikaṃ vā sukhumaṃ vā hīnaṃ vā paṇītaṃ vā yaṃ dūre santike vā, sabbaṃ rūpaṃ–
translation: 因此，比库们，任何色，无论是过去、现在、未来、内、外、粗、细、劣、胜，还是远、近，一切色

original: ‘ netaṃ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ ti evametaṃ yathābhūtaṃ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṃ.
translation: 应当这样以正慧如实观察——“这不是我的, 这不是我, 这不是我的自我”。

original: Yā kāci vedanā atītānāgatapaccuppannā ajjhattā vā bahiddhā vā… pe… yā dūre santike vā, sabbā vedanā–
translation: 任何受，无论是过去、现在、未来、内、外、粗、细、劣、胜，还是远、近，一切受

original: ‘ netaṃ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ ti evametaṃ yathābhūtaṃ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṃ.
translation: 应当这样以正慧如实观察——“这不是我的, 这不是我, 这不是我的自我”。

original: ‘ ‘ Yā kāci saññā… pe… ye keci saṅkhārā atītānāgatapaccuppannā ajjhattaṃ vā bahiddhā vā… pe… ye dūre santike vā, sabbe saṅkhārā–
translation: 任何标记，无论是过去、现在、未来、内、外、粗、细、劣、胜，还是远、近，一切标记

original: ‘ netaṃ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ ti evametaṃ yathābhūtaṃ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṃ.
translation: 应当这样以正慧如实观察——“这不是我的, 这不是我, 这不是我的自我”。

original: ‘ ‘ Yaṃ kiñci viññāṇaṃ atītānāgatapaccuppannaṃ ajjhattaṃ vā bahiddhā vā oḷārikaṃ vā sukhumaṃ vā hīnaṃ vā paṇītaṃ vā yaṃ dūre santike vā, sabbaṃ viññāṇaṃ–
translation: 任何识，无论是过去、现在、未来、内、外、粗、细、劣、胜，还是远、近，一切识

original: ‘ netaṃ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ ti evametaṃ yathābhūtaṃ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṃ.
translation: 应当这样以正慧如实观察——“这不是我的, 这不是我, 这不是我的自我”。

original: ‘ ‘ Evaṃ passaṃ, bhikkhave, sutavā ariyasāvako rūpasmimpi nibbindati, vedanāyapi nibbindati, saññāyapi nibbindati, saṅkhāresupi nibbindati, viññāṇasmimpi nibbindati.
translation: 比库们，当这样观察时，有闻圣弟子倦离于色，倦离于受，倦离于标记，倦离于行，倦离于识。

original: 79. Sāvatthinidānaṃ.
translation: 79.尽有城起源。

original: ‘‘ Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā anekavihitaṃ pubbenivāsaṃ anussaramānā anussaranti sabbete pañcupādānakkhandhe anussaranti etesaṃ vā aññataraṃ.
translation: “比库们，任何的沙门、婆罗门依次忆念多种不同的宿住时为忆念，忆念这全部或部分的五取蕴。

original: Katame pañca?
translation: 哪五种呢？

original: ‘ Evaṃrūpo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti– iti vā hi, bhikkhave, anussaramāno rūpaṃyeva anussarati.
translation: 比库们，当他忆念‘过去时[我]有这样的色’，此时称为[他]只忆念色。

original: ‘ Evaṃvedano ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti– iti vā hi, bhikkhave, anussaramāno vedanaṃyeva anussarati.
translation: 比库们，当他忆念‘过去时[我]有这样的受’，此时称为[他]只忆念受。

original: ‘ Evaṃsañño ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti…‘ evaṃsaṅkhāro ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti…‘ evaṃviññāṇo ahosiṃ atītamaddhānan’ ti– iti vā hi, bhikkhave, anussaramāno viññāṇameva anussarati’’.
translation:
‘过去时[我]有这样的标记’……
‘过去时[我]有这样的行’……
比库们，当他忆念‘过去时[我]有这样的识’，此时称为[他]只忆念识。

original: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, yena rūpe tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya taṃ rūpaṃ tathāgatassa pahīnaṃ ucchinnamūlaṃ tālāvatthukataṃ anabhāvaṅkataṃ āyatiṃ anuppādadhammaṃ.
translation: “同样的，大王！在如来上安立的色已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: ‘ ‘ Yāya vedanāya tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya, sā vedanā tathāgatassa pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṅkatā āyatiṃ anuppādadhammā.
translation: “在如来上安立的受已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: Evameva kho, mahārāja, yena rūpena tathāgataṃ paññāpayamāno paññāpeyya, taṃ rūpaṃ tathāgatassa pahīnaṃ ucchinnamūlaṃ tālāvatthukataṃ anabhāvaṅkataṃ āyatiṃ anuppādadhammaṃ.
translation: “同样的，大王！在如来上安立的色已被舍断，已被去根，成为砍断树冠的棕榈，不会再有，未来不再生之法。

original: 195. Ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe.
translation: 如是我闻：一时，世尊住在王舍城竹林喂松鼠处。

original: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā mahākassapo pippaliguhāyaṃ[ vipphaliguhāyaṃ( sī.)] viharati ābādhiko dukkhito bāḷhagilāno.
translation: 那个时候，大德马哈咖沙巴住在荜拔洞，行动不便、受折磨、病重。

original: Atha kho bhagavā sāyanhasamayaṃ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito yenāyasmā mahākassapo tenupasaṅkami;
translation: 当时，世尊在傍晚时分从禅坐起来，前往大德玛哈卡萨帕之处。

original: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi.
translation: 去到之后，坐在准备好的座位上。

original: Nisajja kho bhagavā āyasmantaṃ mahākassapaṃ etadavoca–
translation: 世尊坐下来对大德玛哈卡萨帕这样说：

original: ‘ ‘ Kacci te, kassapa, khamanīyaṃ kacci yāpanīyaṃ?
translation: “卡萨帕，对你来说[身体]还能撑住吗？[生命]还能维持吗？

original: Kacci dukkhā vedanā paṭikkamanti, no abhikkamanti;
translation: 难受有所缓解吗？没加剧吧？

original: paṭikkamosānaṃ paññāyati, no abhikkamo’’ ti?
translation: 能感觉到好转吗？没发展吗？”

original: ‘‘ Na me, bhante, khamanīyaṃ, na yāpanīyaṃ.
translation: “尊者，我[身体]撑不住了，[生命]维持不了了。

original: Bāḷhā me dukkhā vedanā abhikkamanti, no paṭikkamanti;
translation: 我的难受加剧、严重了，没有缓解；

original: abhikkamosānaṃ paññāyati, no paṭikkamo’’ ti.
translation: 感觉病情发展了，没有好转。 ”

original: ‘ ‘ Sattime, kassapa, bojjhaṅgā mayā sammadakkhātā bhāvitā bahulīkatā abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattanti.
translation: “卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的七觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。

original: Katame satta?
translation: 哪七种呢？

original: Satisambojjhaṅgo kho, kassapa, mayā sammadakkhāto bhāvito bahulīkato abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati… pe… upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo kho, kassapa, mayā sammadakkhāto bhāvito bahulīkato abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati.
translation:
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的念觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的择法觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的精进觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的喜觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的轻安觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的定觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。
卡萨帕，我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的舍觉支导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。

original: Ime kho, kassapa, satta bojjhaṅgā mayā sammadakkhātā bhāvitā bahulīkatā abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattantī’’ ti.
translation: 这就是我所正说的、修习的、反复练习的七觉支，导向彻底的了知、[对四谛的]彻悟与涅槃。”

original: ‘‘ Taggha, bhagavā, bojjhaṅgā;
translation: “世尊，的确是觉支！

original: taggha, sugata, bojjhaṅgā’’ ti.
translation: 善至，的确是觉支！”

original: Idamavoca bhagavā.
translation: 世尊这样说。

original: Attamano āyasmā mahākassapo bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandi.
translation: 大德玛哈卡萨帕满心欢喜并随喜接受世尊之所说。

original: Vuṭṭhahi cāyasmā mahākassapo tamhā ābādhā.
translation: 大德玛哈卡萨帕从疾病中出来。

original: Tathāpahīno cāyasmato mahākassapassa so ābādho ahosīti.
translation: 具寿马哈咖沙巴的病就这样消失了。

original: Catutthaṃ.
translation: 第四品

original: 1081. Ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṃ viharati isipatane migadāye.
translation: (如是我闻) 一时，世尊住在巴拉纳西城附近，名为仙人落处的鹿野苑。

original: Tatra kho bhagavā pañcavaggiye bhikkhū āmantesi–
translation: 于其处，世尊对五比库说：

original: ‘‘ dveme, bhikkhave, antā pabbajitena na sevitabbā.
translation: 诸比库，这两种极端乃出家者所不应实行。

original: Katame dve?
translation: 是哪两种呢？

original: Yo cāyaṃ kāmesu kāmasukhallikānuyogo hīno gammo pothujjaniko anariyo anatthasaṃhito, yo cāyaṃ attakilamathānuyogo dukkho anariyo anatthasaṃhito.
translation: 凡是卑劣、粗俗、凡庸、非圣、无意义的，在五欲中，对执取欲乐的追求；以及，凡是致苦、非圣、无意义的对自我折磨的追求；即是这两种极端。

original: Ete kho, bhikkhave, ubho ante anupagamma majjhimā paṭipadā tathāgatena abhisambuddhā cakkhukaraṇī ñāṇakaraṇī upasamāya abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati’’.
translation: 诸比库，不近于这两种极端，中道已为如来所证觉，它引生眼、引生智，为了寂止、证智、正觉、涅槃而转起。

original: ‘ ‘ Katamā ca sā, bhikkhave, majjhimā paṭipadā tathāgatena abhisambuddhā cakkhukaraṇī ñāṇakaraṇī upasamāya abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati?
translation: 诸比库，什么是那已为如来所证觉，引生眼、引生智，为了寂止、证智、正觉、涅槃而转起的中道呢？

original: Ayameva ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi sammāsaṅkappo sammāvācā sammākammanto sammāājīvo sammāvāyāmo sammāsati sammāsamādhi.
translation: 唯独这八支圣道。这八支是什么呢？正见，正思惟，正语，正业，正命，正精进，正念，正定。

original: Ayaṃ kho sā, bhikkhave, majjhimā paṭipadā tathāgatena abhisambuddhā cakkhukaraṇī ñāṇakaraṇī upasamāya abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati.
translation: 诸比库，这即是那已为如来所证觉，引生眼，引生智，为了寂止，证智，正觉，涅槃而转起的中道。

original: ‘ ‘ Idaṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ– jātipi dukkhā, jarāpi dukkhā, byādhipi dukkho, maraṇampi dukkhaṃ, appiyehi sampayogo dukkho, piyehi vippayogo dukkho, yampicchaṃ na labhati tampi dukkhaṃ– saṃkhittena pañcupādānakkhandhā[ pañcupādānakkhandhāpi( pī. ka.)] dukkhā.
translation: 诸比库，此是苦圣谛——生是苦，老是苦，病是苦，死是苦，怨憎会是苦，爱别离是苦，所求不得也是苦；简而言之，五取蕴即苦。

original: Idaṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, dukkhasamudayaṃ ariyasaccaṃ– yāyaṃ taṇhā ponobbhavikā[ ponobhavikā( sī. pī.)] nandirāgasahagatā tatratatrābhinandinī, seyyathidaṃ[ seyyathīdaṃ( sī. syā. kaṃ. pī.)]– kāmataṇhā, bhavataṇhā, vibhavataṇhā.
translation: 诸比库，此是苦集圣谛 -- 即渴爱，导向再生、以喜欢贪染为性 、欣喜于各处各所缘者。這(渴爱)是什么呢?欲爱、有爱、无有爱。

original: Idaṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, dukkhanirodhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ– yo tassāyeva taṇhāya asesavirāganirodho cāgo paṭinissaggo mutti anālayo.
translation: 诸比库，此是苦灭圣谛-- 正是那渴爱的无余舍断、灭尽，舍弃，舍离，解脱，无执著。

original: Idaṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccaṃ– ayameva ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, seyyathidaṃ– sammādiṭṭhi… pe… sammāsamādhi.
translation: 诸比库，此是趋向苦灭之行道圣谛 -- 唯独这八支圣道，这八支是什么呢？正见、正思惟、正语、正业、正命、正精进、正念、正定。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Idaṃ dukkhaṃ ariyasaccan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: “此是苦圣谛”，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ pariññeyyan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe… pe… udapādi.
translation: "应遍知那苦圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ pariññātan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "已遍知那苦圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Idaṃ dukkhasamudayaṃ ariyasaccan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "此是苦集圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhasamudayaṃ ariyasaccaṃ pahātabban’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe… pe… udapādi.
translation: "应舍断那苦集圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhasamudayaṃ ariyasaccaṃ pahīnan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "已舍断那苦集圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Idaṃ dukkhanirodhaṃ ariyasaccan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "此是苦灭圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhanirodhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ sacchikātabban’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe… pe… udapādi.
translation: "应体证那苦灭圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhanirodhaṃ ariyasaccaṃ sacchikatan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "已体证那苦灭圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ ‘‘ Idaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "此是趋向苦灭之行道圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccaṃ bhāvetabban’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe… pe… udapādi.
translation: "应修习那趋向苦灭之行道圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ Taṃ kho panidaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccaṃ bhāvitan’ ti me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṃ udapādi, ñāṇaṃ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
translation: "已修习那趋向苦灭之行道圣谛“，如此，诸比库，于我前所未闻之法中，眼生起，智生起，慧生起，明生起，光生起。

original: ‘ ‘ Yāvakīvañca me, bhikkhave, imesu catūsu ariyasaccesu evaṃ tiparivaṭṭaṃ dvādasākāraṃ yathābhūtaṃ ñāṇadassanaṃ na suvisuddhaṃ ahosi, neva tāvāhaṃ, bhikkhave , sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya‘ anuttaraṃ sammāsambodhiṃ abhisambuddho’ ti paccaññāsiṃ[ abhisambuddho paccaññāsiṃ( sī. syā. kaṃ.)].
translation:
诸比库，只要我对于这四圣谛如此具有具有三种要素的运转
十二種具体表现
的如实智见尚未完全清净，诸比库，我就不在有天、魔、梵的天界，有沙门、婆罗门、人间天子、人类的人界中，承认“已证觉无上正自觉智” 。

original: ‘ ‘ Yato ca kho me, bhikkhave, imesu catūsu ariyasaccesu evaṃ tiparivaṭṭaṃ dvādasākāraṃ yathābhūtaṃ ñāṇadassanaṃ suvisuddhaṃ ahosi, athāhaṃ, bhikkhave, sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya‘ anuttaraṃ sammāsambodhiṃ abhisambuddho’ ti paccaññāsiṃ.
translation: 诸比库，当我对这四圣谛如此具有三转十二行相的如实智见已完全清净后，诸比库，我才在有天、魔、梵的天界，有沙门、婆罗门、人间天子、人类的人界中，承认“已证觉无上正自觉智”。

original: Ñāṇañca pana me dassanaṃ udapādi–
translation: 省察智见于我心流生起:

original: ‘ akuppā me vimutti [ cetovimutti( sī. pī.)], ayamantimā jāti, natthidāni punabbhavo’’’ ti.
translation: “我的解脱不动摇，这是最后一生，现在已无后有”，如此省察智生起。

original: Idamavoca bhagavā.
translation: 世尊说了这些。

original: Attamanā pañcavaggiyā bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandunti.
translation: 自心愉悦的五比库欢喜于世尊所说。

original: Imasmiñca pana veyyākaraṇasmiṃ bhaññamāne āyasmato koṇḍaññassa virajaṃ vītamalaṃ dhammacakkhuṃ udapādi–
translation: 当这解说正被宣说之时，于具寿袞丹雅心流中，远尘离垢的法眼生起:

original: ‘‘ yaṃ kiñci samudayadhammaṃ, sabbaṃ taṃ nirodhadhamman’’ ti.
translation: “凡任何有集法者，一切皆有灭法。"

original: Pavattite ca pana bhagavatā dhammacakke bhummā devā saddamanussāvesuṃ–
translation: 当世尊已令法轮转起时 ，地居诸天神齐声赞叹 (说“萨度”) 后递相传告--

original: ‘‘ etaṃ bhagavatā bārāṇasiyaṃ isipatane migadāye anuttaraṃ dhammacakkaṃ pavattitaṃ appaṭivattiyaṃ samaṇena vā brāhmaṇena vā devena vā mārena vā brahmunā vā kenaci vā lokasmin’’ ti.
translation: “世尊已在巴拉纳西，名为仙人落处的鹿野苑，令这无上法轮转起，于世间不能被沙门，婆罗门，天，魔，梵或任何人所逆转。"

original: Bhummānaṃ devānaṃ saddaṃ sutvā cātumahārājikā devā saddamanussāvesuṃ–
translation: 听到地居诸天神的声音后，四大王天诸天神赞叹 (说“萨度) 后递相传告--

original: ‘‘ etaṃ bhagavatā bārāṇasiyaṃ isipatane migadāye anuttaraṃ dhammacakkaṃ pavattitaṃ, appaṭivattiyaṃ samaṇena vā brāhmaṇena vā devena vā mārena vā brahmunā vā kenaci vā lokasmin’’ ti.
translation: “世尊已在巴拉纳西，名为仙人落处的鹿野苑，令这无上法轮转起，于世间不能被沙门，婆罗门，天，魔，梵或任何人所逆转。"

original: Cātumahārājikānaṃ devānaṃ saddaṃ sutvā tāvatiṃsā devā… pe… yāmā devā… pe… tusitā devā… pe… nimmānaratī devā… pe… paranimmitavasavattī devā… pe… brahmakāyikā devā saddamanussāvesuṃ–
